name: Voter Action Project
subject: MAGA's war on voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_3&amount=25]
This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :
" Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "
This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month.
It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months.
Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_3&amount=35]
The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote.
But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.
You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever.
Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $25 or more right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092725_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092725_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=xOtR8G1pYNX47vZ387KsEQaH3kfqPJBoUYeeZl%2Bmr%2F3ptJm0uqpiAC2VoE5y%2FssxL0wmZSMDPtM34FDR6JO70fHX%2FUmZYzxm2VVG7eud%2F%2FroE5aUjZHHlrrG6jaLQ8ezUDpv7aTj31qtCnQbjZbBFJge%2BweTGtdMx%2B%2FjenOn8xUrUwU14nVV3l3esGSLUAH3EpVjJrntZKDtzPte3T9KE%2Baps7WBsACC7ETXz67dl5AQMATW1XiYEROTeEL54Jey67%2Fzgiz3NNzVVFrbW%2B1OUwcRUDL1bnrOAox%2FygrbBy%2BdkCZaOhU0SdYskQ%2Boy735I8cXXVIew7F80%2BlMFbw8YgiWMEqdu0JGKjD%2F%2FEC7MXVRPpne1h9Sw7%2F6EUBe0OR9ExYdnzfOwSYJS4fEXhrmKeMesurBH%2BQVNJfrXiklR6Q%3D .

subject: I just need a moment of your time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074437/572390994/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.27_Personal_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU3ZTdmNzctZmU5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWzKViy_X1vYo-GHS0ZLD30Pgp9MvBalG158TkOBLJw=)

Can I get personal for a moment? My parents left everything behind when they immigrated here — family, dreams, even careers they loved — because they believed America could keep its promises. That sacrifice is why I take my campaign for Congress — and the oath of this office — so seriously. Every family deserves the opportunity to thrive and get ahead. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074439/572390997/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.27_Personal_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU3ZTdmNzctZmU5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWzKViy_X1vYo-GHS0ZLD30Pgp9MvBalG158TkOBLJw=) We close the books on our fundraising for the quarter in _three days_. After that, David Schweikert and the GOP will be looking at our numbers line by line. But this isn’t just about me. The numbers we report soon will shape how national Republicans and outside groups treat this race. If they see us gaining ground, they’ll know AZ-01 is winnable and double down to try to stop us. If they see us slip, they’ll flood this district with dark money and attack ads. If we fall short, they’ll see it as a sign of weakness and launch even more attacks against me. We’ve got to prove the strength of this grassroots movement in AZ-01 and across the country. Here’s the truth: we’re still missing 11 donations from 18326. It will take people like you — not corporate PACs or special interests — to put us over the top. **[_Will you be one of the final supporters I need before my end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday? Even $5 makes a dent._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074442/572391000/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.27_Personal_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU3ZTdmNzctZmU5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWzKViy_X1vYo-GHS0ZLD30Pgp9MvBalG158TkOBLJw=)** | | [ CHIP IN >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074444/572391003/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.27_Personal_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU3ZTdmNzctZmU5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWzKViy_X1vYo-GHS0ZLD30Pgp9MvBalG158TkOBLJw=)
---
This campaign isn’t just politics to me. It’s about making good on the promise my parents carried when they came to this country. And right now, Schweikert is ripping that promise away from the hardworking folks of AZ-01 — slashing their healthcare, prioritizing tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, and bending the knee to the corrupt Trump administration.
This is our moment to prove we’re strong enough to win. **[_Will you please be one of the final 18326 donors I need before my end-of-quarter deadline?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074446/572391006/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.27_Personal_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU3ZTdmNzctZmU5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zWzKViy_X1vYo-GHS0ZLD30Pgp9MvBalG158TkOBLJw=) **

clean_body: | | = Can I get personal for a moment? My parents left everything behind when they immigrated here — family, dreams, even careers they loved — because they believed America could keep its promises. That sacrifice is why I take my campaign for Congress — and the oath of this office — so seriously. Every family deserves the opportunity to thrive and get ahead. = We close the books on our fundraising for the quarter in three days. After that, David Schweikert and the GOP will be looking at our numbers line by line. But this isn’t just about me. The numbers we report soon will shape how national Republicans and outside groups treat this race. If they see us gaining ground, they’ll know AZ-01 is winnable and double down to try to stop us. If they see us slip, they’ll flood this district with dark money and attack ads. If we fall short, they’ll see it as a sign of weakness and launch even more attacks against me. We’ve got to prove the strength of this grassroots movement in AZ-01 and across the country. Here’s the truth: we’re still missing 11 donations from 18326. It will take people like you — not corporate PACs or special interests — to put us over the top. = | | = This campaign isn’t just politics to me. It’s about making good on the promise my parents carried when they came to this country. And right now, Schweikert is ripping that promise away from the hardworking folks of AZ-01 — slashing their healthcare, prioritizing tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, and bending the knee to the corrupt Trump administration. This is our moment to prove we’re strong enough to win. = If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = — Marlene Galán-Woods | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

Over 1800 detainees entered Alligator Alcatraz. Only 600 came out.
Since the facility was ordered to close, over 1200 detainees have vanished with no transfer records, no deportation documents, and no answers. They are simply gone, and their families are still waiting for answers.
This isn’t a clerical error. It is erasure, plain and simple.
ICE has been holding detainees in makeshift detention centers, such as office buildings, without basic human rights protections. People are kept in overcrowded conditions, denied legal access, and subjected to inhumane treatment.
These are modern-day black sites operating in plain sight.
**The Trump regime has built a system to disappear people. Private prisons, remote locations, and endless transfers are used to erase detainees from the record. This is a violation of human rights and a stain on our nation’s conscience.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6Sht7A47eix1sV_LW2CZCZAys1c9ksOWkDIutz9Tc4YOi-ezVi0XXQEceapObLPktqqjDUpkLNUsmI9v9PObXkvQH9xVHaA4pCSR6WHDcf1GT6W5jd44qRIegajmncN968Rzq5NxSN-fqC5g8rY0xe0e_-z3KAc9KFHTGLgJfipVkSLSDDG_eQ0CSUnb3ttvoBU95FIXZc6RvTtWibIy4Xt0P7UG75MgK6GjAZLvzQW91-jxRHZcxX5w1hMuORd3bfWnYyirYz5H9ncyEovofoj_b61B42LSA2aoc0eOKKC3hd-ULo08SzNbvmuGT2i6GL4WUKBxNio3T4AZ3JuWZX7sSRNF7XXej3RSxeC5jw4tzgkADxQPobCM9BJanahT593g/4ka/WGfwDVQvRQCEAxkHXd5mZw/h3/h001.tqw5XnZ0VRwPFkbALhD8_IbOppHfOdZmsSkBf2f-yW0)

clean_body: | | | ** What the hell has happened? Over 1800 detainees entered Alligator Alcatraz. Only 600 came out. Since the facility was ordered to close, over 1200 detainees have vanished with no transfer records, no deportation documents, and no answers. They are simply gone, and their families are still waiting for answers. This isn’t a clerical error. It is erasure, plain and simple. ICE has been holding detainees in makeshift detention centers, such as office buildings, without basic human rights protections. People are kept in overcrowded conditions, denied legal access, and subjected to inhumane treatment. These are modern-day black sites operating in plain sight. The Trump regime has built a system to disappear people. Private prisons, remote locations, and endless transfers are used to erase detainees from the record. This is a violation of human rights and a stain on our nation’s conscience. Help us take this fight to the public - literally. We’re expanding our billboard campaign to ImpeachTrumpNow.com. We must demand accountability and justice for these blatant and dangerous violations! **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Cancel culture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Former President Barack Obama is spot-on about this
#
**Former President Barack Obama is spot-on about this, Peter:**
_“After years of complaining about cancel culture, the current administration has taken it to a new and dangerous level by routinely threatening regulatory action against media companies unless they muzzle or fire reporters and commentators it doesn’t like. This is precisely the kind of government coercion that the First Amendment was designed to prevent — and media companies need to start standing up rather than capitulating to it.”_
**We cannot allow the Trump administration to keep attacking free speech.**
Media companies need to stand against these attacks. Elected officials need to take action to protect the sacred right to free speech. And today, we’re asking grassroots supporters like you to do your part too.
While the GOP lets Donald Trump get away with this, we need your help to elect Democrats who will work to END these attacks and RESTORE the ability for Americans to speak freely and express themselves. So please:

clean_body: Our campaign is in the fight of a lifetime. | ~ | | | | Friend, Our campaign is in the fight of a lifetime. For the first time in 40 years, Tennessee’s 7th district is within reach. And we’re counting on you to help us cross the finish line. The only way we’re going to flip this district is by coming together and making sure this campaign finishes strong. There are only a few days of early voting left.~~ ~~ Let’s finish strong. Vincent Dixie ~ ~~ Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first. ~ ** | Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee Vincent Dixie for Tennessee73 White Bridge RoadSte 103-328Nashville, TN 37205United States ~ "Website"

I am a Democrat representing a district Trump won by 2 points. Republicans are already pouring millions into attack ads like this so they can replace me with their “dream candidate.” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074993/572429887/-704830606?&refcode=E15441-20250928-DangerAttacks-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NlMTdkMDItMGY5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HbGBmcf6MHXOu9tzCNbrvl1Y1hug1RbhtAVEBDsQKJE=) If we don’t fight back _right now,_ we could lose this seat — and with it, our path to taking back the House majority.**** **I need your help to raise another $20,000 by the deadline on Tuesday to make sure we outraise our MAGA opponent and prove we have the resources to win.** [_**Can you rush in a donation now to help us close the gap and protect this seat?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116074994/572429888/-704830606?&refcode=E15441-20250928-DangerAttacks-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NlMTdkMDItMGY5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HbGBmcf6MHXOu9tzCNbrvl1Y1hug1RbhtAVEBDsQKJE=) Thank you, thank you, thank you. — Josh
---
* * *

clean_body: If we lose this seat, we lose the House. | = | Peter, I’ll be blunt: I’m in serious danger this cycle. I am a Democrat representing a district Trump won by 2 points. Republicans are already pouring millions into attack ads like this so they can replace me with their “dream candidate.” = If we don’t fight back right now, we could lose this seat — and with it, our path to taking back the House majority.** I need your help to raise another $20,000 by the deadline on Tuesday to make sure we outraise our MAGA opponent and prove we have the resources to win. = Thank you, thank you, thank you. — Josh

Democrats’ capacity to compete against far-right candidates is directly tied to the DLCC’s monthly fundraising goals. We set an ambitious goal to raise $150,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday, but as of September 28th, we still need to raise $70,000 to hit our goal.
Republicans have invested over $2 million in get-out-the-vote efforts ahead of this November’s elections in New Jersey and Virginia because they know that every single seat matters – and that turning out even a handful of Republican voters could give them a victory.
Democrats hold an ultra-narrow majority in the VA House – just 975 votes decided the chamber in 2023, and this fall’s elections are shaping up to be ultra-competitive. That’s why we must get back on track to hit our end-of-quarter goal.
**With thin margins, high stakes, and millions of dollars in play, the DLCC is counting on this grassroots team to stay active and engaged.**

clean_body: With less than two months until the polls close, Democrats need all hands on deck to reach undecided voters, rush resources into competitive districts, run digital ads, and so much more. | | | | | ---|--- 📅 On November 4th, state Democrats are facing... With less than two months until the polls close in majority-defining races in Virginia and New Jersey, Democrats need all hands on deck to reach undecided voters, rush resources into competitive districts, run digital ads, and so much more. Over 50,000 supporters have contributed to the DLCC this year – but you haven’t taken that step yet. With over 200 elections on the horizon, we’re counting on you to make your first donation of the year to power state Democrats to victories across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Democrats’ capacity to compete against far-right candidates is directly tied to the DLCC’s monthly fundraising goals. We set an ambitious goal to raise $150,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday, but as of September 28th, we still need to raise $70,000 to hit our goal. Republicans have invested over $2 million in get-out-the-vote efforts ahead of this November’s elections in New Jersey and Virginia because they know that every single seat matters – and that turning out even a handful of Republican voters could give them a victory. Democrats hold an ultra-narrow majority in the VA House – just 975 votes decided the chamber in 2023, and this fall’s elections are shaping up to be ultra-competitive. That’s why we must get back on track to hit our end-of-quarter goal. With thin margins, high stakes, and millions of dollars in play, the DLCC is counting on this grassroots team to stay active and engaged. Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. body:

THIS MESSAGE IS CLASSIFIED TOP SECRET-HANDLE WITH CARE

This is former CIA Director and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo.
[Foreign powers are ganging up on us, trying to take down our economy, security, and way of life.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2nbk8so49tjma29v1vg3ave9mjnpfpmlk20jfs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6clh2bs) They're using every dirty trick in the book - cyberattacks, propaganda, and more - to divide us from within and destroy our alliances.
But we won't back down. We won't show weakness. We'll stand strong and defend our sovereignty, just like we're doing now under President Trump's bold leadership. We're making America great again and won't let anyone take that away.
[Look Friend, I've got the inside scoop on what's really happening and what we need to do next to protect our country. Get the confidential memo now, before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjrrnbd1umush46uq3p9r7gr1goa8jpampds3rsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6clh2bs)

Read the memo. Stay vigilant.
Thank you,
Mike | | |

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo6un5q8f6u748eeu8c0etil3pe72t27heoocu88_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpn8egjd1e9bq4b342vi1vmeq5eg30cqk53nff6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2gjivpslm7uocukrmv188cp899829ktpoorq498_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znvoa4hodvomumqlkq72bk8n309q48n3q56o09a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs6uocbg01q66vhpf97otm2t43h9ba62eqvmfeto_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbn260p9812e2ap2tpmcq62d20p87oarr45df31g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqud9jatn2ft4815vd632tefbl4gjd17f8tir5p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z53o4bavie0ke2jvj8pkpjbumnmhum7gt0c9qdo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imcor6cdh2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: You’re one of America’s most informed seniors | | | | | | | | STOP SOROS Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system......to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc571ikcmtbtfvlq36imcqrjo0noi7hulq4oj3go_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfut87lvf821b2pec0p5t6hph1kdi3l49mktulco_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfo06cgu7bihjcecgkjc491mnv943fioshr5ubfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgs4ancqsdhv1li70drh48hamjdo8s3pf19m78vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5uhl6861susfa57rtt3i0bsjv3bn498r95dioj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcp7reipu9j17vs8jqasc56dhpmofojutp3ecqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkt7oqrmtmtcjdqipt0tf4buauls309ajtaug0pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6268arsp5tcgqekge1d3jvhs2cpoa3vstjbh9i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp6vjgll08fd4p3r254mgutt3uodbub7jn0as34g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1otgl2qrf87at8fkik6p16h381lq18e18veu250_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1h2i0mjf6f9qo3mlgbi8be75ekcabh0i7crdqlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdg3t9eblgrjuci5vidqgp3pt2o36eib3pgta6j8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb6cjh2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 ****

I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome BRAVE Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), BRAVE Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking BRAVE Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So BRAVE Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of BRAVE Books , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, BRAVE Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines , TV personality Missy Robertson , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. BRAVE Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 **** | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qtu0cjo063g6035t8plah5oikc5lp2atbtkdeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
Friend,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg004f4tob9n9sb9m0q79vr6dnquejmqb2icpabg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Friend...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7gqhgpbsm70lu7p03mvv884ojvkau08phjint6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlr6knokcbs85e9nmcma66a6nrpd3ugeup5edo4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcdsrkp3h6u040sfhalq53makdgai75gadoehb20_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdd381ufssv12ui2i4jpcuehhn0p5moi9bpckb4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zio026al4hive9jdhhkgn7iqn1deop41qee4th80_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za7uoi7qa7ju6f70cj5ccheigftlq6vlm5ef36f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zabhk6r3mv49fjs5sus8qfhr6piqg3nan0ptpe88_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlg3ht6rpggbhnafjfjnc7evs1i8tepq1n941ej8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
Also...**Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:**📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...**Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zild253kgp0d0e1vkofti3h5elhip451237ocdsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.**Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdqg3at3r159np730ufrmbpuo1j5mji7lj0q7r38_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend.**God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5mjs2lspjhlrl9op98ql65ks6u125bmajue7k6g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob4sjie8p3246h22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjfhuu3njimpsqgk1s311l02df0i8h0cg1oe8r2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z26sgver4tvs2hc194us7fq4c8e8ddsrtr2qnnfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im2pb1c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: CA-25 is done with the chaos

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=yKpRLh0QBvGP8s8wLJaIIPVR7ydnoJymGxWm4jqYOKKxIF2DGV9waw7Gbm%2F5kXdPebFLHT8rDVxIp2Ik7d05XL0oa2Jtxl4Tm5yJbavfwq5W3kPFeXkTGaSCgNwqmUhF%2BrJKyltCxQP%2BygwPYBh7lKgp%2B9odwqlfjZpWXR6%2Fp2JXWga05fuh%2FbwXRFjcOErn%2Bg%2FpJm6QOy3ZO4%2B40szzm1mElYM6OAOlficj1ceI%2B%2BwmSgl%2BNWw0aFlLfBw59iYP7d0YUpzez5g53Yymsh%2Fd5c%2Bmz8IyWZgppQboEVN7%2FjiNPbLfm60b%2Bs5wTmqX2zEXeiigakmb%2Fy3BIjE0a%2FN1WYgS47y0IARiijdQcNN%2BLZ%2B3rzZwqAqWoQkp0htdjFVV4jS178CLrnfidL4C8uatrB7v0qTQcHBVZ55aUl974kqU10PRfeITk9QGv4Sqppyq]

# [#]
Hi, it’s Raul,

When tensions run high amidst chaos, it's up to leaders to unite people. Instead, Republicans are hoping our communities will turn against each other.

This is their strategy: they lean on disruption and division to fuel their success because when it comes to actual governing, Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans don't have the competence to deliver.

Now, they’re proving our point by dragging us into a government shutdown.

Unless we flip the House, this chaos and dysfunction will continue, and our country and communities will suffer.

We can't let them get away with it. I’ve had so many conversations with voters in the district who are struggling to make ends meet, sacrificing retirement to put their kids through college, and are terrified of medical debt if the unexpected happens.

We don't have to accept this. We can have leadership that works together and governs to solve the problems keeping you up at night. This deadline will show that we're done with the chaos and baseless finger-pointing.

Will you chip in $ now to send a clear message to MAGA Republicans? We're through with leadership that fuels chaos to cater to Donald Trump instead of the people they represent.

DONATE $15 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep25?amount=15&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_092725_EOQ3_D1_S3]

Thank you,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm38nv19iun1nhllndaoa74knni698k5jpvirb1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvjq1bluhhnavh4t43hvr7lbept6ff2jm7uotfk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)**

| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zge4a6q8oa2nq1692nuvepm5fg0g6lpe40qg4j40_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)_**

[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaoq0mj6a1tmrtj90rif93thj1rmmntc43d66070_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr2lnoods511v80j39nvdv81c7adqa9i4l5gfej8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf3g17tktgh8vdju12r84pskthd22gbar8kc3os0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zocb80lkekgoju8s36kh56l0l6h5n38f6e569hto_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1imeoj6chh2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

# **[Pope marks Jubilee of Catechists: teach relationship with Jesus](http://trk.libertyledger._B6JMVlJuXEH_YstJxCQ)**
---
Pope Leo XIV greets pilgrims gathered in St. Peter's Square at the Vatican on September 27, 2025. / Daniel Ibáñez Vatican City, Sep 27, 2025 / 07:30 am (CNA). Pope Leo XIV marked the Jubilee of Catechists on Saturday, urging practitioners of the Church’s lay teaching ministry to hand on the faith in a way that helps others encounter Christ personally, rooted in humility and hope.In his general catechesis, the pope spoke to all the faithful: “God reveals himself to those who are simple and humble of heart because they are open to receiving him,” he said.Leo recalled the election of Saint Ambrose as bishop of Milan, chosen by popular acclaim while still preparing for baptism. “It was also docility that led Ambrose to respond to that call, trusting in the grace of God,” he said.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtrqmuj7lvgp5ggcb773cn1bmvm3dpn2hagv4gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
Friend,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze7aemfke4ujsp80of76uejog5f97rftlq0g2mb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Friend...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ovgiuichr9ghuh26a0u8lqq44t0qnp4n49mbc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8d02432ur5oc9sfasu0af6rnmbgp5npihvj4so_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbd4c0nvjkdshopfjv85d2d8ofvrg96bpaq644fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1thi26l1rbvr1nsvgtbdpen33rik1bp1ntnacpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zipgbcam3e02iv5m4d3tmopl4c8is0fi3cg40q50_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0qt7f9fcjm20rf7qk38ab02v3glua7lu90klupg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztb7ruvo1ac4kg06u3oj3ktgrsaili933ssg9j38_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5mchg5ffgeoqrbg3dbtfhum4lspuaaadvi1fcn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)
---
Also...**Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:**📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...**Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zan7ltakasm0vbv6kt9il5t1h49e320mh4vg0kgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.**Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3prog2gbr2bocbjkdkjvh356m37bf7sv21cp12o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1im1p36cth2bs)

Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend.**God is so good.** 🙏
