name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlrbv8un27vb7fshd8uhr9nug2ka2vug3bah7dl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvjac3ji64ba4l20t1sv0pv07pg8mj0kk45rrm9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zif2aqut4t35dmug1bi5090uqdlkk753djd3l22o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg3f5ubq7t1qktealv176t84jqits94ip38mcdlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zogrqlisfsu2u82ifbv85ta7h7o2f0l34vo0pl1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znbs8jc46c5uvah0tl0uqkk89obel8179k65i66g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm497gi5l22vpg26i63rgl24lignhh7d59mlq8t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfs7kj0k9q5bau66vavoer743ffuc3gnsg6oc610_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z12m6s96iqa52htvn4tsnur944n2iocumvcfhkg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2c1l3pcbl3jj6mstljjguup8gl9jtp4om9cs9a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc10fcf5m6vr7s3o1latjv8up0i00lv4lp3udvo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgpff3o5c1n22ooei4rd8ak9133sic8t8kg36r90_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm0o74cjh2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 ****
---
|
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Personal update on my recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk3bdk1jno1f9g2uvhbaaerc8nna72n7r5g05njo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s1hm8pr0cjh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please - for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue 's Clues_...
---
[](https://email.alert.conservativesgive.com/c/eJyckc2K2zAURp9G3ino39bCi2ScmEJTShYpXYlr-Y4jallGcjyvXzJ0XqDbA_fAud-vq7tCmMMy_YCIrZ92l4sbclimj0easaSIEUuBKSzTAE4woSmzVDRuzams6DcnqrH10ph3VWHLa22Zlkax6tFyA5qDRVBihMYarZE3g6-BDcqDZVVoX0JmRcMZY1IdRuQ12lE2iBa4rYliMGPeDj4tBfMOW9ixTGHHg0-xmtvHtq2FyCMRFyIuBf0z4wEWHNPrJhJxGTLsSIeU_hQiLqLmWnjR0FGjoWpQijbcNBT1UBuD9XtjOZGX5xZdSc_skcju1PX0dr4TYV444hiekcjufP1HPMQVwrQQ2X3mKM7cqevd6Xa8n923vv8t9Hd3O9_dzyN9679Emyeye-vv9OsHVW7H9SPMcyjmVT5FCPNn5_a_y-yt-BsAAP__6ByYgg)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. body:

# Sunday, September 28, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1941, [Boston Red Sox legend Ted Williams](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOiNj7GAKF3-TLn97JVrwOt6TwZG9CeLtT4nuDa6dbzQjfV-3-QaUaL__hw0dhzzveNSEzFjmsBDccecaqKCPz1JohR3jc1ZSGSEnoezsgdI569a7gKhwaNH1o5mkGawd2-jCEvpgjQH0ZjTTsOpRXrDvpbETDN635N5rclK2l1LrSweLBx-UnIztTa9MoyV64ly670w7RwzpzC8s3Zq3NrnI_KjN8K9R10Zdj-PoIlXO5XzzRl05UhUeTkG7-CXvFL04KCWCrYoF17xhFQkqi0eCE4vgLCKx0FK2xfnHp1svY6PlfQNKn3P-k7GXUz8BAAD__7YtgVE) went 6-for-8 in a season-ending doubleheader, raising his batting average to .406 and becoming the last Major League Baseball player to hit .400. Speaking of the Red Sox, the Boston sluggers clinched a playoff spot on Friday night when Ceddanne Rafaela hit a [dramatic walk-off triple](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQAL8Gd4mWNWugoHjSk7tce6WFzRJzwnYEJLn8_Sn3C9dOMSPN52W6-JTTfv3wG7sWj2nnZ83cGpcpzslfeW81psJhvZeSFr_zep8QkE5gT2im4FN-TaoLLjIj9x07qckC9cbobnUBZVwsLWohMgMymt4QEEAwapbgu-TeNrBoJIBSw9nPwYeIYMlIkkhCAYfUjnL-OtLeVo75dTy4nJdj67JbW7tV0f8TOAocv99U4PjkvBwbb3kWONbm270KHKXVUpNSWpNBbVBpK_qxiv6_Grriwu2Zck510ELBdfMp_zban8Y8HP4EAAD__791ct8) to beat the Tigers. We don’t often stop mid-workday to compare grooming routines, but [Particle Face Cream](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O3DAMBeDTyJ0HEuXfQkWAgbtNm1LgSJTNQLINWV5jbx84mZxgWz7iA_l-fdgP5Mjr_BMTmRI2u9J1RCqFsg0vxpnWcgTO5JczZ3a40nJakNDWcqxhsB45ftmm8iYQAemKjOrbUbZ6GPpqMdjKXulOyX4ADeDUqIGo617BK40dVmxuTY4wKCmbpnvgy6MPIMd2UK2CVjSSPJctP35vvJaFQvzaPik_3JaqaJZS9kPoHwImAdN1XY8dc2EXKWw50XqvCZjijjMJmP6HdUBHtcuEqaZYv80b0dNZkj22MzsS-ukWLPNe_jHdHSXyfCahnzuyf88cph15XoV-BmfxnO-nqmz8fnGMfHS9aOSckOPfs8u3uv408CcAAP__G_GUkg) has made the rounds among the guys at _The Flyover_. A few of our team members have been using it, and the feedback has been consistent: skin feels softer, smoother, fine lines look less noticeable, and eye bags are reduced. It’s rare we see a product work this well, [which is why we’re excited to share it with you](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O3DAMBeDTyJ0HEuXfQkWAgbtNm1LgSJTNQLINWV5jbx84mZxgWz7iA_l-fdgP5Mjr_BMTmRI2u9J1RCqFsg0vxpnWcgTO5JczZ3a40nJakNDWcqxhsB45ftmm8iYQAemKjOrbUbZ6GPpqMdjKXulOyX4ADeDUqIGo617BK40dVmxuTY4wKCmbpnvgy6MPIMd2UK2CVjSSPJctP35vvJaFQvzaPik_3JaqaJZS9kPoHwImAdN1XY8dc2EXKWw50XqvCZjijjMJmP6HdUBHtcuEqaZYv80b0dNZkj22MzsS-ukWLPNe_jHdHSXyfCahnzuyf88cph15XoV-BmfxnO-nqmz8fnGMfHS9aOSckOPfs8u3uv408CcAAP__G_GUkg).

## ICE Arrests Iowa School Superintendent
Federal agents arrested the [superintendent of Des Moines Public Schools](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL_G7ojgAgYXFNuke9tuaRG4xHeFwQLyovz9yvsLrxyNNJpz_nxtX54yledvf6AbqW4F3z3jGNi29CD_xDJ6ooZxf7VGwRfcXxtw0IyvDOwWPeXPpuboEiKgnNEJo1eupbVm3p3RPkUTpBBCLQatVqsXYQlBJJ7Eqmdy1xpfwQrOlVpu_hF9TMBXbYUWoCfFMdKo7fa3Uhk7pvyp39huoR5zdvsYZ5_krwnuE9z9eQFc1RXaoJBxgjvVt2cROzsqFeysv05sVAaWiGUw8oW1-sA2Onto8Ct6sJFziGCshLAYLaTiUi4W5-bi-aacqS9mUvx5eMr_v4wfCfx28C8AAP__7nqDew) in Iowa on Friday after they discovered he was in the country illegally with a deportation order—and in possession of a loaded handgun, $3,000 in cash, and a hunting knife. Ian Andre Roberts, originally from Guyana, has [a previous weapons possession charge](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAYBOCnwZsbBFE5cGjSeNteezQoP8vfIBj43c2-fWNfoedJvsnM9325W4yYHl92B0M-LwleNQIRlMWvaB-QqHos4MJZCm42QTgXwYVquW7FtDiL8b30jTMeQIBswHSj0lzJaRqbYLRWYLl0g5y019ANQndcWiX16lYvZYPm0rgWU8d53w83uzrrvOBaTZ3qhGI9B4eUy-0nY6IAPr7zE8pty3sTTSA6KpMfTMxMzBQgYIxXxsQc8g7XICZmcOdmCXNiYlZK9HIcWtygdUAWU20d1HbPmKC29TygYCJIDhJdrpxpLeCZ_AxHU4w7Xhgj1mFkPX_sFv_6GvrXgU8jfgMAAP__FMqEyA) from February 2020. An immigration judge issued a "final order of removal" for Roberts in May 2024. _"How this illegal alien was[hired without work authorization](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ9GO8wVwZ-CYhu72XZLg3AZ7wbBAI6Zt9-42TfY7ktOcnLO9_VYHpo8heen3lEVF5eAV_ZYCqbFraSfGEp2lNBuZ0pkdMDtXDhwyWBifFysJv9eRG2VQ-TY1ajaQU4gu3Ec6k1ZEGAAB8vBgJFDjz2OUphRtCiNa2tSdxtMfGwBhOgbvVptHYdJjq1suawEoKUSU_MdKZQNnX_HF6bGxL32aivlyFX3UfG54vN1XU1Yzf3izis-31jx-czsj8gg0ylhLpmRDizFFVPJLJ8HJgoFg8VQGMVLM4uZ7ZECZnacqyfDstli9JklEzTvBLRdnZQ9LvKecj9UAp67Jv87rvzL6EvxnwAAAP__r_iNGQ), a final order of removal, and a prior weapons charge is beyond comprehension and should alarm the parents of that school district_," said Sam Olson, the director of the ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations St. Paul Field Office. Roberts entered the U.S. on a student visa in 1999. Since 2023, he has served as superintendent of Iowa's largest school district and [previously was a principal](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LEO2yAYBOCnwRsR-W0CDAxdvKVrRwvDT_y3BCwgQXn7Kn2F7qdPd_frvt0dJcqPn-6JtseyZRwtYe9Yt7iTe2DuLVLFcLxqJe8yHq8NBEguDAe9BUfpsy1TsBERcJ7QXpU0Qs5aq-mwShthpJNBzVJprW8SZhW8gluIYg9xIvvVhAF9FWJZbhe3BxciCCP1VV5BskVgoF7q5Xeh3A-M6VPeWC--PKdkj97PxuYfDFYG6xjjknc_XDsoP3rJ3xSD9TuLwZqKd4nBSmU43l4nVsodc8DcuasVW8fA9w8nj_ys-KbyaunDR6l_MHDX-Fkpezpd4pR58OcXnY1ZQCgG61RtOAelRO2m2CIeT0fpX8_-X-e-LfwNAAD__0dlkAU) and school turnaround leader in Washington, DC, Baltimore, and St. Louis.
## FBI Fires Kneeling Agents from BLM Protests
The FBI has [fired roughly 20 agents](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL8GOk722gZTuEhz3aVNiRZ2DZv4ABnfne7vI_ILKUcjzei9r9twQ0myzp9451DiNqz8OhKXwnmIo-DMazmiZKblkbNMuPLyGECBa1TfgB8IJb0HW1OIzMCm5qA71ytnvO_qJVjrKfYqOtbgwAKZzpADNxoTNVFXSzjXVA9eK2Vte8GRkCKo3nntNLjKKiYpW758b7KWhWN6b0_Ol2m71ykspexHZT4quFZwxf0EOKsz5CJT4gqucZRm5i3P3MS0van5wWNpdiycGk_ao-YWHZq2Ne00gdUuTraH0UQHdQ60vyQlOdqusmq-o6S_8_IvY88AvwEAAP__tZJ9jQ) who were photographed kneeling during the Black Lives Matter protests in Washington, D.C., in 2020, according to two unnamed sources. Many of the agents had already been demoted or put on administrative leave. [One source said](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L_uozAMwPGnCVtQyB8CQ4Zb2HrrjcgkTvE1QJWkRX37E71H-G2WLNn6fP_c5htQov3-GzZ0NR7zjmdJWCvmOS4Ed9xriZQxrK-cycOO62uWQhouRi6HOQClz6yb4CKiRNWg66wZhVHDYJvVgcXe90aDgcEaj0HZHpUSqh-1RwsNueuaGOXQCaF138ISIEQpRjN0ppOGaYGB6pHbvwftdcWYPscbc-uPrUlurfVZmPrF5MTkdJ5n65dyKa49k9M1MjnFhfh_Df9y-GNHvOT8mY-KpfIlgX_wRG8sfIOrAJNTk114npQSld4yLe4bUPp-rj_K9XbyXwAAAP__Nw6AeA) that the termination letter to the agents cited an alleged "lack of judgement" in their actions. The FBI Agents Association [condemned the terminations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb8GM6eaVhQCgk3I3qYbWiiN9hYjU8g8y7_fcvYTXnaDW933nD9f05fnxPv62z_J1pinnc4jUa1UpjizX2mvR-RCYXuXwovfaXtPCKhaMC3qKXhO19Q3wUYipK4hK0dlQHVaj81mZ7lAQBp6kh41zHoYByONGqSCHgEatvc1MKglQN8PDz8HHyKCUVoqiUr0QIFrLo-_mfe6UUxX_qbyWPKzSXar9XWI7pdAJ9Cd5_l4H77m4K-7INAdNZdLoLvJBLpXTlx5ueP9WKADc-dRoIszt_-R25VyWamNKV-h_QgQ6PTQaaNhBLjbTbHhdXJKfAyj6GF9ek6fVfVHKr8t_gsAAP__DMGEIQ) in a statement, saying the agents' "constitutional and legal rights" had been violated. [Five agents and top-level executives](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu5CAMQL-GdIwc5wUFxTbpZtstIyaYhF0GIiAT5e9X3PsJt7IlS0c-589zeWrnXdh-6zepYuMS6MqeSqG02JfTG4WSrUtk9jMlt-pA-7kg4MBBchSL0c7fS98YZYmQuoZUOw0Shk6IqdkVjUIYkpPsulFiB4Cr1ga7VQukYWobpyoNJIoWoO_Hh34ZbSyCHEQ7tDiwHsi4EtPjb3Sh7GT9HT-UHmt8N17tpRyZdb8YzgzncB8xl3piOFcwwxlk3UeG85l59WM425fjVSvzb0V-7ZFflIiv-tz2wv8FohqGmzPVgYDAN4ppI259vA0_UiyUS6U1SZnjct67PE6sh-2tnf_6r_wo6kfh_wAAAP__oFOKpw) were fired in August, including an agent who helped oversee the investigations into the Jan. 6, 2021, incursion at the U.S. Capitol and another who resisted Justice Department demands to supply the names of agents who investigated the incursion.
## Would-Be Ford Assassin Dies at 95
Sara Jane Moore, who made an unsuccessful attempt to assassinate President Gerald Ford in 1975, [died Wednesday at 95](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ_G7ohgbcAUFNeky7VXWmtY4o2wiTBJlLc_-X-FvxyNNJrv-3ebb8iZ9_tf3Mi3VOadPkem1qjOaWG8096OxJXi-qqVA-60vmaQoIV0AqY5IufvPPbRJyKgoSevrHZSD9Nk-9WHOCEtRi9KOaWNGh0ASQ2W7DSkhD37c006mJSU42guuESMCaTTk9IKdDdKitxKvTwK722llL_lTfUSytZnv7b2PLrhTwfXDq74PAHO6gy1ccjUwfXAiuKBO4mtlEoiMh2iLNxeWL8ilRqFs8YkSGYIUo9GEwYZkg1Sh5SMAttXH58fzpkPY7tR3jfk_POh_Urc28P_AAAA__-6zIDK). Moore [fired two shots at Ford](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OwyAQBeDT4G4iwOCfgmIbd9l2S2scBpsIgwU4UW6_8l5hu5FG-vTe-7nPd_TBx_UbdzLVpTnSuwSqlfLsFo8rxVqcz2S3M2f_wEjbOUsuNfAR5DBb9OEzq8YaRySpbciIXo9ct8PQN5tx_ai40KpVXScc74XrOi2EXfii2tbpxptL46McBOdKdTdcLFon-agHoYXUTHGyvqZ8eyYf60YufNKL8u2R9iaYrdajsPaLyYnJKX6OVOr1YnK6YCYnPl53x-R0Frj6MTkVzAhPjAR7Spngnc5gYSHAUrAUHyE5ODIVbylWWCljsOBStmAJLWCF8bKbbOzx9iH40vVM8XVHH_6S1X_N-TLyNwAA__-XooeH) outside the St. Francis Hotel in San Francisco, missing the President by inches with the first shot from a .38 caliber pistol. She was tackled by Marine Oliver Sipple during the second shot. After her arrest, Moore revealed she was [previously an FBI informant](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOnDAQxvGnMZ2RGTDYhYs0dJc2JRrWY5iLwRfbLNq3jzbKG1z_06dP_18fywdy5HP7iQe5GtJy0l0i1Up5CSvjRmctgTP5_cqZH3jSfi2gQEtlJZjFI8fXMjTeBSKgviHXTdoq3RszNbuDztJgejPafg3KGD_pyapB-y5YsKtp2L3XlAXTKTUMY4urRx9AWW063YEWgyLPNeX2M_FZdwrxlZ6U20c6muj2Wr-K6H8ImAXM9323dafKB5U3EDBfvwXMaeV6YWYqAmbMlR-RBMwFM8pPPEkeKWWS_9lL3umKXq4ksRQshU-ZgtwoY_QypOylDXn6o0bjm-z8180xchknMajtQI7_vtVvBX06-BsAAP__9DuLfg), which the agency confirmed. She was released on parole in 2007, later saying she had been caught up in the radical political movements that were common in California in the mid-1970s. In a 2009 interview, she said, "_I’m very sorry that it happened. ... I’m very happy that I did not succeed_."

**Whatever happened to Kramer (Michael Richards)?** Comedian Michael Richards won national fame as Kramer, Jerry Seinfeld’s neighbor on the hit comedy series _Seinfeld_ , and seemed poised for a successful post-series career—but that's not how it turned out.

Instead, during a stand-up set at Los Angeles' Laugh Factory in 2006, Richards hurled repeated racial insults at black audience members. Video of the incident went viral, and his career cratered. After that, Richards made a few TV appearances but went into years of self-exile, as he describes it, saying he "canceled" himself and spent time working on anger and accountability. In 2024, he released a memoir, _Entrances and Exits_ , and this year, he has launched a series of live Q&A events in California, the closest he's come to a comeback. Here's [an interview where he discusses his current situation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwVssfIYEBoaqVYZK6drRwuYI1xAT4XOsvH3lvkLX75N-w__7Mlw8ZZqvX_6OjmMZZtyWjMxYhziSv-LMS6SKIa210uRnTOsAEvRB2gOYIXjKr0E1wUVEwL5B1520lbo35tQkF7Q2PfgJJo1GwtEENFIFGwxOI1jVkNs1acF0Uip1bP0YfIggrTad7kALJTEQl9r-FJo5Ycyv8sTaTuXeZJeYH4vo3wScBZy3bWtfZeV1xP3fF89TEv35KfqPGz3g3dCn5VtTXXhslDMtx5NQ8nr3lP9I_leHp4PfAAAA__8ptXEZ). _Were you a fan of Kramer on_ Seinfeld _? On this day in 1941, went 6-for-8 in a season-ending doubleheader, raising his batting average to .406 and becoming the last Major League Baseball player to hit .400. Speaking of the Red Sox, the Boston sluggers clinched a playoff spot on Friday night when Ceddanne Rafaela hit a to beat the Tigers. We don’t often stop mid-workday to compare grooming routines, but has made the rounds among the guys at The Flyover. It’s rare we see a product work this well, . | ICE Arrests Iowa School Superintendent Federal agents arrested the in Iowa on Friday after they discovered he was in the country illegally with a deportation order—and in possession of a loaded handgun, $3,000 in cash, and a hunting knife. Ian Andre Roberts, originally from Guyana, has from February 2020. An immigration judge issued a "final order of removal" for Roberts in May 2024. "How this illegal alien was, a final order of removal, and a prior weapons charge is beyond comprehension and should alarm the parents of that school district," said Sam Olson, the director of the ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations St. Paul Field Office. Roberts entered the U.S. on a student visa in 1999. Since 2023, he has served as superintendent of Iowa's largest school district and and school turnaround leader in Washington, DC, Baltimore, and St. Louis. FBI Fires Kneeling Agents from BLM Protests The FBI has who were photographed kneeling during the Black Lives Matter protests in Washington, D.C., in 2020, according to two unnamed sources. Many of the agents had already been demoted or put on administrative leave. that the termination letter to the agents cited an alleged "lack of judgement" in their actions. The FBI Agents Association in a statement, saying the agents' "constitutional and legal rights" had been violated. were fired in August, including an agent who helped oversee the investigations into the Jan. 6, 2021, incursion at the U.S. Capitol and another who resisted Justice Department demands to supply the names of agents who investigated the incursion. Would-Be Ford Assassin Dies at 95 Sara Jane Moore, who made an unsuccessful attempt to assassinate President Gerald Ford in 1975, . Moore outside the St. Francis Hotel in San Francisco, missing the President by inches with the first shot from a .38 caliber pistol. She was tackled by Marine Oliver Sipple during the second shot. After her arrest, Moore revealed she was , which the agency confirmed. She was released on parole in 2007, later saying she had been caught up in the radical political movements that were common in California in the mid-1970s. In a 2009 interview, she said, "I’m very sorry that it happened. ... I’m very happy that I did not succeed." Comedian Michael Richards won national fame as Kramer, Jerry Seinfeld’s neighbor on the hit comedy series Seinfeld , and seemed poised for a successful post-series career—but that's not how it turned out. Instead, during a stand-up set at Los Angeles' Laugh Factory in 2006, Richards hurled repeated racial insults at black audience members. Video of the incident went viral, and his career cratered. After that, Richards made a few TV appearances but went into years of self-exile, as he describes it, saying he "canceled" himself and spent time working on anger and accountability. In 2024, he released a memoir, Entrances and Exits , and this year, he has launched a series of live Q&A events in California, the closest he's come to a comeback. Here's . name: Troy Downing
subject: I was the last to find out about 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
When the plane landed, everything changed

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkyOF81Ry1MQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MTYzODctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MjhfNUctTEIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzE2Mzg3LTI4OTkifQ/tojyttVKy3G6k7_trfKKRw)On September 11, 2001, I was hunting in Alaska when the planes stopped flying overhead. Something felt wrong.
Days later, a solo pilot landed near our camp and delivered the heartbreaking news: the World Trade Center was gone.
The very next day, I flew home and enlisted in the Air Force to defend the liberties that define our nation.

Now, those same freedoms face a new enemy: radical left policies that seek to erode our values and strip away the rights generations of Americans have fought to protect.
To make it worse, the Fake News media continue to slander MAGA Republicans and promote divisive, progressive ideologies to the public.
As a proud MAGA conservative and Trump supporter, I’m fighting in Congress to drain the swamp and advance America First principles.
But I can’t do it alone. It takes a fearless MAGA army of patriots like you to stand against fake news, big tech censorship, and deep state intimidation.
With the critical FEC Q3 deadline just days away, we cannot afford to miss our fundraising goal and lose ground in this pivotal fight.
The GOP House, alongside President Trump, is our last line of defense against the left’s plans to strip away our freedoms.
Time is running out to show the strength of our movement before the 9/30 deadline.
[I’m humbly asking you to act NOW to defend our House Majority:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkyOF81Ry1MQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MTYzODctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MjhfNUctTEIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzE2Mzg3LTI4OTkifQ/DXNufhUm1XEoSwZoKcavyw)[RESCUE THE PRO-TRUMP MAJORITY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkyOF81Ry1MQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MTYzODctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MjhfNUctTEIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzE2Mzg3LTI4OTkifQ/CeSykvdA_V2WNYSGmqkKEw)Let’s send a clear message before the FEC deadline: MAGA is here to stay.
God bless,
Troy Downing| |

# Sunday, September 28, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1941, Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver [Charley Taylor](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9uqzAUgPGnMVuQ_wcGD1dXYkunSh2tQ3wMVh2M7KMQ3r5KX6Hjt_yG7-vmb5By2pYPeKCjVyx-w6NlJMLqGwHhEvZWoDaoMKcwA8EWvOTSXPh4kYMPkPLpdRfczMMoOnTiakZurkrobnWoLSqrzKyiijPGaJQGCJErtPdo711yb4yPchCCCyN6PYARNuAoB20GjkxzDIlK7WlFwhe0mM_yxNrfy6PLbiXaG1P_mJyYnHDrj_SddgwJ-lIXJqd3Mzn9X6FmPP0nnLnUrrqwHynn1OyVab48IOVfkf724enkTwAAAP__YS5y6g) was born in Grand Prairie. He played 13 seasons for the Washington Redskins, earning eight Pro Bowl selections while amassing 649 receptions for 9,110 yards and a franchise record 79 touchdowns. A jail facility in Lufkin was demolished last week, revealing a century-old Dr Pepper mural. ## State GDP and Income Growth Outpace National
New data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis [revealed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0SmzAQhJ9GdGIkgfgpVKShc9qUzKE7sGYEItLZ2G-fsSdF-tS7s7vf_rrNNwgxHNtP2Mnxa03zQVeJxEx5LgxMG54lQS6QYQm4AMOBs1HGSjVKM8wIIb7ntkK3KBx1RU73dlS2b3Rb3d3i0S_Wrr32TU_QEfrBrjAao5vedr4K7hOmRjNorbTVdTuA1R3SaIbWDopEqwgDp1zznZheUNb4Tk_KtU97Fd2d-Syi-SHMJMx0XVe9ENRbegozfWCEmT4NwkxbTqVITDsVDl6eOeHDs_xiSjhQnpRLOiDKcPi001_FHCh_PyAzZfkF_9daZYfnFWIMpetFq7YdQvwu4__78-nMnwAAAP__fRaLvg) that Texas' second-quarter gross domestic product (GDP) growth was 6.8%, outpacing the national rate of 3.8% and trailing only North Dakota for the highest expansion rate in the country. The largest factors [contributing to the growth](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkk-PqjwUxj8N7sa05Y-yYOEM4lsimFEj6oa0tEClKK_tDJZPf4NmJnd_dye_3-nTs3iyJE-IkOJapaTlgX6Ut_zKeyW51vyeK000r1inbuSuyJ1QwSjR5MpyBJD7Bvw3NM8ZEdLkzoQFFDAfTngAZ64P3JkNnUkdzCC1PeoiVCLGfeDysmQjmxHGHK-gExGMYcBHcwgBdOHUmRMXeoz7aO64c8AtB3Am9O0-1TXX_EFUKc3tm9-nxa2dyKDWulOWvbBQZKGIdJ2aUk6m1e3bQpHQhEo-Kjva8v9xaNnhDFjIU5p3lh1CC3l5JV_Tgn-x9iIttMgrYqHFJiycZI9RGjZwfVna6b5yN_vPYbMvpq-lPHY8fx6nabS30KIY_t45NXRYNudh2bDwl8NNmDTkgmG86vt4VfUWsrmJ6-K_9-78gb10WCh8TcH5-D7gS0eTXW82u96ku34Y51T0JjX9kERA4XZbs9VSbKSmWG7rU_uQu-xTrD8wTC6NOO4eFDewJq1vjiAy52w5uh5LoDIT79kqAucdVpkZGWTrSInPYyxPLwY24aJPPmL2zJEpOB23XWFvu5N5ep3sftzhixy3JUXnkmaHurAPZszFzUOy9qAKEz-zs9GJ51uThBj-_PnkTSzPSH5h0Yv1fvm6XUp5OsblNnObX36A_uQesK4XUgrlzSwHVC0R8lkG_W8V_g7QnwAAAP__idMGFA) were the expansion of the mining, quarrying, oil and gas extraction industries, which accounted for 2.01% of the state’s expansion, and manufacturing industries, which accounted for 1.53%. Texans' personal income also increased by 6.4% annually, beating the national average of 5.5%. Gov. Greg Abbott [celebrated](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSpCAQhJ8GMywYZdWA4BKzvfRCa5RRqULwYM7dffsr9xX--Ovq-rr_PKcn-uDj9hsPsvxe0xTpVQIxU54KI9PmzpIwF8w4ezcjY3QTKDBSDRL6yaEPn6mtnJ2VG3RFVndmUKZrdFvtdl7mFRwsZu2XBbDTMzzMgq3W1NDcNZW3d5kaoNdaaaPrtkejH44G6FvTKxKtIuc55Zp3YnpjWcMnXZTrJR1VsDvzWUTzS8AoYNzSVX9D9ZYuAeM9R8B4psICxi-RtKSYjo-k94nRFbliYcqSd4wyIvsUpY8SopN__2G-0a1YZevOlw_Bl0cnWrUd6MPXgX_23GXhfwAAAP__VHqEYQ) the report, citing Texas' commitment to slashing red tape and unleashing economic development.
## DNA Linked to 1991 Murders
Austin police announced on Friday that new DNA evidence has [linked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp9GOwygjFpQbGM3225prnBVsgiGex1n3n4z-wp__SVfzjl_nvMTQgxp-w0HWn6veU54U0RmLDMxMG7-pAyFoMAS_AIMyc9aaiPkKPQwewjxM3e1t4v0o6rRqt6M0vSt6urdojPDMsLyGHu3modc2944MxjXomwNyjrY75kc9aCUVEY13QBGPTyOeujMILHqJPrAuTS8I-MbaI2f_MLSuHzU0e7MJ1Xtr0pPlZ7u-27W_P5afPdKTxdVevIJBL6Cx-RQuALuLwmXoxcOCIXLKaFjEh7BC7roRMfiuIrHQqITjJhIwEUckvjk7SosaM9nA8dZF-vPO8QY6NFXndwOCPE_Gv8s6MvqfwEAAP__k7SNkg) a suspect to the Austin "Yogurt Shop Murders," where four teenage girls were shot in 1991. The DNA reportedly belongs to Robert Eugene Brashers, a suspected serial predator. Brashers committed suicide in 1999 during a police standoff in Missouri. He has [now been linked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupiAUhJ8GOwwgCBQU29jdbbc0RzkqWRQDqPd_-437CrecTDKZ7_vzNX5BiOFYf8OOrn4vaTzwKRFrxTyWChVXf5YEuUCGKfgJKhx-FEwoyiwVZvQQ4meUjXcT85Y36LhWlindcdlsTnPosGNcWzZJNqPqpZmEVlYyZHrCJrh3jFlhOGdc8VYaULz3aIWRyjAkkqEPNeW2bljxG8oSP-nG3M5pb6Lbaj0L6X4RMRAxPM_T_r0vfEsiBsg1zBGJGF4uIoY5h_2NcJUaDvpJ65UrLVs66X5lj7nQkuKNnohB9JZytliNXlPws6BScUmNREU7yRdupmU2XjbZ-fMJMYbSayLZukOI_9_Vnzm9nfgXAAD___pwiKM) through DNA to three other rapes and murders in other states. Two other men, teenagers at the time of the murders, had initially [confessed and been convicted](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE8DmUd2Y4MdONhkstl0Q9TgBiwZjOyev9uveFd4WZVKKlV9_x7jA2OKx_oXd_L8WfJ40LsmYqYyVkamNZw1Y6lYcIphQsYjjCDBCOkE2DFgTN9Rt8FPMjjVkleDcdIMndLt5mGgYRl06EFOVoHRPYClyQXqnEK3tNFfZdKBVUoqo27aolF9IAdWGyup0ZJC5FxuvBHTB-uSvvlF5TbnvU1-Yz5r0_1p4N7AHc_rwBVdpnCcE13qWTke4pvXZ2FRt3wK5ZwS-7MEKlXUnF4UxDLbHpVzA1rrDIBe-jmA6ibqFt2BaosP5zumFGs_NFquO8b0s4N_R-_l4X8AAAD___ZcgdY), though they later said their statements were made under duress. The new DNA analysis pointed to Brashers, and both men were released.
## Six Employers Noted for Culture
A new _Forbes_ list ranked hundreds of employers in the U.S. based on company culture. [Six Texas employers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnwVssOINtBoYu3tK1o3WEI0HCwYJLnLx9lb5C51_6hv_nvJ4x5XS_fuNGjl-xrHc6WiZmqmtjZLqGvRWsDSv6FDwy3sMKEsxJ2hPMa8CU36vugvMyWNWRU5Ox0kyD0t3NkaYQLQwyTnEwozU-SIjgLx5pnKztkvtg0sKslFRG9XpGo8ZAFmZtZklCSwqJS-35RkwvbDG_y5Nqfylbl92NeW9i-BKwCFiO4-hjqZ7aJwtYcmrcBCy07bm8qbbT5ZH5UUnA0lUX9iPlnNo4CS2vG6b8x_L_Zjwd_AYAAP__QlZ0QQ) placed in the top 100, and several more were on the longer list. The list ranked organizations on various metrics and was built from surveys of more than 218,000 workers employed at companies with at least 1,000 people. Houston Methodist was the highest-ranked Texas firm at No. 15, followed by MD Anderson Cancer Center (No. 47), Austin Community College District (No. 56), The Container Store (No. 58), Cook Children's Healthcare System (No. 61), and Lewisville Independent School District (No. 73).

clean_body: New data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis that Texas's second-quarter Gross Domestic Product (GDP) growth was 6.8%, outpacing the national rate of 3.8% and trailing only North Dakota for the highest expansion rate in the country. | | | | | | Sunday, September 28, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1941, Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver was born in Grand Prairie. He played 13 seasons for the Washington Redskins, earning eight Pro Bowl selections while amassing 649 receptions for 9,110 yards and a franchise record 79 touchdowns. A jail facility in Lufkin was demolished last week, revealing a century-old Dr Pepper mural. Check out photos and read more in Around Texas. Abilene ⛅ 89/63° | Amarillo ⛅ 90/64° | Austin ⛅ 92/65° | Brownsville ⛅ 92/75° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 91/74° | DFW ⛅ 91/66° | El Paso 🌧️ 87/66° | Houston ⛅ 85/66° | Laredo ☀️ 94/74° | Lubbock ⛅ 88/60° | Midland ⛅ 90/62° | San Antonio ⛅ 92/66° | Tyler ⛅ 87/64° | Waco ⛅ 88/64° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | State GDP and Income Growth Outpace National New data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis that Texas' second-quarter gross domestic product (GDP) growth was 6.8%, outpacing the national rate of 3.8% and trailing only North Dakota for the highest expansion rate in the country. The largest factors were the expansion of the mining, quarrying, oil and gas extraction industries, which accounted for 2.01% of the state’s expansion, and manufacturing industries, which accounted for 1.53%. Texans' personal income also increased by 6.4% annually, beating the national average of 5.5%. Gov. Greg Abbott the report, citing Texas' commitment to slashing red tape and unleashing economic development. DNA Linked to 1991 Murders Austin police announced on Friday that new DNA evidence has a suspect to the Austin "Yogurt Shop Murders," where four teenage girls were shot in 1991. The DNA reportedly belongs to Robert Eugene Brashers, a suspected serial predator. Brashers committed suicide in 1999 during a police standoff in Missouri. He has through DNA to three other rapes and murders in other states. Two other men, teenagers at the time of the murders, had initially , though they later said their statements were made under duress. The new DNA analysis pointed to Brashers, and both men were released. Six Employers Noted for Culture A new Forbes list ranked hundreds of employers in the U.S. based on company culture. placed in the top 100, and several more were on the longer list. The list ranked organizations on various metrics and was built from surveys of more than 218,000 workers employed at companies with at least 1,000 people. Houston Methodist was the highest-ranked Texas firm at No. 15, followed by MD Anderson Cancer Center (No. 47), Austin Community College District (No. 56), The Container Store (No. 58), Cook Children's Healthcare System (No. 61), and Lewisville Independent School District (No. 73). | Dear Flyover Reader, Since launching our crowdfunding campaign to open Flyover ownership to readers, we’ve been overwhelmed and humbled by the response. More than a thousand readers have already joined us as investors—and they’re now part of our ownership team. But we also know many of you care deeply about The Flyover’s mission, even if now isn’t the right time to invest. Some of you have asked, “How can I still be part of the team?” That’s why we’ve created the . It’s a way for every reader who believes in fact-first, common-sense news to step in and join the team—even without investing. The Flyover will always be free to read. But if you believe our work is worth more than “free,” then this is your chance to stand alongside us and support the movement we’re building together. Every contribution helps us grow our readership, expand into new states, and keep producing the kind of news that millions of Americans already rely on. Legacy media has failed. The Flyover exists because readers like you are proving that a better way is possible. Thank you for standing with us—whether as an investor, a tipper, or simply a loyal reader. You are the reason we’re building something different and you are part of a great team! () ➤ Dallas : A senior Department of Homeland Security official announced the names of the three immigrant detainees shot in Wednesday's ICE facility attack. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Fight billionaires. Tip your waitress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
From the restaurant to the campaign trail
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae2713da-7974-415a-8b5c-3b97fb5b6b81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| What’ll you have, Peter? I’m running for Congress, but I haven’t stopped waitressing here in Eau Claire. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4fd0206-97ca-471d-8539-1397c6766c30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve been serving since I was a teenager – helping to put myself through school and make ends meet. I love this job, and I think there’s real dignity in hospitality work. I also believe the lessons you learn waiting tables can apply everywhere, even in Congress. This campaign is built on the same values you learn on the restaurant floor: hard work, respect, and showing up for people, no matter what. I think Washington could use more of these values -- and fewer career politicians and billionaires who’ve never worked waiting tables in their lives. That’s why I’m running - and that’s why I’m asking: [Can you throw some love into the tip jar for my campaign and Blue Amp Action, so I can bring real change to Washington? Chip in $10 today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4de656cc-fb9c-416f-96ba-90d78d023325/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa1fcdbf-ddf3-477d-b097-ce2618690e00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Personal update on my recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
And now, this car crash has set me back even more...
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b158808f87fe4d34ab8d457a95182f1d&_e=jHPkzurtdrYt6Z7xIQAMWRh0X9SmhAnLtw8lK66MolvrhS3D1jO1TMUajt5jcGYw5C5i9Q_tG1WKuyUKcO_F0THkeAD6YrLm6WiFF_vvGPTsSWAzV88g7ASj_OLIAmRWr79CY8HO4yNJbOiz4y6OKsy80R-oP4W1A-gqRsglFgag8sUkfGDVGWxDTzN-jaTkxKf68e9Kw-H0miNp5G9T0TDe0q8tqqnh8Nrq9qzdhKyFDbIG6dxy5Nlvrl9RiW0wkMegQ4D-miaI75DytOdLinsbnKHthKqmpjeZX0LJFcf0Uqnhq94uBzEwEFMenYsnNJ8BUCFGOoIgwjIIKOyAEUfRKVkx85gIwcX1iVbVphZlY0vZ9MkK0JNMfE3QTFX30H_dPw4vYHwvdIwCFmw7fiXpiCIzWm6AZYmWW0MmZztCTUuIyQ2Gnd8NoN3Ps56Hpg_YuIkaELAR15Fr8jUTYG4vunASEovvTxjOQa2_5qCyj-50aNlm6WXI05uqBfdi9ozq782P3Ch8pY_iplqTJMalxS7vD-o_pnaOiCkLebiqk8agL8g5LG2h1aU7iqzl6OkS_L0aV5JwTRW4uNoH8RdL7HGg7J-y2M097qH095RYJizVuyVLVWJlOTzvd-qUVZOOLO5ANhaUjfZHd4nMvQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b158808f87fe4d34ab8d457a95182f1d&_e=jHPkzurtdrYt6Z7xIQAMWRh0X9SmhAnLtw8lK66MolvrhS3D1jO1TMUajt5jcGYw5C5i9Q_tG1WKuyUKcO_F0THkeAD6YrLm6WiFF_vvGPTsSWAzV88g7ASj_OLIAmRWr79CY8HO4yNJbOiz4y6OKsy80R-oP4W1A-gqRsglFgag8sUkfGDVGWxDTzN-jaTkxKf68e9Kw-H0miNp5G9T0W8MekBaufouqjJvB8LynG1UOGRCZXdm_ZGYON9Mf_6hQwBwUKz-GgLm2TZEIf-2x8vmRMBqs7EqiIE-lvJQrhL4Z-R89wQ6R88heAtJwhE3YefhbL4sMd5570pgsrQCmDIAAub3p_uTX1MglAaalOXUHsgYJz_Xi8afyT9u4ANqkm_zemMJJxTtQnArrqd8Y_d9i0z_mC4Du5rmTvVsAdVa1eVmgAnA87Nu_Q-74zZ4eNhSQfWNc_D-Sg4aTtwlPAzIl7SlreqoHklpZ_x8mjXAFauybbnIRAtOF53pwaCAG4EAulX5TvcnYQU3k-8mUTTyFwwkY85OnSu6zEOASxwCWcMFqpEAyLxV_SN5t_mOwQGt9d02EUB5PFRiVOM-qBj7YQiiN4EFtc636brfe53px3GWYXjJNDJuUFv2DqHoTZGfh_mSbJS2ZUAhIFZ9Ww%3D%3D)
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
[ **So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b158808f87fe4d34ab8d457a95182f1d&_e=jHPkzurtdrYt6Z7xIQAMWRh0X9SmhAnLtw8lK66MolvrhS3D1jO1TMUajt5jcGYw5C5i9Q_tG1WKuyUKcO_F0THkeAD6YrLm6WiFF_vvGPTsSWAzV88g7ASj_OLIAmRWr79CY8HO4yNJbOiz4y6OKsy80R-oP4W1A-gqRsglFgag8sUkfGDVGWxDTzN-jaTkxKf68e9Kw-H0miNp5G9T0XiiEO5c59zQ8e6lydnH80wv_8O6Vm_UBvXfwXmoT5NTEy0YpsEFCNntgjU3T8atC8rgJHhJwfsd3wEf8Q65iwS2l6oVzcQ_QygASVXUZimnC-BtcKOxtmtqLVES6097CHjr-p9zjdOd0Bs1fiDW9yO5D71EuZfLcEfOxzaKkfXm8oZ0yOBbpjMPL-dVlo9EUAm3yXocouAZeGctNy-ypfsrUqfOXYHwxON5qqe8pEG90nhc-xkDWw0UkcleyTdBOb-0dTWSV-KcHj42fEExkojjRH46hY_k54ztW9YqCPWGA9ZFlOgcoCaPhKLo2ccgi_W7Dxazynv9OjouaEljeHeSLWOh1rzQ-38mOmtiXBPpXeAgsfpvB9-U4nbkUtok6asqfi1EZrcFYbaLA1VhXH26lS-ZOZ9WKFkcOy3DsRo4HFJIsbWdXenwofCmJbuetg%3D%3D)

clean_body: And now, this car crash has set me back even more... Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more... And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Final countdown
subject: 37 Days to Save Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
In less than 37 days, voters in Pennsylvania will make a decision that could change the course of American politics for the next decade.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gj-AaLn2fuP5ir74apl07ci-vIIR-oc6xhggBipWemhQ6-qCbmMxv1GWdlmLnjzWKAOJZot68OTLIlr_MJyqzsTwveIhtDQY_RHn-Q8sYJqCFpUeisP4Yy0E3FD_8iHFGfonJI6uZhilPMPb4MfvbhEtwB7vYOq8RRZ_X-cxkdL851KDKhWEnTcVwEghUTceJoErWtzXRBKz4U-eZWPajbqm-DANoWxh&c=ASFB6JOKTRhxRcoiO4ELk9rXuiMxZZtpLX_0R9TaHMKsJSAYP837KQ==&ch=WI3KNuRrFD4LIWvNstQZNwQ2VnXOj3S0bhLy8a1YJsgAqcHF7_qS3g==)

| Peter,
In less than 37 days, voters in Pennsylvania will make a decision that could change the course of American politics for the next decade.
Three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for retention. If they fall, MAGA takes the majority -- and with it, the power to redraw maps, greenlight voter suppression, and rubber-stamp Trump's agenda.
That means the rules of the game for 2026 and 2028 will be written not in Washington, but in Harrisburg.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gj-AaLn2fuP5ir74apl07ci-vIIR-oc6xhggBipWemhQ6-qCbmMxv1GWdlmLnjzWKAOJZot68OTLIlr_MJyqzsTwveIhtDQY_RHn-Q8sYJqCFpUeisP4Yy0E3FD_8iHFGfonJI6uZhilPMPb4MfvbhEtwB7vYOq8RRZ_X-cxkdL851KDKhWEnTcVwEghUTceJoErWtzXRBKz4U-eZWPajR8H09CB7L8K&c=ASFB6JOKTRhxRcoiO4ELk9rXuiMxZZtpLX_0R9TaHMKsJSAYP837KQ==&ch=WI3KNuRrFD4LIWvNstQZNwQ2VnXOj3S0bhLy8a1YJsgAqcHF7_qS3g==)
---
| | | | Think about that. The most important election of 2025 isn't for Congress or the presidency. It's this quiet, overlooked judicial race that will decide whether democracy survives the next two cycles.
Republicans know it. That's why they're already blanketing Pennsylvania with ads, mailers, and canvassers -- outspending Democrats ten-to-one. And unless we meet them head-on in these final weeks, they will succeed.
Defend Our Courts is on the ground with canvassers, organizers, and digital ads, but every day counts. If we can't keep our teams funded week after week, we will fall behind right as ballots begin hitting mailboxes.
[That's why we're asking you to join us in a new way: make a weekly donation starting today that will end on our November 4th 2025 Election Day. Even just $25 a week keeps our organizers knocking, our ads running, and our voter education efforts alive through the finish line.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gj-AaLn2fuP5ir74apl07ci-vIIR-oc6xhggBipWemhQ6-qCbmMxv1GWdlmLnjzWgGj2-gMPVJ2wDJmwiVab7kWn_mAwTvNUKqJVnzeTXbIEdDvOF-I88gyCVWLILWzfG41Lpk6ITC7-JMGIuizdoXQHaPcFImZtd95X6ueMCGyNDeQGo9Bseh0KyQAdrm_CVg73635o-JxrYP9BZEKMh7Y_fi4EF4hd1w6Kwon1Tdw8gmCu8CoghrvLV6CPgicGANYM2EhfZkM=&c=ASFB6JOKTRhxRcoiO4ELk9rXuiMxZZtpLX_0R9TaHMKsJSAYP837KQ==&ch=WI3KNuRrFD4LIWvNstQZNwQ2VnXOj3S0bhLy8a1YJsgAqcHF7_qS3g==)

Friend, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Krasner–PAC emails spark alarm
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=07ecd709e9&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Emails show questionable collusion between Krasner and PAC donors](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5e3255daf8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Ben Mannes_
Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner, long a focal point in the national debate over progressive criminal justice reform, faces escalating legal and ethical scrutiny after a trove of documents revealed extensive coordination between his campaigns, outside political action committees, and a powerful nonprofit consulting operation. The findings, resulting from open records requests obtained by the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF), uncover a network of relationships that not only push the boundaries of ethical conduct but, under federal and local law, may[ cross into](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d8f52892a0&e=b7b3eddce2) unlawful territory for candidates and political action committees ([PACs](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7ada7d3442&e=b7b3eddce2)). **Why It Matters.** At the heart of the issue is the strict legal prohibition against politicians and candidates coordinating directly with PACs. Federal statutes alongside Pennsylvania’s election laws explicitly forbid[ collaboration](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e764fe377b&e=b7b3eddce2) on campaign strategy, expenditures, or messaging between candidates and these independent political committees. Violations of these firewalls fundamentally undermine limits on campaign contributions and can distort the integrity of democratic elections. The implications of these findings reverberate well beyond Philadelphia. Documents show Wren and peer organizations actively shaping both campaign strategy and the policies implemented by the very prosecutors they help elect. The same funding streams, in some cases, back protest groups and advocacy organizations whose members could face prosecution — further muddying questions of independence and public accountability for chief law enforcement officials. **Quotable.** “Overall, Wren and entities like Fair and Just Prosecution act as the coordinating brain of the progressive prosecutor movement. Because of the way they are financially structured, they allow some of the high-profile liberal donors to funnel money to progressive prosecutors while leaving a very murky trail.” – former Chester County DA and federal prosecutor Thomas Hogan. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=46b39fea80&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Federal probe launched into Unionville-Chadds Ford School District after parent complaints](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=085d19b8ab&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
United States Attorney General Pam Bondi issued a[ memorandum](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ec2340aca5&e=b7b3eddce2) earlier this month directing “the Civil Rights Division to be alert to violations of parental rights and First Amendment liberties in educational settings” and for the “U.S. Attorneys to work with federal, state, and local partners to identify and respond to credible threats against parents and violations of their federal rights.” Just eight days after the memorandum was issued, the U.S. Department of Justice contacted a local father regarding alleged violations of his First Amendment and due process rights by the Unionville-Chadds Ford School District. According to the letter, dated September 16, 2025, Edward R. Martin, Jr., appointed by President Trump to serve as the Director of the United States Department of Justice Weaponization Working Group, notified local parent Chad Williams about opening a new investigation regarding his allegations. **Why It Matters.** As a parent of school-aged children who attend the Unionville-Chadds Ford School District, Williams began voicing concerns during Covid regarding the extended school closures and mandatory masking. He claims the district and the superintendent ignored him, despite numerous requests to meet. The lack of transparency regarding the closures and forced masking pushed Williams to start looking at other issues in the school. He then discovered the district facilitated the administration of a third-party survey without parental consent. According to Williams, he asked to meet with members of the board and the superintendent, and they once again ignored his requests — denying his parental rights, First Amendment rights, and right to due process. Based on the district’s actions, Williams lodged a number of complaints at the state level, including with the Pennsylvania Department of Education, but no agency investigated. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c920de9a41&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Ben Mannes: Dugan talks crime, Krasner talks Trump](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cc51741411&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: New Chester County Human Relations Commission passes 2–1 amid heated debate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bfdc9e15bd&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Pop quiz for school boards and candidates](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=12de233e10&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Tom DePietro: Now is the time to reform pharmacy benefit managers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de7c0c7a1b&e=b7b3eddce2) **
* **[Seth Higgins: Rural Pennsylvanians can hear you, you know?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a6a83c5cec&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Philadelphia spy case ends in prison sentence for former defense contractor](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3e2072bde6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Listening to Justice Barrett](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=20a21e226f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stew Bolno: Trump Derangement Syndrome is a very real thing](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=731dc2346d&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Student test scores around the country have been declining, despite more tax money being poured into the system every year. This was true before Covid and the pandemic accelerated the decline even more. But there is one bright spot, and it’s from the poorest region of the country, a place that richer states once looked at as a cautionary tale: the Deep South.

Now, as [Kelsey Piper reports](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b5a7d72cfd&e=b7b3eddce2) for a new publication, _The Argument_ , Mississippi, Louisiana, and Tennessee have led the way out of America’s education decline and are teaching students better — doing more with less than the richer states of the North and West. The story is not new, but the rest of the country has been hesitant to follow or even talk about it. Why? Political tribalism. “I think the story is going untold for the same reason journalists ignored the successful school reopening stories in Florida and the rest of the Sun Belt in August 2020: The appetite to tell positive stories in red states is low,” one expert told Piper.

Illiteracy is a choice, Piper writes. What choice will Pennsylvania make?
---
|
---
|
# **5\. Snakebit?**
The Eagles are flying high. The Phillies are back in the playoffs. But the Sixers are suffering devastating injuries before the 2025-26 season even begins.

Jared McCain’s torn UCL is a setback for a team that already spent much of last season hobbled by injuries. The timeline for McCain’s comeback is still uncertain, Austin Krell writes, but it certainly means nothing good for him or the team. [Read more about it at On Pattison](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ed805a01e4&e=b7b3eddce2) — a part of the Fideri News Network.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Ben Mannes Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner, long a focal point in the national debate over progressive criminal justice reform, faces escalating legal and ethical scrutiny after a trove of documents revealed extensive coordination between his campaigns, outside political action committees, and a powerful nonprofit consulting operation. The findings, resulting from open records requests obtained by the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF), uncover a network of relationships that not only push the boundaries of ethical conduct but, under federal and local law, may unlawful territory for candidates and political action committees (). Why It Matters. At the heart of the issue is the strict legal prohibition against politicians and candidates coordinating directly with PACs. Federal statutes alongside Pennsylvania’s election laws explicitly forbid on campaign strategy, expenditures, or messaging between candidates and these independent political committees. Violations of these firewalls fundamentally undermine limits on campaign contributions and can distort the integrity of democratic elections. The implications of these findings reverberate well beyond Philadelphia. Documents show Wren and peer organizations actively shaping both campaign strategy and the policies implemented by the very prosecutors they help elect. The same funding streams, in some cases, back protest groups and advocacy organizations whose members could face prosecution — further muddying questions of independence and public accountability for chief law enforcement officials. Quotable. “Overall, Wren and entities like Fair and Just Prosecution act as the coordinating brain of the progressive prosecutor movement. Because of the way they are financially structured, they allow some of the high-profile liberal donors to funnel money to progressive prosecutors while leaving a very murky trail.” – former Chester County DA and federal prosecutor Thomas Hogan. | | 2. subject: We need to show the GOP that the people are with Wesley
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Hey Peter — it's Jordan, Wesley's campaign manager.

It's been a little while since I've reached out personally, but this is important. We're just a couple of days away from our next FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

Soon, our fundraising numbers from this last quarter will be made public. And the truth is the GOP's relentless redistricting attacks in Missouri are proof that not a single seat is safe. **Not one.**

If we don't show strength now, they'll think Democrats are vulnerable. This campaign has always been about people coming together to demand better for our communities. If you believe in Wesley's fight for affordable health care, a strong economy, and accountability in Washington, _now is the time to show it._

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Vann’s fundraising competition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
You all really showed up for Vann. But I’m asking you to chip in to help me win!
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
You may have seen an email from my husband, Vann, about a little bet we made.
He thinks he can raise more money than me from our grassroots supporters before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on September 30th. I love Vann, but I’m really hoping this team will pitch in to help me beat him!
Here’s how our little competition works: if you donate through this email, it goes towards my team in this Chris-Vann fundraising face-off. If you’re already on Team Chris, here’s my link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris?refcode=em20250928-2573&amount=5&refcode2=2573_582294_-i18h6&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
Here’s my pitch: This fundraising deadline is the most serious deadline our campaign has faced so far. People will be looking at our report to see how much money we raised and how many people we raised it from.
**This is the kind of information that potential opponents look at when deciding whether or not to jump into the race and that dark money right-wing groups look at to see if New Hampshire is a good place to invest their money.** That’s why we need to post a strong report. Doing so will help deter our opponents and those who’d like to identify an easy seat to flip. This helps this seat stay in Democratic hands and will keep our path back to the Senate majority alive.
[**Can you chip in to Team Chris before the September 30th end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help me win this bet (and keep NH’s Senate seat blue)?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris?refcode=em20250928-2573&amount=5&refcode2=2573_582294_-i18h6&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
Look... if you already gave through Vann’s email, I won’t hold it against you. But if you want to chip in again, I wouldn’t say no! Please give through my link right here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris?refcode=em20250928-2573&amount=5&refcode2=2573_582294_-i18h6&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
Thanks for having a little fun with us, and for powering this campaign every step of the way.
— Chris
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris?refcode=em20250928-2573&amount=5&refcode2=2573_582294_-i18h6&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_1_chris?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-2573&refcode2=2573_582294_-i18h6&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)**
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20250928-1&t=2&refcode2=2573_582294_-i18h6&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2573%2E582294%2E-i18h6)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: RFK has got to go, now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
RFK Jr. is inflicting devastating harm on the health of our country, and I need your help to build a movement powerful enough to right the ship and elect candidates driven to hold him accountable.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5619%2E196590%2EWCNedW). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5591?t=2&akid=5619%2E196590%2EWCNedW)
---
| Team, Mandela Barnes here.

RFK Jr. is inflicting devastating harm on the health of our country, and I need your help to build a movement powerful enough to right the ship and elect candidates driven to hold him accountable.
---
[_**Will you contribute to The Long Run PAC today to help elect changemakers who will advocate for science and public health?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5591?t=3&akid=5619%2E196590%2EWCNedW)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5591?t=4&akid=5619%2E196590%2EWCNedW)
---
Recently, more than 1,000 Health and Human Services employees signed a letter calling on RFK Jr. to resign. He’s gutted the Center for Disease Control and spread dangerous misinformation about life-saving vaccines, all while making them more difficult to access.

Let’s be clear: _**there’s no doubt that needless lives will be lost as a direct result of RFK Jr.’s harmful campaign.**_

HHS employees are right to call for his resignation, and I’m fighting to help elect candidates nationwide who agree that we should let science and the facts drive our medical decisions. It’s the best way to keep our nation healthy.

[_**But I need your help to do it. Will you contribute to The Long Run PAC today so we can support as many changemaking candidates as possible?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5591?t=6&akid=5619%2E196590%2EWCNedW)

---
Thank you,

Mandela Barnes

subject: Gavin.gif
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
**Good News.**
Folks, we have received almost 900,000 individual donations since we kicked off our campaign to pass the Election Rigging Response Act. Thank you.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em25028-1&refcode2=2616_4767699_61Pad7&akid=2616%2E4767699%2E61Pad7)
**Bad News.**
The bad news is that this election is going to be close. There is even a recent poll showing us at 48% of the vote, and a lot of pundits believe it will be harder to win this election than many would think.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em25028-1&refcode2=2616_4767699_61Pad7&akid=2616%2E4767699%2E61Pad7)
But we are not without agency in this fight. The outcome of this election is something to manifest, not something to passively watch.
We have an end-of-month deadline coming up fast, and Gavin Newsom is humbly asking you to contribute what you can before it ends. Every dollar we raise will be put to work immediately convincing and turnout out the voters we need to win.
So what do you say?
[**Can you make a contribution before our deadline ends? As you read this, thousands of people are chipping-in because they understand the stakes of this fight. Join them, and when you watch the results of the election know you played a critical role in our victory.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em25028-1&refcode2=2616_4767699_61Pad7&akid=2616%2E4767699%2E61Pad7)

name: Berrett Gall
subject: The importance of now
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
The work we put in today determines whether we’ll be in a winning position tomorrow.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116090197/572457137/2117311493?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU2ZGM1YS02YzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XfNqtgkO8hL-_AsJiaSgY3wVJMjFyNB1BKXmOMgK_64=)
---
Hi Peter,
This is Berrett Gall, Finance Director for Tim Walz’s campaign. We already have our first fundraising deadline of this race coming up in just two days, so let me explain why it’s so critical and how YOU can help.
We know there’s a long road ahead to reelect Tim as Governor of Minnesota next November — **but the work we put in today, here and now, will determine whether we’ll be in a winning position when Election Day comes.**
Grassroots donations from Founding Donors give our team the resources needed to set up early campaign infrastructure that will put us on the path to long-term success.
Your donation makes it possible to jump right in and build a plan for how we’re going to hire staff, host events, and connect with the voters we’ll need to win.
**Tim is ready to take this campaign on the road and meet voters from Mankato to Moorhead, but he needs your help today to get the ball rolling.**
**[Peter, can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you today to become a Founding Donor and help ensure we reach our $75,000 goal before Tuesday’s deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116090203/572457144/1761546301?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU2ZGM1YS02YzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XfNqtgkO8hL-_AsJiaSgY3wVJMjFyNB1BKXmOMgK_64=)**

clean_body: The work we put in today determines whether we’ll be in a winning position tomorrow. | = Hi Peter, This is Berrett Gall, Finance Director for Tim Walz’s campaign. We already have our first fundraising deadline of this race coming up in just two days, so let me explain why it’s so critical and how YOU can help. We know there’s a long road ahead to reelect Tim as Governor of Minnesota next November — but the work we put in today, here and now, will determine whether we’ll be in a winning position when Election Day comes. Grassroots donations from Founding Donors give our team the resources needed to set up early campaign infrastructure that will put us on the path to long-term success. Your donation makes it possible to jump right in and build a plan for how we’re going to hire staff, host events, and connect with the voters we’ll need to win. Tim is ready to take this campaign on the road and meet voters from Mankato to Moorhead, but he needs your help today to get the ball rolling. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Tim and everyone on Team Walz appreciate anything you can give to fuel our fight. name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: We’re off to the races, Patriot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: off to the races! Early voting is happening NOW, Fellow American! We've worked so hard building up to this moment and now, votes are being cast for Governor of Virginia! I can't thank you enough for your support all throughout this journey. But believe me, this is just the beginning. We have the momentum and the message to win this race and build a brighter future for our Commonwealth, but we MUST capitalize NOW. Polls show I'm virtually TIED with my Democrat opponent, but she is still outraising and outspending me at every turnWe have to make up ground FAST! If we can't close the fundraising gap, Spanberger will continue to flood the airwaves with nasty lies and smear campaigns about me and our movement. Here's my call to action: votes are being cast, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart; PLEASE stand up for our shared values by donating today! Thank you so much for your commitment to winning- Winsome| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596
