**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

subject: You’re dismissed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
“They” think we’re backward - I’m a former Navy SEAL hellbent on proving them wrong | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=314da81805e44368bf1fc1726dc0ec4a&_e=NmQm7nDsVk2jVws6Zzf-aAYUVcNKdkTlQxNXnJK2ivsZstNtBk-m_Ea9S8HRvekIKmsQPsqILh1SI0V8zlebx7SJnasm-wdshxMgL4b2mvMbBMY5vFAlTXZWoGOAbxsQf2Zz5lCxEfVitgyxsQXzmwtWtgjanJ23wgjYwclqps31i_ImQ6lIoQwadfAk0b4KRJAY2NKuUc6fK_8rOqRYebxkY2LnEikF7XdEjgR3VPCoK991k2XHW7H3Lr9DMuDNo2LeysUHtKWAVOGes8u9UORqB891u2CCrU-PU6OAnvE8ouLDv9CLV4bx5V4sAzGdwaijn7ISaJFAZGozMIDgBHeIewS2_MENol9uHnK83z6jxbdnOuwbuMxq1nu3TqOg8kZZp9xYijOMbqtw-xlNDnq34oEHTVrJZ8PirR1n66A3tteHrpP81a5C0kOBeSkyxJGGq2esjJhOnqP_x6460IKO1tDd3qBHhfACWzVbZD3mxutwVb3DEteTbVErI_DQD4hJO5TNUICEjkE9V95dMS5L9R-rVaxmpFlaXaD_XFjRpHj253lpDTOYjV5pyMV54g-wpGJeR7DhSMDaMzKYR5qv7thQtbvx42snxh1hBjcp_QTLpUsRxfaGvy4WmTV7GbvEYKfrRh363MTBlESBY9YWykwsYlFA_gYsXRfm9UP3VgkLtvgUXqov73X_a9owhmuMvAJdlQtSSymuUuICtuRSAKN1CGP1teD5JCBfvPUCkIcfFK1VumvoQb_1VbB93PxSKk4zY_7vO8EmA9yKJftR9EYhPuU_Jf6eHg-z7os%3D)

---

Peter,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=314da81805e44368bf1fc1726dc0ec4a&_e=NmQm7nDsVk2jVws6Zzf-aAYUVcNKdkTlQxNXnJK2ivsZstNtBk-m_Ea9S8HRvekIKmsQPsqILh1SI0V8zlebx7SJnasm-wdshxMgL4b2mvMbBMY5vFAlTXZWoGOAbxsQf2Zz5lCxEfVitgyxsQXzmwtWtgjanJ23wgjYwclqps31i_ImQ6lIoQwadfAk0b4KRJAY2NKuUc6fK_8rOqRYebxkY2LnEikF7XdEjgR3VPCoK991k2XHW7H3Lr9DMuDNo2LeysUHtKWAVOGes8u9UORqB891u2CCrU-PU6OAnvFlrWItYZE3MBAXRFncV0PejRnXkjGQrIiXxnyh_d8toP4Lkbd-6v-hI2mW0MGUZDeaqpGsrAli_E9hlEWJDI7humPbnPVq3RSIvY5llLXXP6mM_3RTHzTGDE0Z41wFHP3rQZNr5QLxKLBUTcY8FAeMAgxe4vi0LdQNVmLzhPlDNClEVzARnxfma_btlXnYJGGrlR04ArXQ9dL_DPenl54GQg8-UYPNP8XfT1WdRUlfFlnx8eQo4lzafYUQr-MwtjYDZFudI0cJYMRje3mb7g4FKzkObkZlcrXxzp4yyyUHqpydAh4gBCmB7OJdqEdk8_llNXYPkF8EW5GlYduooq5k7m5TeAsgdcWsD8g-jzEnOy6OR2fJYXThei3zR46s1iYOgW9guUq9OIkxafOctbpRv6wRWREsX746k5hjlZFzsOSMqzuqbqtgXv1qVO6wfBuUwlbZb-KQ20S1vyeTekR_XDiCn4_wMPdqXOOyVV6AykR8ZvXmu19PF6s3pd2X4go%3D)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

clean_body: “They” think we’re backward - I’m a former Navy SEAL hellbent on proving them wrong | Peter, They’re calling us “backward,” “extreme,” and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right. They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you. I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment. I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.** I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high. Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. . You have a choice. You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Team Ossoff
subject: this couldn’t wait:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
We’re days away from a critical deadline and need your help.
#

Good morning, Peter!
We’re sorry to reach out so early on a Sunday, but with our FEC fundraising deadline on Tuesday, this update couldn’t wait:
Our fundraising numbers are about to go public and everyone from national Republicans to our MAGA opponents will pore through our report, searching for signs of weakness.
If we look vulnerable, you can bet they’ll flood the airwaves with even more nasty attack ads targeting Jon.
We need your help to make sure we make it over the finish line and report the strongest numbers possible. But we just crunched the numbers and still have a bit of ground to make up to reach our goal, which is why we’re asking:
[**Can you chip in any amount to Jon Ossoff’s campaign ahead of our end-of-quarter FEC deadline so we can finish strong and show the strength of this grassroots team?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250928-1-subs-a&t=1&akid=832%2E5691347%2ESebGsr)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250928-1-subs-a&t=2&akid=832%2E5691347%2ESebGsr)**
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=832%2E5691347%2ESebGsr) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=832%2E5691347%2ESebGsr) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

clean_body: It may not sound like much, but with only 37 days until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. = We'll come right out and say it: Your contribution of $25 today to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor would make all the difference. See, we rely on grassroots supporters giving what they can, when they can, to compete. It may not sound like much, but with only 37 days until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. Your $25 will allow us to counter right-wing disinformation. Your $25 will allow us to promote Abigail's plans to make our lives more affordable, strengthen our schools, and protect our freedoms. name: Dinesh D'Souza
subject: This email could change someone's life
body:
The patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights | | [ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e8cc8714e8c24798950ffd4fd7d6899e&_e=45Zkco0Q9J0wq_9Qt-0OCQMvObIPisrdh4SJo72hGI3cbmQY47ZqFDUGq2r_1tr0EMFiH76K8btEG1BzmH6LLO7pQwOAZIrXRqkeYusu2958kH58KwyxVUgoxtbZsD8juomgTf-NYY72Xp8wS73ZPKDtPJSsB4kMK_JBdP5O3gc3Zr2Y8FWGSBscOX-A4A3KCtTsyDMkFppOGfOuOKkOtk5K1YaoFe9r96_HM8UD0TP5wfMl6tL8xdkrXurHXM7BiuL5MKVu6edSnizJxQWYr7W8EDB7i94zcwNA0agD3s5EDUZhIbXv8k6pKSpLBpcpXFzfA7f6lDW8_hlNxhIhwsa9T4mYHB-9CZGaMkKsKY5fiGJ8V_Lyq8oYcaMoq7R20TuEAr4RbuolaRXxC1zfWgEA2jFWRtWqFEeDiMIkj1hFlc5oPYQbYZ_VitVYegrQiGGnSRfRf9Gw-nzac3ehVABKFjbzEEJXKAmGVtQK5yvBh7xXrYMLYOPcmPDeBJQ6eJGscm3mJbrVKUAqjxvlz28EWYlRCsCFSagd_DMMeDYi9gNrAY0gwPApgWQ2OBXKfaSyVrl0ZkUc0seoHepV4UOCBGM3Z_1m6oaXEtXwClWPMBv4TiYKi4DkKWLx0OJR)
---
Friend, I promise I won’t take up much of your time. In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election. **I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...** I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. [If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e8cc8714e8c24798950ffd4fd7d6899e&_e=45Zkco0Q9J0wq_9Qt-0OCQMvObIPisrdh4SJo72hGI3cbmQY47ZqFDUGq2r_1tr0EMFiH76K8btEG1BzmH6LLO7pQwOAZIrXRqkeYusu2958kH58KwyxVUgoxtbZsD8juomgTf-NYY72Xp8wS73ZPKDtPJSsB4kMK_JBdP5O3gcNvlmspI8bXH0BsA0o27_fFw0Sph3SYkn60Fulh6cwPBrxxhaID3HJJ9YiQ8cFyXb6Iy_yXQ2kYLAZxduyyWKU3lJMgcYSlWYbwZw_wARf6r_uYrCWqBdrbgAb0LCxRUuR_ONNOVqb50RkdmRnW8NZ0-ft0CzIYlipc_VVZIDRKs_42UyUeQp8M1xa5PA3LyhYd_aKuxp6iiLC-Y6QjY-RkQdNTlSd0xOaS5KHGY-EjgaqWIGx8-ssJmdUVOrDwnPBNxAQQAvXBievRH2qH800gbIkLJCQmRCrPAz0uijIJHevJowSMARHPJI1penotcCZJmja7t4P9F87cg9e84K-SXLliadETogpfeMoDvWrx1HBUpPIPaAQgBiLF54FxnN8DEfalN_9IWgvA2481obY8sD0vfVLcLss0xuNU8dv5JlHfEe8h11an97d8u1DTKaN9M8Mf2AtzZJ2yJda2DXzpD8eeP3foqCJts_wZ9YssA%3D%3D)
---
[Donate Now](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e8cc8714e8c24798950ffd4fd7d6899e&_e=45Zkco0Q9J0wq_9Qt-0OCQMvObIPisrdh4SJo72hGI3cbmQY47ZqFDUGq2r_1tr0EMFiH76K8btEG1BzmH6LLO7pQwOAZIrXRqkeYusu2958kH58KwyxVUgoxtbZsD8juomgTf-NYY72Xp8wS73ZPKDtPJSsB4kMK_JBdP5O3gfIwfDsBPyfvTCd9-pJX45hEyxnthNrH29vB_I8Mhh9hD5x4OvMXgJjbWBoAOoc-xOZul6_kYCI2CEGjPtc4Pvkorp9LVlVnkAHNnATjZizyINv8bB0ugaX4NOHjJxHlszPabSJHAREFkAbhSJ4EMBBEHU6kS4JOUMNiFY11Ms4CpnFfeUNrPKHJsDm0LHUlSSBg-150Q83CWRaE0Io1giKop031t2bODCwymKUFNeFzKJyWQ8FK9y3wePGTEg9b3tSkMLjen_U4ttFo63nC9z1YboSWn4godziufi2IMhHVyiFw69FvHD97HY2FlpWZFoHAnc1d3Uz5iXMimd2cYaPfj9nboc0VZc5RZOAnnK5L5zoKWhrmVqox9Xexi9kcqS_Nr0MJjsaPeOPazkn6bK-TObBDeTB1ip1gSSTY2YtdT4sFKnQQtzJaOg4ff0QOXXZUHyCdPk_9ULnsjH139hSqgvtDlp6UyS7rx4FP80igQ%3D%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:** $10 because the _“crime”_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. clean_body: The patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights | | Friend, I promise I won’t take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the “crime” these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: We weren’t expecting this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116100127/572482500/-238778901?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.28_Jon-Ossoff-GOP_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGNiODE2YS03MzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7YFQ4KLC8d83JkEt7drkYuxxbv39kSlDQ7L3I5boAIQ=) Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get.

I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history.

This email is different. It's more direct.

I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close on Tuesday. Here's why:

Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record.

**It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down.**

_Will we let them?_

We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing _more_ outside spending, _earlier_ than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight.

We will fight back. And we _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone.

clean_body: = Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get. I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history. This email is different. It's more direct. I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close on Tuesday. Here's why: Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record. It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down. Will we let them? We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing more outside spending, earlier than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight. We will fight back. And we will win. But I can’t do it alone. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is why our mission is so important.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250928-1&t=1&akid=2691%2E587540%2EYhviqo)
Peter, it is infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump. People who will fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**[Can you pitch in $5 before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on September 30 to power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250928_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250928-2691&amount=5&refcode2=2691_587540_Yhviqo&akid=2691%2E587540%2EYhviqo)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250928_1_infuriating?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-2691&refcode2=2691_587540_Yhviqo&akid=2691%2E587540%2EYhviqo)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.

Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg

clean_body: This is why our mission is so important. Peter, it is infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda. We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump. On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump. And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump. People who will fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security. That’s where we come in. This is no joke. Every single day counts in the fight ahead. Here’s the truth: The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling. But we’re not going to let that happen. We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful. We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough. That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve. Thank you for being part of this movement, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

name: Barack Obama
subject: Here’s what we’ve seen in just the last few weeks:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We are being tested. How much do we care about the democratic ideals and principles that generations in this country have fought for?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116101047/572485054/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiM2RiYzQ2LTczOWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ge6eQ9r11jEqokKu_EoJG0hFS34hBnMsJor-7zh7Sao=&emci=9c3158d8-219b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4b3dbc46-739c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, I was born in 1961. And over the course of my lifetime, our democracy got better. It became more fair, and more transparent. More people had a seat at the table, and we were able to start addressing more long-standing injustices. Because people were paying attention to the poor and the voiceless, we started passing legislation to make sure that our daughters had the same opportunities as our sons, and that people with different sexual orientations could live their lives freely. The lives of ordinary Americans improved in very concrete ways. I think we started believing that, with each successive decade, things would just keep getting better. They certainly weren’t going backwards. But that’s never been the case – not just in American history, but in human history. Progress does not move in a straight line. Every step of the way, people who were afraid of having true democracy — who felt threatened by the efforts to ensure everybody has a voice and who realized the existing systems that privileged them might go away — have tried to constrain and even roll back our gains. We’re seeing it happen again right now. **This White House and Republican-controlled state governments do not appear to believe in the idea of an inclusive, expansive democracy.** They do not see a problem with a minority of Americans controlling the majority of legislatures, along with the White House and the courts. They’re willing to gerrymander districts for partisan gain and splinter communities to dilute their representation. And they’re not shy about saying so. This is not a bug to them, it’s a feature of the kind of so-called “democracy” they’d like to see in America. **Eric Holder and I launched the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to take on these anti-democratic forces — and to mobilize a response capable of stopping anyone who wants to take us backward. [At this urgent moment for our country, I need to ask you directly: Can we count on you to support this cause with a donation right now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116101055/572485056/-943495453?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SeptObamaE1_email_20250928-NDRC-Tier1-SeptObamaE1NOR1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250928-NDRC-Tier1-SeptObamaE1NOR1_&utm_campaign=SeptObamaE1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiM2RiYzQ2LTczOWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ge6eQ9r11jEqokKu_EoJG0hFS34hBnMsJor-7zh7Sao=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

As I write this, we’ve just seen Texas’s governor sign an extreme, racially gerrymandered map into law with the goal of silencing the voices of those who don’t agree with him. We’ve seen Missouri follow suit, attempting to squeeze out a long-time Democratic district in Kansas City. We know that extreme partisan legislators in Ohio and Indiana are considering similar power grabs.
I’ll be frank: We are being tested. **How much do we care about the democratic ideals and principles that we fought for?** If we care about them as deeply as we claim to, then we are going to have to step up.
We’re going to have to support the NDRC. We will have to invest in the litigation and organizing work that the fair maps movement is doing across the country, fighting against maps that break the law and take away representation from communities of color. We will need to support the responsible and responsive work being done in California to ask voters to approve a temporary redraw of its congressional districts this November.
Over the last half century, our democracy didn’t become better on its own. It took all of us fighting for it constantly, and continuously. And when we’ve come together, we’ve won.
[**Every time you make a donation to the NDRC, you join forces with fellow supporters across the country who are helping to build a fairer, more just future for our democracy. I hope you’ll be with us every step of the way.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116101089/572485171/-943495453?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SeptObamaE1_email_20250928-NDRC-Tier1-SeptObamaE1NOR1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250928-NDRC-Tier1-SeptObamaE1NOR1_&utm_campaign=SeptObamaE1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiM2RiYzQ2LTczOWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ge6eQ9r11jEqokKu_EoJG0hFS34hBnMsJor-7zh7Sao=)
Thank you,
Barack Obama

clean_body: We are being tested. How much do we care about the democratic ideals and principles that generations in this country have fought for? | Peter, I was born in 1961. And over the course of my lifetime, our democracy got better. It became more fair, and more transparent. More people had a seat at the table, and we were able to start addressing more long-standing injustices. Because people were paying attention to the poor and the voiceless, we started passing legislation to make sure that our daughters had the same opportunities as our sons, and that people with different sexual orientations could live their lives freely. The lives of ordinary Americans improved in very concrete ways. I think we started believing that, with each successive decade, things would just keep getting better. They certainly weren’t going backwards. But that’s never been the case – not just in American history, but in human history. Progress does not move in a straight line. Every step of the way, people who were afraid of having true democracy — who felt threatened by the efforts to ensure everybody has a voice and who realized the existing systems that privileged them might go away — have tried to constrain and even roll back our gains. We’re seeing it happen again right now. This White House and Republican-controlled state governments do not appear to believe in the idea of an inclusive, expansive democracy. They do not see a problem with a minority of Americans controlling the majority of legislatures, along with the White House and the courts. They’re willing to gerrymander districts for partisan gain and splinter communities to dilute their representation. And they’re not shy about saying so. This is not a bug to them, it’s a feature of the kind of so-called “democracy” they’d like to see in America. Eric Holder and I launched the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to take on these anti-democratic forces — and to mobilize a response capable of stopping anyone who wants to take us backward. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As I write this, we’ve just seen Texas’s governor sign an extreme, racially gerrymandered map into law with the goal of silencing the voices of those who don’t agree with him. We’ve seen Missouri follow suit, attempting to squeeze out a long-time Democratic district in Kansas City. We know that extreme partisan legislators in Ohio and Indiana are considering similar power grabs. I’ll be frank: We are being tested. How much do we care about the democratic ideals and principles that we fought for? If we care about them as deeply as we claim to, then we are going to have to step up. We’re going to have to support the NDRC. We will have to invest in the litigation and organizing work that the fair maps movement is doing across the country, fighting against maps that break the law and take away representation from communities of color. We will need to support the responsible and responsive work being done in California to ask voters to approve a temporary redraw of its congressional districts this November. Over the last half century, our democracy didn’t become better on its own. It took all of us fighting for it constantly, and continuously. And when we’ve come together, we’ve won. = Thank you, Barack Obama = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Derek Dooley
subject: The real reason I entered this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dooley for Georgia
body:
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>
Patriot,

It’s Derek Dooley. Can I share something personal with you?

I was 12 years old when Ronald Reagan was elected President.

He was the first political leader who truly inspired me. I’ll never forget
watching him speak with conviction — not to divide us, but to remind Americans
of our greatness.

He made people proud of this country again.

That same pride in America stuck with me. And now, I want my kids and future
generations to feel that same way.

I want them to inherit a country of freedom, opportunity, faith, and strength.

That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate and I’m asking YOU to join me
today. >>
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

SUPPORT DEREK DOOLEY TODAY
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>
For me, this is about saving the country we love and putting Georgians first.

To do that, Republicans MUST win the most competitive Senate race in America...
RIGHT HERE in Georgia!
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

And I’m the conservative outsider who can get the job done:
✔️ I’m a lifelong Georgian, the son of two teachers, Barbara and Vince.

✔️ I spent 3 decades as a coach, building up young people and helping them
build successful futures.

✔️ I’m focused on putting Georgians first, not climbing the political ladder
or seeking another promotion in Washington.

✔️ Most importantly, I’m the only conservative outsider in this race who can
DEFEAT Jon Ossoff, take back Georgia’s Senate seat, and deliver results for
Georgians.
But I can’t win this battle alone.

Jon Ossoff and the Democrats are backed by MILLIONS from Washington elites.
They’ll spend whatever it takes to keep this seat and push their radical agenda
on hardworking families across our state.

That’s why I need you on our team, Patriot.
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>
JOIN DEREK DOOLEY’S TEAM NOW
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>
Your donation today will help:

➡️ Keep our message in front of voters across Georgia
➡️ Put gas in the tank so I can meet people face-to-face in every corner of
this state
➡️ Show the Democrats that grassroots conservatives will not be outworked or
outspent

Most of all, it will send a clear message:

Georgia is ready to put a commonsense conservative outsider in the Senate who
will fight for our values and our kids’ future.

This fight is personal to me. It’s about my family, your family, and the
country we love.

Chip in before midnight and let’s win this together:
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

Thank you for your support!

Derek Dooley
Republican for U.S. Senate – Georgia JOIN DEREK DOOLEY’S TEAM

<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

Derek Dooley is running for U.S. Senate because we need a Georgia First
fighter.

Someone who is not afraid to stand up to the Washington elites and put the
future of hardworking familiesFIRST.

He’s not a politician. He’s a coach, husband, dad, and a conservative
outsider who spent nearly 30 years on the football field helping young people
chase the American Dream.

Now, he’s ready to take that same fight to Washington and protect the future
of every hardworking American.
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

While professional politician Jon Ossoff rubber-stamps the Left’s radical
agenda...

Derek is stepping up to defend Georgia values, restore common sense, and bring
real leadership to the U.S. Senate.

But this will be one of the toughest races in the country and he can’t do it
without you by his side.

Will you step up and show your support with a donation of any amount today?
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=SUMMIT>

DONATE

Thank you,
— Team Dooley

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’m really worried
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Thank you in advance for opening this email.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)
This isn’t the update I hoped to send — but I’ll always be transparent with you: **I’m really worried.**
**Our grassroots fundraising has taken a bigger hit this summer than we anticipated. We had to cut our campaign projections in July and August. Now, we’re nearing the end of September, and we’re not on track to meet our monthly goal.**
We’re also entering one of the most critical phases of this race. Our race is officially heating up — and we are legally required to report our campaign’s fundraising numbers for the LAST time before 2026 in just a few days. _**Everyone will see how much we’ve raised, and if we have the resources we need to compete against the MAGA forces and right-wing dark money that will flood this state to defeat us. And right now, we don’t.**_
[**I’d be grateful for anything you can give right now. Can I count on you to step up with a donation of $5 or anything you can spare?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250928_1_honest?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-4661&refcode2=4661_400544_nIJ5uS&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)
**As you know, I’ve never had the means to self-fund a campaign, and I don’t come from wealth.** What I do have is this grassroots team — tens of thousands of folks like you who believe that New Mexico needs a governor who understands what it means to struggle and who will fight fiercely for our home and our people.
Our average online donation this month is **$23.** It’s that steady stream of people-powered support that allows us to build support across our beautiful state. It helps us pay for critical campaign investments, distribute literature, run digital ads, and connect with voters in the places that are too often ignored.
**The reality is this: If we don’t have strong fundraising numbers, Donald Trump and Republicans will put millions of dollars into flipping this state. We can’t let this happen.** That’s why I’m concerned, and it’s why I’m asking for your support today.
**[My campaign could use your help right now. Will you donate $5 or your most generous donation today to power our campaign forward? You can click here to make sure your donation goes through instantly.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250928_1_honest?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-4661&refcode2=4661_400544_nIJ5uS&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250928_1_honest?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-4661&refcode2=4661_400544_nIJ5uS&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)**
Thank you again for everything you’re doing to support our campaign. I know there is no obstacle we can’t overcome if we continue standing together.
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250928-1&t=2&refcode2=4661_400544_nIJ5uS&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4661%2E400544%2EnIJ5uS)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=20&refcode2=23437_4449941_0AnRib&akid=23437%2E4449941%2E0AnRib)

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

name: Derek Dooley
subject: Can I share something personal with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dooley for Georgia
body:
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>
Peter,

It’s Derek Dooley. Can I share something personal with you?

I was 12 years old when Ronald Reagan was elected President.

He was the first political leader who truly inspired me. I’ll never forget
watching him speak with conviction — not to divide us, but to remind Americans
of our greatness.

He made people proud of this country again.

That same pride in America stuck with me. And now, I want my kids and future
generations to feel that same way.

I want them to inherit a country of freedom, opportunity, faith, and strength.

That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate and I’m asking YOU to join me
today. >>
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

SUPPORT DEREK DOOLEY TODAY
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>
For me, this is about saving the country we love and putting Georgians first.

To do that, Republicans MUST win the most competitive Senate race in America...
RIGHT HERE in Georgia!
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

And I’m the conservative outsider who can get the job done:
✔️ I’m a lifelong Georgian, the son of two teachers, Barbara and Vince.

✔️ I spent 3 decades as a coach, building up young people and helping them
build successful futures.

✔️ I’m focused on putting Georgians first, not climbing the political ladder
or seeking another promotion in Washington.

✔️ Most importantly, I’m the only conservative outsider in this race who can
DEFEAT Jon Ossoff, take back Georgia’s Senate seat, and deliver results for
Georgians.
But I can’t win this battle alone.

Jon Ossoff and the Democrats are backed by MILLIONS from Washington elites.
They’ll spend whatever it takes to keep this seat and push their radical agenda
on hardworking families across our state.

That’s why I need you on our team, Peter.
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>
JOIN DEREK DOOLEY’S TEAM NOW
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>
Your donation today will help:

➡️ Keep our message in front of voters across Georgia
➡️ Put gas in the tank so I can meet people face-to-face in every corner of
this state
➡️ Show the Democrats that grassroots conservatives will not be outworked or
outspent

Most of all, it will send a clear message:

Georgia is ready to put a commonsense conservative outsider in the Senate who
will fight for our values and our kids’ future.

This fight is personal to me. It’s about my family, your family, and the
country we love.

Chip in before midnight and let’s win this together:
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

Thank you for your support!

Derek Dooley
Republican for U.S. Senate – Georgia JOIN DEREK DOOLEY’S TEAM

<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

Derek Dooley is running for U.S. Senate because we need a Georgia First
fighter.

Someone who is not afraid to stand up to the Washington elites and put the
future of hardworking familiesFIRST.

He’s not a politician. He’s a coach, husband, dad, and a conservative
outsider who spent nearly 30 years on the football field helping young people
chase the American Dream.

Now, he’s ready to take that same fight to Washington and protect the future
of every hardworking American.
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

While professional politician Jon Ossoff rubber-stamps the Left’s radical
agenda...

Derek is stepping up to defend Georgia values, restore common sense, and bring
real leadership to the U.S. Senate.

But this will be one of the toughest races in the country and he can’t do it
without you by his side.

Will you step up and show your support with a donation of any amount today?
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>

DONATE
<https://secure.winred.com/dooley-for-georgia/dooley-why-im-running-interview-pemail-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20250928_why-im-running-interview-proud_dd&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN>
Thank you,
— Team Dooley

Paid for by Dooley for Georgia
196 Alps Rd Ste 2-147
Athens, GA 30606

Privacy Policy <https://www.dooleyforgeorgia.com/disclaimer> Unsubscribe
<http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=491a505c4f224a0da0e4d9dad539ba98&_t=2yr0DMKr3z4ZvlvIlmsSNTUMAOvO3BmFRErB2eYDze96eCocHsp5p-cveN2R9RukgjHjXi6-aQ67C2JowuYFr09Puok1Vw4Elmawjz7wOjqgd_M-6zCrx2iu30SgvYZ5>

Hi — **[_I’m writing to ask, humbly, if you will chip in $10 to my reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines ahead of our important FEC fundraising deadline Tuesday._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116102256/572488260/2127676424?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.28_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTZkOWNkMC03NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ww4G2XdJYYOP-Vl664IeIYoCYL3ZJg8hvJW9H3GOchw=)** Here’s why this request is so important, especially today: The end of this month marks the most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced so far in our campaign, and one of the most critical tests of the movement we’ve built in Georgia. After the deadline, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and shortly after, those numbers will be made public. Everyone from Donald Trump to my Republican opponents and their billionaire allies are going to look at our fundraising numbers closely. Very closely. If they think we look weak, you can bet they’ll flood the airwaves with even more attack ads designed to distort my record. Attacks we can’t afford this early in the campaign. We have to show everyone that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable — that we have what it takes to build the strongest voter outreach and mobilization program our state has ever seen. Because that’s what it’s going to take to win this race. That’s why I’m personally asking: **[_Will you make a contribution to my campaign and Off the Sidelines before our critical FEC deadline Tuesday night? Every donation counts. Each one sends a powerful message that people like you have our backs._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116102259/572488267/2127676424?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.28_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTZkOWNkMC03NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ww4G2XdJYYOP-Vl664IeIYoCYL3ZJg8hvJW9H3GOchw=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116102261/572488274/2127676424?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.28_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTZkOWNkMC03NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ww4G2XdJYYOP-Vl664IeIYoCYL3ZJg8hvJW9H3GOchw=)

**
📢 To all of Ilhan Omar’s supporters, 🌹**
Please don’t click away. This isn’t the first time we’ve emailed about our FEC fundraising deadline on Tuesday, so we’ll get straight to the point: we’re asking for you to help us post the best numbers possible.

**
If everyone reading this donated even $5, we would not only crush our FEC fundraising goals two days early, but we’d have a huge number of donations that shocks the establishment and leads to a ton of new momentum for Ilhan’s campaign for reelection.
But not everyone gives. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is to people to chip-in before Tuesday’s deadline.

**
Ilhan doesn’t rely on big checks from billionaires and Super PACs. This campaign is sustained by the donations of only 5% of Ilhan’s supporters. Without those donations, big or small, we couldn’t run a winning campaign.
That’s why we need your help. We are passionate about our fundraising model, because at its core, this campaign is powered by you.

**
Our average donation is usually around $25. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you’re choosing to power this campaign today.
**[If Ilhan winning this race and continuing to take on Trump and the far-right is worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this campaign by making a donation. name: James Talarico
subject: An honest update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
One of our team’s internal core values is “compassionate candor.” It means being honest with one another is the most caring thing you can do. And I believe you deserve the same level of honesty from us.
So I want to say upfront: [**I’m reaching out to ask you to contribute to our campaign before Tuesday’s FEC deadline. We have an ambitious goal that we need your help to hit.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=1&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)
Honesty is a form of respect. People like you are the backbone of this campaign — there is no campaign without your support.
Yet too many politicians forget there are real humans on the other side of these emails. They treat it like a transactional relationship. But I won’t.
I care about the people who choose to support our campaign with their time and money. It’s a big deal. I’m grateful for everyone who steps up to own a piece of this movement.
So I want to try something different: compassionate candor.
We need to hit 6,500 donations before midnight to stay on track to hit our fundraising goal before the FEC deadline.
The thermometer below is linked directly to our ActBlue and will update every few minutes. Everybody will be able to watch how we’re tracking. You can see for yourself whether we beat it or fall short.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=2&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)
[**Can you please make a donation of any amount to help us stay on track? This FEC fundraising deadline is important. But if we each give a little, then we’ll hit our goal before you know it.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=3&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=22&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-launch.soFUPy&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=23&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-launch.qllyRI&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=24&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-launch.UeXr9I&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=25&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-launch.457jmL&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=26&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-launch.jEYg2l&refcode=em250928-1-ak&t=27&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN)**
---
****
After you chip in, check back to watch your donation get added to the thermometer.
I hope you appreciate our candor.
James

Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761

James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=78%2E1347274%2EsaKOMN).

Dear Fellow American, People know and enjoy The Babylon Bee because it produces funny, satirical content on any topic--from world news to housekeeping.

The tagline says it all: "Fake news you can trust."

Unfortunately, though, the government of Hawaii isn't laughing.

The Babylon Bee and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against Hawaii officials because a state law censors free speech and punishes people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Where do you stand on the issue of free speech and humor?

Let us know if you think the government can censor Americans when they use humor, satire, and parodies.

Click this link to take the survey: [https://adflegal.org/support/humor-first-amendment-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/2OJeNQJ9D9LGfOHMlVkwl9dbdo53jdhJQghpbvmy34VSWBjIk-r8w2ivt07GSlJbpYiq4iJc5Yi25kW_JZ64iovN5IJ8JMk18n7ZwTAkvjlU_dwcqcaJ_aBSoXPlZy3aOVYK0BywwXOKVATTcDL8IpLRqpvh3jTHZ6dXhp1V-LM90TOOUNIWD4WeVgk9GsavfKhFi2t7Z-6Ad5Bzrww6PYNly_iiqLD1OU_-XOL_d3hwXQsmcWImaCsSDkIKuqCMAtDQptX3mUxRAifTVXHmf5S-ak1F4WhMWkfhhx8t4WtZCV_ru_J6O8bGf0t_OX2U7578cg97Dg7oJTuSlKuGqL_gc8ySLw-n3p-qs-puMOfbmCpdZ2dluCvWgIhb0PIz0SlH8NHKda0KwZU5T1IZf7IboArTQLQX_7dYOapFJ5HcKJvnM_BRlzYjYzogo-o1Lu0mYWSIsYgo5gRVSZ6DrSpr0BDorMzI6Y_SkM-YLyqC6UBb8GKbV_DUyShVJtMwuJp3JIs20VAXXNsParm6UO6n7L-yJpSoxmpKabAOq3gaN9v2yXdWapn02QNW1BcndufXSVyZy_azsZBFYT6eH58o5bTsGVpArI-OQrTPWDP0Z5TF0wJ8zoaEjidUvDoaUNpAaD90rnjA21ENISk9l227VluzjKI1_L0PkTZww6Pl9bBaQxH948ibzVxmRZ0apA1irolqPe_tK4FycOkNKUoudWWWVqVmBA/5LmHkvzt4jGsxgXxCZl9EASOME3JhWyJ/13).

name: Elect Mamdani via Our Revolution
subject: Mamdani Is Under Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email-20250928_v&akid=9434%2E5885482%2EqretAQ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Real-estate tycoons and the very wealthiest New Yorkers are terrified of
the power behind Zohran Mamdani’s inspiring campaign for Mayor of NYC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?source=email-20250928&t=1060&akid=9434%2E5885482%2EqretAQ ]Headline: How the billionaire class and wealthy landlords are
conspiring against Zohran Mamdani

Here’s why: for once, the government could actually serve tenants and
working families over landlords and hedge funds. Mamdani’s plan to freeze
rent prices – and *finally* raise taxes on the richest 1% – will put
working people ahead of profit. And so the deep-pocketed donors are lining
up to pour millions of dollars into Andrew Cuomo’s campaign, desperate to
defeat this movement and protect their privileged status quo.

We’re not going to let the city’s most powerful special interests buy
another election. So we’re sending organizers into the streets, holding
three phone banks every single week, and having as many conversations with
voters as possible before election day. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250928nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9434%2E5885482%2EqretAQ ]Will you donate $3, $15, or even $50 to fuel Our Revolution’s grassroots
push for Mamdani? Every dollar helps power our people-powered movement.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

Let’s be clear: this isn’t just another political fight – it’s a battle
for the soul of New York, our country, and the Democratic party. During
the primary, real estate donors spent $6 million trying to get Cuomo
elected over Mamdani. And the billionaire money is still pouring in as
they hold secret meetings to try to figure out how to stop Mamdani’s
momentum with fear-mongering lies.

They may have the money, but we have the people. That’s how Mamdani won
the primary. Our Revolution knocked on doors and hit the streets in all 5
boroughs, spoke with voters at subway stations, and made thousands of
phone calls. And Mamdani won overwhelmingly.

Now the stakes are even higher.

We’re doubling down – holding three phone banks every week, and our team
is canvassing every borough – rain or shine. But this kind of organizing
costs money – printing flyers, hosting volunteer trainings, making more
calls. And our entire movement depends on support from people like you,
not backroom billionaires.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250928nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9434%2E5885482%2EqretAQ ]Don’t let the billionaires decide this election. Chip in whatever you can
today to keep this people-powered movement growing – and together we can
stand up to the big money and show just how powerful the people are.

It’s Our Revolution vs. the 1%. Let’s prove, once again, that there’s more
of us than there are of them.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104546/572492927/1445643945?amount=5&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_092825_Steelers_30DO_D2_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg5Zjk2NC03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=drfgI_XtqMAfUYbtd9caNxcUxzfXnAyl3B5yvlgpkog=) Good morning and dia dhuit! **I'm in Dublin, Ireland, supporting the Steelers and all Pennsylvanians!** After a few days of meeting with elected officials here in Europe about how to keep PA’s economic development surging, I'm also getting the chance to enjoy supporting one of our great professional sports teams! In the uncertain climate that we live in, it’s important to be able to take time to find joy where we can. In PA, we're lucky to get to raise our terrible towels and celebrate the strength of our Commonwealth, on and off the football field. My team and I are up against our _**final**_ deadline of the quarter. In order to keep doing the important work like investing in our education systems, and helping to create new jobs and infrastructure around the Commonwealth, I need to raise money for my re-election campaign. [**Can you rush a $5 donation now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104547/572492928/1445643945?amount=5&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_092825_Steelers_30DO_D2_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg5Zjk2NC03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=drfgI_XtqMAfUYbtd9caNxcUxzfXnAyl3B5yvlgpkog=) | | **[RUSH $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104548/572492929/410908810?amount=5&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_092825_Steelers_30DO_D2_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg5Zjk2NC03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=drfgI_XtqMAfUYbtd9caNxcUxzfXnAyl3B5yvlgpkog=)**

clean_body: Good morning and dia dhuit! Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Good morning and dia dhuit! I'm in Dublin, Ireland, supporting the Steelers and all Pennsylvanians! After a few days of meeting with elected officials here in Europe about how to keep PA’s economic development surging, I'm also getting the chance to enjoy supporting one of our great professional sports teams! In the uncertain climate that we live in, it’s important to be able to take time to find joy where we can. In PA, we're lucky to get to raise our terrible towels and celebrate the strength of our Commonwealth, on and off the football field. My team and I are up against our final deadline of the quarter. In order to keep doing the important work like investing in our education systems, and helping to create new jobs and infrastructure around the Commonwealth, I need to raise money for my re-election campaign. = | | = We know Pennsylvania is a battleground state, and on the road to 2026, we have to take that incredibly seriously. Republicans will funnel in thousands of dollars just in an attempt to control the Commonwealth. We have to show them that we are organized and ready for any attack or threat. = **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** Have a great weekend and Go Steelers! Austin | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. Can you chip in today to help? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

Marc Elias emailed. That's how important this is. [Because with 48 hours left until our End of Quarter Deadline, I had to reach out to make sure you didn’t miss this important message from Marc Elias.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104811/572493993/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250928_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgxNDk5Ni03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skoDmE31vkEg5f5J9miwkhXZUoIq-hBZHBBcgCzDOv0=) [_Peter, what we are witnessing right now is an unprecedented assault on our most fundamental American values. Donald Trump and his Rubber Stamp Republicans in the House are attacking our freedom of speech, ripping away our healthcare, suppressing our votes, marching us toward a government shutdown and gerrymandering congressional districts to rig the midterm elections. Democrats will continue to aggressively push back. We need to know you’ve got our backs. Please, Peter: Will you read Marc’s email and then answer his call by chipping in $15 before our massive End of Quarter Deadline in 48 hours? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104813/572493997/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250928_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgxNDk5Ni03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skoDmE31vkEg5f5J9miwkhXZUoIq-hBZHBBcgCzDOv0=) \---------- Forwarded message ---------- | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104814/572493999/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250928_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgxNDk5Ni03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skoDmE31vkEg5f5J9miwkhXZUoIq-hBZHBBcgCzDOv0=)

Peter, I’m proud to be one of the lawyers leading the fight in the Democrats’ lawsuit against Donald Trump to defend democracy and protect voting rights.
I only reach out when it’s important, so believe me when I tell you: this is as important as it gets.
[Hakeem Jeffries filed a lawsuit to block Trump’s attempt to undermine our elections – _and he needs your grassroots support to help us win._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104815/572494001/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250928_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgxNDk5Ni03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skoDmE31vkEg5f5J9miwkhXZUoIq-hBZHBBcgCzDOv0=)
[_The truth is: Winning a case like this won’t be easy, especially when we’re facing a corrupt administration backed by billionaires. That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help defend our democracy. If you – and everyone else reading – give before midnight, we can hold Trump accountable and hand the far right extremists a stunning rebuke. Can I count on you to kick in $15? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104816/572494002/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250928_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgxNDk5Ni03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skoDmE31vkEg5f5J9miwkhXZUoIq-hBZHBBcgCzDOv0=)
Peter, here’s what’s happening:
Donald Trump signed an executive order that attempts to suppress our votes, hand sensitive information to DOGE and stop states from counting mail-in ballots.
We cannot let him get away with it.
Our legal team is using every tool we have to take on Donald Trump and we will never back down, but we need your help.
[We cannot let Trump and his allies seize our elections, silence our voices and reject any result they dislike. We must keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116104817/572494003/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250928_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgxNDk5Ni03ODljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skoDmE31vkEg5f5J9miwkhXZUoIq-hBZHBBcgCzDOv0=)

I only reach out when it’s important, so believe me when I tell you: this is as important as it gets. = = Peter, here’s what’s happening: Donald Trump signed an executive order that attempts to suppress our votes, hand sensitive information to DOGE and stop states from counting mail-in ballots. Our legal team is using every tool we have to take on Donald Trump and we will never back down, but we need your help. = = | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Marc Elias Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. name: Team Benson
subject: Proof Jocelyn’s pro-voter policies are working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Pro-voter. Pro-democracy. Pro-Michigan.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=752%2E181023%2EF_h9MK)
This is big, team.
Thanks to the pro-voter policies Jocelyn Benson championed as Secretary of State, Michigan just saw record-breaking youth turnout in the 2024 election.
**A new report shows that 58% of voters ages 18-29 cast ballots in Michigan —**** _the largest increase in youth voter turnout nationwide._**
That’s no accident, folks. Jocelyn’s leadership brought us forward-thinking reforms like preregistration for 16- and 17-year-olds, which is making it easier than ever for young people to engage in our democracy.
While Republicans in D.C. are attacking voting rights and trying to make it harder to cast a ballot, **Jocelyn is proving that we can have elections that are both accessible and secure.**
**[If you’re with Jocelyn in protecting and expanding voting rights, we need you with us. Add your name today to support Jocelyn Benson’s pro-voter agenda.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2509-pro-voter/?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250928_AM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=752%2E181023%2EF_h9MK)**

**This year, the Trump Regime and their Republican allies have relentlessly attacked our freedom to vote.** They’ve spread dangerous disinformation about elections. Georgia Republicans launched a purge of nearly half a million voter registrations. Texas Republicans gerrymandered the state to steal five Congressional seats. And on the Hill, Republicans are still trying to pass the SAVE Act — a voter suppression bill that could disenfranchise tens of millions by imposing a modern-day poll tax.
**Our response has to be equally relentless.** We have to keep responding to threats like Georgia’s recent voter purge by making sure people have the facts about how they can protect their vote. We have to keep organizing alongside partners throughout the South as our region continues to be a hotbed of voter suppression. We have to keep electing voting rights champions to state, local, and federal offices with power over our elections.
And we’re counting on our most committed activists to help make it happen.
[**To fuel this work, hit our quarterly grassroots goal, and defend free and fair elections, chip in any amount you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116107098/572501457/-764370381?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250928_T1_EmailStats_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmU1MmYwYi03YzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bSKEajnfDPFbTQ1BpPSFtvFM7QoL_tjDEd48PVCEBmU=)

name: Hickenlooper HQ
subject: our fundraising took a nosedive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Team Hickenlooper, can we be real with you? We just had a MAJOR setback.

FIRST:
We set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline so we could release the strongest numbers possible to the Federal Election Commission when our report goes PUBLIC.

THEN:
So many folks across the country stepped up and we were tracking to hit our ambitious $50K online fundraising goal. All because of grassroots supporters like you.

BUT:
Over the busy weekend, our fundraising has taken a TOTAL nosedive. Way fewer people even opened emails like this one, and now it’s looking like we’re going to fall short of our goal.

SO:
Now, we’re asking everyone reading this email to chip in $10 or more to help us reach our goal before time runs out. There’s no path to retaking the Senate majority if Democrats lose in Colorado, and we’re desperate for your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-september-email-2025]
DONATE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-september-email-2025]

Thanks for stepping up when we need it most,
Hickenlooper HQ
Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. clean_body: Team Hickenlooper, can we be real with you? We just had a MAJOR setback. FIRST: We set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline so we could release the strongest numbers possible to the Federal Election Commission when our report goes PUBLIC. THEN: So many folks across the country stepped up and we were tracking to hit our ambitious $50K online fundraising goal. All because of grassroots supporters like you. BUT: Over the busy weekend, our fundraising has taken a TOTAL nosedive. Way fewer people even opened emails like this one, and now it’s looking like we’re going to fall short of our goal. SO: Now, we’re asking everyone reading this email to chip in $10 or more to help us reach our goal before time runs out. There’s no path to retaking the Senate majority if Democrats lose in Colorado, and we’re desperate for your help. [] DONATE → [] Thanks for stepping up when we need it most, Hickenlooper HQ Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, click here [] . PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 300,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can raise the resources we need by our end-of-quarter deadline?
