It's about showing that Democrats can win tough races, organize at every level, and stand up to Trump's agenda right here at home. That work doesn't happen overnight. It takes year-round organizing, community by community, to build the movement we need to win – not just in November, but beyond. We're up against national Republican Super PACs and Trump's money machine determined to flip New Jersey red. But if we invest in people-powered organizing now, we can win this race and set the tone for every election. body:
Endorsements. Polling. Momentum. Now we need you to shock the left again with a massive end-of-quarter. [ ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/H7WFDumcnxpoDWXW-10wOHjLzuVWsoO_D6syIAFM6qtmnTfPhU84qiyte5smPo_zqu-r1ACzszhoBxIUQ64VqP_qm1mKNo5wNMjn4H4bdUjB7p7oTFJe14yCy49CHrjVJoskgfgMZM3-PWbyYoOdUN6bcdieDKwXVTVL_A0FvDzBFTEkXToX4SVp_s10JYhglIuJYllhdlKczj8I6Mj92vMlqpC4fdrSu0cRaVOMZixPv862D7meqNGpNYuP-l-ZkkWmCf0Qwl4beH4-wMPlj_k5b75Y4rraf9lFTb4XGpJEk18rvdj0kddKvdsjgAMuuIpy_d14xRLCWWlkStYGJ2WRF_mrh2H-RIqTzaj2a11DLfmgjeZS6gOMaXCFQl5oapwv9HuNBGEbZlvxebBajTgy709XsQPNUPhuPpiqexr6WS6TvTjV3H84wrJvrIPKvrpqY1nBnRmnVAcJzvNa2pkOiqghcFqitdEmTVZr28dwc9GWaC6un-Km2PLeogytIAFyucjC6HtP/oMjdWta0mnk7HECSRArq2knRpfdHC7Zg/13)

Peter,

It’s been a difficult month for America and our entire movement. We lost our brightest young leader to an assassin, we see regular terror attacks against federal law enforcement, and the left excuses, rationalizes, and even celebrates the violence.
[](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/zbRMffe8rIq8FNdr65enrp1ZE_UXHxiS0qWKbCj2nvVh2aeqXdrNs0BhXvHPSVMnBPx0wdHLXAeCc29pEerTjipMEkmk-BD0UC-DLJmFHElAMry5egM90N9PtVGc9eTu_ocVH_SGUQNN9OyEtsekWY1p8-DmEqH-QaejJTwWXdAN7U04DVl3i4H-tpNz2-kXZEcc4lm915PyFYU6cjhJdI4un2yFzVuglDwP-Y_OE0dF0Wy2MIeebU5cmHpuRW7drQFFXrYw2qfWFPPfMZxonDzw1kol41DNTjfoYG6tlYlKKI3XJwWgM7FkfGewARi_IhvHu_titcOcUwALJg-QaaFv3z_UUV1nGuBUVhvF0npsT-rjvsmK3S2bjOk9AK_IZKqnXn40vo7l549nWL-MQE8WzGfZ3OiKKHJkRNgmEbJ2GrYaKDJBsc8bWsAohzuTvG2ukqQ_U1dvMSBrNR3DQS6F2SbG5yueWJ4xI0HrVo9Ed19LG6cDtcvFjU_NoxrLOP-fNgLvdBEM/RYRjNXTbGtwGpe-dEiCTkCJi2WFUfJDv/13)
But out of our pain has come a renewed energy to fight — and boy, are we fighting for California. In the past few weeks alone, we’ve:

* Earned the endorsements of Assembly Republican Leader **Heath Flora** , Ventura County Sheriff **Jim Fryhoff** , and Solano County Sheriff **Tom Ferrara** — joining over 100 sheriffs, law enforcement groups and Republican officials statewide.

* Won support from the **California’s Narcotics Officers Association** , who know I’ll fight drug cartels and restore safety to our neighborhoods.

clean_body: Endorsements. Polling. Momentum. Now we need you to shock the left again with a massive end-of-quarter. Peter, It’s been a difficult month for America and our entire movement. We lost our brightest young leader to an assassin, we see regular terror attacks against federal law enforcement, and the left excuses, rationalizes, and even celebrates the violence. But out of our pain has come a renewed energy to fight — and boy, are we fighting for California. In the past few weeks alone, we’ve: Earned the endorsements of Assembly Republican Leader Heath Flora , Ventura County Sheriff Jim Fryhoff , and Solano County Sheriff Tom Ferrara — joining over 100 sheriffs, law enforcement groups and Republican officials statewide. Won support from the California’s Narcotics Officers Association , who know I’ll fight drug cartels and restore safety to our neighborhoods. Taken our message directly to the people — from San Diego to Alameda, Marin, Butte, Santa Clara, and everywhere in between. But here’s the reality: how we close out THIS quarter, on TUESDAY NIGHT, will determine whether our momentum keeps rolling. The media, the Democrats, and the establishment are watching our fundraising numbers closely over the next 48 hours, before the Tuesday 11:59pm deadline: At the close of last quarter, we shocked them by raising over $1.6 million. [ Money ]Money taken from AIPAC: $0.00

That’s right. Abdul is the only candidate in this race with the courage to
take on AIPAC and the MAGA billionaire interests behind it.

Trust us, that’s not an easy stand to take. AIPAC is one of the most

Other candidates may see taking their money as a “strategic” move, but

Abdul believes our leaders should answer to the people — not to lobbyists
or billionaire donors. That’s why he’s never taken a dime from AIPAC or
corporate PACs, and never will.

We’re counting on folks like you to fund this campaign — and we need to

Hi Peter, It’s your weekend, you’ve got work tomorrow, and I’m sure that today will be busy for you so I’ll keep it short: Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in less than 48 hours. We have come so far together, and I am so grateful for the excellent team we have built. The best part is the new friends I’ve made along the way; Thank you for your encouragement, excellent ideas, and yes, your financial support. In the darkest and most challenging of times, you’ve been there and that means a lot. Together, we are bringing more truth, love, and science to Congress, leading with facts, data, and centering real people rather than playing politics. My team has let me know that we’re just over $8,000 away from reaching our fundraising goal this quarter. **You know that we don’t have fake goals or hair on fire emails – this is a real number that our team set because we believe it gives us the best chance to keep elected Republicans out of this race.** In reality, the journey is just beginning. We are facing one of the most challenging House races in the country next year, and I already have multiple opponents coming after me. If you’re able and willing to contribute, it would mean the world to me. clean_body: | = Hi Peter, It’s your weekend, you’ve got work tomorrow, and I’m sure that today will be busy for you so I’ll keep it short: Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in less than 48 hours. We have come so far together, and I am so grateful for the excellent team we have built. The best part is the new friends I’ve made along the way; Thank you for your encouragement, excellent ideas, and yes, your financial support. In the darkest and most challenging of times, you’ve been there and that means a lot. Together, we are bringing more truth, love, and science to Congress, leading with facts, data, and centering real people rather than playing politics. My team has let me know that we’re just over $8,000 away from reaching our fundraising goal this quarter. You know that we don’t have fake goals or hair on fire emails – this is a real number that our team set because we believe it gives us the best chance to keep elected Republicans out of this race. In reality, the journey is just beginning. We are facing one of the most challenging House races in the country next year, and I already have multiple opponents coming after me. If you’re able and willing to contribute, it would mean the world to me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Wishing you a good Sunday and thank you for your support. -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. subject: We must rally behind Chris as soon as possible

body:

Friends,
Moments like this don’t come around often.
With Justice Rebecca Bradley, one of the most extreme justices currently on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, announcing she’s not running for reelection, we have a rare chance to _expand_ our progressive majority.
But let me be clear: **Powerful special interests won’t quietly walk away from this race.**
They’re already scheming to recruit another extreme candidate — and they’ll have virtually unlimited dark money at their disposal to target Judge Chris Taylor and prop up their candidate.
That’s why we have to rally behind Chris as soon as possible to strengthen her campaign’s defences before an opponent jumps into the race.
[**Please, join me in supporting Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign by chipping in $10. Your contribution helps us prepare for the fight ahead:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250928_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250928-628&refcode2=635_294397_VEVql0&akid=635%2E294397%2EVEVql0)

Thanks so much. Chris is lucky to have you by her side.
Tammy

name: Team Fight Like Hell
subject: Tariffs are driving up costs everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Tariffs: higher costs and fewer jobs |
#
---
Team, Governor Whitmer is laser-focused on bringing good-paying, middle-class manufacturing jobs to Michigan. But **current tariff policies are driving up costs for working families and making it harder to achieve that goal at home and across the country.** We need commonsense trade policies that actually support American jobs — not policies that squeeze families at the checkout line and make it harder for manufacturers to compete. That’s why we’re working so hard to elect leaders who will fight like hell for smart economic policies that lower costs and build a stronger middle class. But right now, we risk losing ground to politicians who will double down on the same failed policies that are holding working families back. **It comes down to this: we’re days away from our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we’re running short of our goal.** **[We need your help. name: Maxwell Frost
subject: House Republicans love attacking me for…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EY_4Uq-EnegsUErxNXOrOA~~/AAPPABA~/2er6sCxg791iqC90TlbfdXkcSTLeKaxZX6mamcNs2Tx0xqvKUI0ZQN65W3araEYqT7CMDoYaBgHlicdgb59npGX1hktFZq8PfAmgZ4vC8u_3mMGpEOthpEooXH6oUNPMia8nMyEj_tHiedJEUhQ0L2co_6o9xknAjyUZQf2j-sTDMFfVKch4-aulN7iwjy0oMHRUMGSaPvf-KXOCSeH3KpQqOsQZDynP5soHPC3HMvpstLNg6gikEfZ7W8fSfnMvoENfE_dCCYEl8tXVu5e5JfPGrpY39gj3YI8Pw5S9YiaTM_Ljj5VecVejpm4yCYnWM596VZXEq24J7zVpX4opjvG-eLfkXx-H-oR8u5vx5OHT_40P2RnTHT14pbjYmp7v)
---
| **Peter, so much has changed since I defied the odds to become the first Gen-Z member of Congress. But here’s one thing that’s stayed the same: House Republicans love attacking me for... not being rich.

Another thing that hasn’t changed? End of Quarter deadlines. I’ve got one coming up in a matter of hours,** [so if you can rush $27 to help me prove the power of everyday people working together, it’ll go a LONG way. >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EY_4Uq-EnegsUErxNXOrOA~~/AAPPABA~/2er6sCxg791iqC90TlbfdXkcSTLeKaxZX6mamcNs2Tx0xqvKUI0ZQN65W3araEYqT7CMDoYaBgHlicdgb59npGX1hktFZq8PfAmgZ4vC8u_3mMGpEOthpEooXH6oUNPMia8nMyEj_tHiedJEUhQ0L2co_6o9xknAjyUZQf2j-sTDMFfVKch4-aulN7iwjy0oMHRUMGSaPvf-KXOCSeH3KpQqOsQZDynP5soHPC3HMvpstLNg6gikEfZ7W8fSfnMvoENfE_dCCYEl8tXVu5e5JfPGrpY39gj3YI8Pw5S9YiaTM_Ljj5VecVejpm4yCYnWM596VZXEq24J7zVpX4opjvG-eLfkXx-H-oR8u5vx5OHT_40P2RnTHT14pbjYmp7v)

My annual financial disclosure form took me 5 minutes – because I don’t own any stocks. Unlike so many members of Congress, I don’t abuse my office for stock trading.

**Instead, I’ve spent my time in Congress fighting for working class Americans – and I wouldn’t have it any other way.**

When I ran for Congress, I drove for Uber and took on credit card debt just to get by. After my swearing in, I got denied from apartments in D.C. because of my credit.

So I don’t just talk about the struggles that working class Americans are facing right now – I’ve lived them. Now, thanks to your passionate support, we defied the odds again and again. But to stay in Congress, I need to count on your support again.

**We’ve got a huge September End of Quarter deadline, and it’s crucial to show that our grassroots movement is as strong as ever – _and_ that you don’t have to be rich to make a difference in this country. So I have to ask:**

[If just 81 people donated $27 by midnight, we’d reach our goal of $11,028 in no time. clean_body: | | Peter, so much has changed since I defied the odds to become the first Gen-Z member of Congress. But here’s one thing that’s stayed the same: House Republicans love attacking me for... not being rich. Another thing that hasn’t changed? End of Quarter deadlines. I’ve got one coming up in a matter of hours, My annual financial disclosure form took me 5 minutes – because I don’t own any stocks. Unlike so many members of Congress, I don’t abuse my office for stock trading. Instead, I’ve spent my time in Congress fighting for working class Americans – and I wouldn’t have it any other way. When I ran for Congress, I drove for Uber and took on credit card debt just to get by. After my swearing in, I got denied from apartments in D.C. because of my credit. So I don’t just talk about the struggles that working class Americans are facing right now – I’ve lived them. Now, thanks to your passionate support, we defied the odds again and again. But to stay in Congress, I need to count on your support again. We’ve got a huge September End of Quarter deadline, and it’s crucial to show that our grassroots movement is as strong as ever – and that you don’t have to be rich to make a difference in this country. name: Dire
subject: Lord of Rings esque battle looms for Dems in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is turning into a massive Lord of the Ring-esque battle with spending that will reach levels comparable to a Presidential election.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iC67dFwehbcpj9_XYF1DRuiDUOifN37P9lSDB16XfsRYmnlSst_HfGsKyZ3twoN1A3K8DNtpV7anv-lLgSscN0I8pWHcKGnBpVh8tQhBIue4mAgCyepjHRSFH_GnsZUINO0UaaSnh0-KN7LJYDfxdgDCt3jR7H9gh0aThfpZnBdFKITjw_eG87xTE6Fuu-62MCo66jTqJ2f3XulQJhw-ljtLGt2YS_m5q7KGDH3t8CU=&c=fQ-XjvmvoVMyZGIiEh5-7Pd54Sy0V7FikxO92aako9phJ9LcWxc6Uw==&ch=lhIIHHLlzQqq4tvm378ESyUwQWhWSPVCneR6VapmkpX1_VStjvmALA==)
---
| Peter,
The situation on the ground in the obscure but critically important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is turning into exactly what we have been warning about:
A massive Lord of the Ring-esque all out pitched battle with spending that will reach levels comparable to a Presidential election.
Why is so much emphasis being placed on this local court race? Because if Democrats lose this court, we lose Pennsylvania forever. 19 electoral college votes guaranteed to Trump. A redistrict that guarantees 18 red congressional seats. And an extreme abortion ban.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iC67dFwehbcpj9_XYF1DRuiDUOifN37P9lSDB16XfsRYmnlSst_HfGsKyZ3twoN1A3K8DNtpV7anv-lLgSscN0I8pWHcKGnBpVh8tQhBIue4mAgCyepjHRSFH_GnsZUINO0UaaSnh0-KN7LJYDfxdgDCt3jR7H9gh0aThfpZnBdFKITjw_eG87xTE6Fuu-62MCo66jTqJ2f3XulQJhw-ljtLGt2YS_m5ItKX33_g9jo=&c=fQ-XjvmvoVMyZGIiEh5-7Pd54Sy0V7FikxO92aako9phJ9LcWxc6Uw==&ch=lhIIHHLlzQqq4tvm378ESyUwQWhWSPVCneR6VapmkpX1_VStjvmALA==)
---
| | | | For months, as one of the only Democratic organizations in this race, we have been outnumbered and outgunned, standing alone in the face of a seemingly unstoppable Republican onslaught.
However, thanks to supporters like you who have gotten out the word about this race and supported our cause helping us to raise over $1.4 million dollars and hire hundreds of canvassers, we have shown the Democratic movement that there is a credible fight being put up.
Now after months of going it alone, organizations from across the Nation are coming in to back us up. The ACLU has come in with a massive ad buy, and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee has made a six figure investment into the race.
Once seen as a foregone lost cause, the Democratic comeback that we launched this Summer has shocked the nation and shown that we can win in Pennsylvania.
While Democrats are finally waking up to this race so too are MAGA mega donors like Jeff Yass. Yass is the richest man in PA and PACs and nonprofits that Yass has historically funded to the tune of millions are spending serious money in this race.
Earlier this year, Yass reportedly said he was prepared to spend up to $30 million to flip the PA Supreme Court. If he doubles down, we're in real trouble. [Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare so we can immediately rush it to the frontlines?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iC67dFwehbcpj9_XYF1DRuiDUOifN37P9lSDB16XfsRYmnlSst_HfGsKyZ3twoN1gVQpj9UYk1mQ0CrV1xvdc10RbIRCGVuUdAfV3daUw4PE_2VhUqh5wbYelao8PBlil3_8f_j7p2_Q-i0ppMhXkL3UDURSkcrXFJrxeqvT4cw9UbmvfntMDoY15vMJVNG1x5Ml64BO_Y2apYpxQR7Nl7rAASBYMmOdeScfeNvOrpqehiRxgLPLSRyFIboQFj2-&c=fQ-XjvmvoVMyZGIiEh5-7Pd54Sy0V7FikxO92aako9phJ9LcWxc6Uw==&ch=lhIIHHLlzQqq4tvm378ESyUwQWhWSPVCneR6VapmkpX1_VStjvmALA==)

clean_body: The November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is turning into a massive Lord of the Ring-esque battle with spending that will reach levels comparable to a Presidential election. | | | | | == | Peter, The situation on the ground in the obscure but critically important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is turning into exactly what we have been warning about: A massive Lord of the Ring-esque all out pitched battle with spending that will reach levels comparable to a Presidential election. Why is so much emphasis being placed on this local court race? Because if Democrats lose this court, we lose Pennsylvania forever. 19 electoral college votes guaranteed to Trump. A redistrict that guarantees 18 red congressional seats. And an extreme abortion ban. | == | | | | For months, as one of the only Democratic organizations in this race, we have been outnumbered and outgunned, standing alone in the face of a seemingly unstoppable Republican onslaught. However, thanks to supporters like you who have gotten out the word about this race and supported our cause helping us to raise over $1.4 million dollars and hire hundreds of canvassers, we have shown the Democratic movement that there is a credible fight being put up. Now after months of going it alone, organizations from across the Nation are coming in to back us up. The ACLU has come in with a massive ad buy, and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee has made a six figure investment into the race. Once seen as a foregone lost cause, the Democratic comeback that we launched this Summer has shocked the nation and shown that we can win in Pennsylvania. While Democrats are finally waking up to this race so too are MAGA mega donors like Jeff Yass. Yass is the richest man in PA and PACs and nonprofits that Yass has historically funded to the tune of millions are spending serious money in this race. Earlier this year, Yass reportedly said he was prepared to spend up to $30 million to flip the PA Supreme Court. If he doubles down, we're in real trouble. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This is shaping up to be a battle at the scale of Minas Tirith and Helms Deep. We only win this if the Rohirrim (you, our grassroots donors) can come to our aid. Thank you for your support when Pennsylvania needs it most. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: SCOTUS just handed Trump the keys
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Don’t let Congress sit by while SCOTUS hands Trump dictatorial power. | |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court just knocked down one of the last guardrails against authoritarian rule. By a 6–3 shadow docket order, the Court effectively greenlit Trump’s illegal firing of FTC Commissioner Rebecca Slaughter.1 Congress created the Federal Trade Commission to be independent — a watchdog shielded from partisan politics. Trump had no “good cause” to fire Slaughter. His only motive was to seize total control. And instead of upholding the law, the Court cowered and sided with him. This isn’t just about the FTC. It’s about the separation of powers foundational to our democracy. If Congress allows this power grab, it will have surrendered its own Constitutional duty to legislate our government’s structure. Justice Kagan warned that the Court’s conservative majority has decided “to reshape the nation’s separation of powers” and entrench Trump’s autocracy. They’re doing this through a shadow docket — **hot wiring our government with no hearings, no briefs, no transparency.** The danger could not be clearer. If they can do this to the FTC, they can do it to every independent agency — from the SEC to the Fed. That means Trump's loyalists calling every move, punishing enemies and rewarding allies, with no check on his power. [**Tell Congress: Reassert your Constitutional role. Rein in a Supreme Court that is legislating from the bench to hand Trump unchecked power.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJa8UV7PaMqc9CexhVG2Rb_XUJr43dscvc3cN01CSMDHJkmb4rloAikiZk0ZODl6rNM4DNjWnomSy4iCDyt5Jy9Bc1gnFTd4UbjcJuYHZYxaUTl6ULKx0MeNMHAN_74n4vT2hNKGZ_3vcKVPuksxMBd3zPVAFQ3IDhQFJp9NevUWomuB_-F31Ftjl3YpeeO93clO0O4DCXkwKWcCJTgjSQiU0gTrMuRJRRldCh8teYBXcTYJqrj3FgJehxrk2UzuA--Jyx5h5d2Cr6naI2qGlSAlJnMdecL3wv7x448xVRCMcAKv2UHjIPqrMktw-XC_PI_p27jDyPlsBxzCIxFVniMCl47uM-hf4C28j0ZocmEhhDwtTuk-t7y47ogrFc5INMukPwljEGt9WrDa4sEMOAN8RaX4caUG7Z8T-iCnKaNgw/4ka/0ZOERbhYRbmXACGgJIDlPw/h0/h001.pxCbNM6cuLddCAsqSM6yMfnXWXE2sLvAA339nTT2CD4) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJa8UV7PaMqc9CexhVG2Rb_XUJr43dscvc3cN01CSMDHJkmb4rloAikiZk0ZODl6rNM4DNjWnomSy4iCDyt5Jy9Bc1gnFTd4UbjcJuYHZYxaUTl6ULKx0MeNMHAN_74n4vT2hNKGZ_3vcKVPuksxMBd3zPVAFQ3IDhQFJp9NevUWpHVS3KSaqs0MDXXrDd4lIpAxMTYdbtwywW3DLqneMBKjUGGBjaNfUPgK82QyjCfRg0CsQFNz8sdphyP4KNf21PVm-667dZ3X5dv2E_tU565UDS_f9uXhSqNpcaFWiH9lKH52B06nQAZRcneVy5wpOwupyMdQr42qdIxsO1do5yF0jclS5XrKPqCmdrtPsZ1KNLrrzyU7LGsXyR3Z0mWQNUvAeD4-I6lCLEbMgDaxUZWyy2U8kAXKFUTBTlg6FEJuQ/4ka/0ZOERbhYRbmXACGgJIDlPw/h1/h001.mDAcKPshMEw5Wtx234--tN40JZvwNPczEVWyjkGYP7U) **The truth is:** Authoritarians never act alone. Trump's assault on our democracy is made possible by enablers in robes — justices willing to shred precedent, erase independence, and silence dissent. Congress must act now to stop this collusion. [**Tell Congress: the Constitution belongs to the people, not to Trump, not to SCOTUS, not to the oligarchs who serve them.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJa8UV7PaMqc9CexhVG2Rb_XUJr43dscvc3cN01CSMDHJkmb4rloAikiZk0ZODl6rNM4DNjWnomSy4iCDyt5Jy9Bc1gnFTd4UbjcJuYHZYxaUTl6ULKx0MeNMHAN_74n4vT2hNKGZ_3vcKVPuksxMBd3zPVAFQ3IDhQFJp9NevUWozCwAgaaIdyadFcW0jxjHP6WQd46fupkZVqbtpkmG0nKZvcA8YF99rL-xqIHLKgHuAoe4x9oAW5c4bJwgpocv6xl4iaIfIhtSw4jt27aL6C8g_U1PsEBg3t-AUn2nnbznNX_fCOtxClnepzt0QIye3yeuYTVlGzoIJqpu7xQBSlNgHCBWh7-R5VVfVUfKL_iOu5OOMpTOqNYhPcuY9udt7MHPlRiqYAXYUDec_AM5OY3JMLYz56zWiPd8uqwbUuTw/4ka/0ZOERbhYRbmXACGgJIDlPw/h2/h001.nbiSUK0nqvOZj6dnxPHqh77PtrxwD7EID1qJthH3dvw) Thank you for standing up to authoritarianism, Morgan Stahr

| As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation. That's why we've knocked on over 300,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history. _This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._ Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win. Well, together, we pulled off the impossible. Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term. National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line. It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters. [So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and Blue Amp Action so we raise the resources we need by our midnight deadline? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: We’re called to look out for one another.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
I have always said that our best leaders have something that drives them to do right by others.
Peter,

I have always said our best leaders have something that drives them to do right by others. A moral compass that directs them to help the people they serve. For me, it’s my faith.

My faith teaches me to love my neighbor, lead with compassion, and treat every individual with dignity and respect. These principles guide me in my work as Governor of Kentucky, as a father, as a husband, and as a friend.

Lately, my faith has driven me to find ways to help the children and families of Kentucky. I believe every child deserves the chance to learn in a safe classroom, grow up healthy, and dream about their future without fear that it’ll be out of reach. That’s why I’ve worked to expand early childhood education, improve foster care, and invest in safer schools here in the commonwealth. I have even introduced my “Pre-K for All” initiative, which would make Pre-K free for all Kentucky four-year-olds.

When we care for all our kids and look out for one another, we care for the future of Kentucky and our country as a whole. These initiatives allow children the chance to learn and thrive. It gives their parents the chance to head back to work and invest in our economy. It creates more jobs to teach our youngest and brightest. This is the kind of work I’m proud to be a part of.

[**Will you chip in today to help support my mission to elect good, compassionate leaders in Kentucky and across the nation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116111179/572512515/841405539?refcode=em25_250928_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250928_eoq2_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a48f9bed-829c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTQ4ZjliZWQtODI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iQBUE-RaUKEp91Z4-bKmYsSmCjWk0mKeDeBhiKNV4zk=)

Peter, not everyone is driven by faith, _**and that’s okay.**_ Some are guided by conscience, compassion, or a simple sense of decency. But what truly matters is that we all share a moral responsibility to make life better for one another — to ensure our government works for all people, not just some.

There are leaders across the country doing similar work in their communities — finding ways to support all of their constituents, not just a chosen few. We need more of this leadership, and I’m proud to support candidates who embody this drive to do what’s right, no matter what.

My team is facing our September fundraising deadline, and your support will help us continue our work to support good candidates and good people in every corner of America.

[**Can I count on you to chip in before the end of the month to support my PAC, In This Together, as we strive to support these leaders in critical races? body:
We only have one shot to get this right

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116112862/572515262/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWVhNzQyZS04NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8Vtz_gxNYV5IU0y_qIy8f6V6app1ILQbWumGFNX21k=)

**With the California special election in just weeks and our end-of-quarter deadline in just 2 days, the stakes have never been higher.**

Affordable healthcare. Social Security. Public media. The House majority. Our democracy._It’s all on the line._

We’ve already seen what Trump and MAGA Republicans are doing with full control over the White House, the Senate, House, and even the courts.

**They’re ripping healthcare from millions, threatening to jail their political opponents, sending out the national guard to Democratic-led cities, and hiking up prices on everyday items for everyday Americans.**

It's true, we've been winning: March: Democrats flipped _deep red_ state senate seats in Pennsylvania – a district Donald Trump won by 15 points. April: A pro-democracy candidate won a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court – despite $20+ million in spending from Elon Musk and right-wing mega-donors. May: Omaha elected its first Black mayor — _and_ the first Democrat since 2009. August: Iowa Democrats flipped a state senate seat in a Trump +11 district, breaking the GOP’s supermajority. September: Democrats James Walkinshaw and Adelita Grijalva won congressional special elections, putting _two more_ Democratic voices in the U.S. House. We’re not just holding the line — we’re flipping Republican strongholds. The GOP sees what’s happening. Their grip on power is slipping, one election at a time. That’s why they’re scrambling to gerrymander districts, suppress votes, and flood races with billionaire cash. **But it’s not working.** If we keep up this momentum, 2026 could be a political earthquake. **[Help us keep the momentum so we can continue winning in battleground states across the country. clean_body: | = It's true, we've been winning: March: Democrats flipped deep red state senate seats in Pennsylvania – a district Donald Trump won by 15 points. April: A pro-democracy candidate won a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court – despite $20+ million in spending from Elon Musk and right-wing mega-donors. May: Omaha elected its first Black mayor — and the first Democrat since 2009. August: Iowa Democrats flipped a state senate seat in a Trump +11 district, breaking the GOP’s supermajority. September: Democrats James Walkinshaw and Adelita Grijalva won congressional special elections, putting two more Democratic voices in the U.S. House. We’re not just holding the line — we’re flipping Republican strongholds. The GOP sees what’s happening. Their grip on power is slipping, one election at a time. That’s why they’re scrambling to gerrymander districts, suppress votes, and flood races with billionaire cash. But it’s not working. If we keep up this momentum, 2026 could be a political earthquake. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your donation today will help us talk to more voters in key battleground districts, support strong Democratic candidates, and flip even more seats to take back the House. Friend, In 2020, 2022, and 2024 – despite a pandemic, death threats to officials, and constant misinformation – our elections held. **But we’re not exaggerating when we say this time is different.** Now empowered by an administration filled with election deniers, the threat to free and fair elections is coming directly from the federal government. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116113089/572515811/957523928?refcode=em-9.28.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmVhNzQyZS04NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igv1_K-WL0KUbnvQpj0w15eA-lnC9Wjz4G-oyPGwIrI=) **The Trump Administration’s Campaign to Undermine the Next Election**
---
Trump has launched a coordinated campaign to undermine the 2026 elections. His administration is rewriting election rules, threatening election officials, and pardoning those who tried to overturn the 2020 results.
And unlike last time, the internal checks that stopped him – the DOJ, career civil servants, nonpartisan election leaders – **are gone.**
He’s clearing the runway to try again. And this fight will come down to the people who actually run our elections – the Secretaries of State on the front lines of our democracy.
Because while Trump and his allies rewrite rules from the top, it’s state-level leaders who will ensure every vote is counted, and certify the results.
[**At DASS, we’re fighting to elect and support Democratic Secretaries of State in battleground states across the country – but we can’t do it without you. So please, can you chip in $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116113090/572515812/957523928?refcode=em-9.28.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmVhNzQyZS04NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igv1_K-WL0KUbnvQpj0w15eA-lnC9Wjz4G-oyPGwIrI=)

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Two days left until our end-of-quarter deadline →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250928-1543-foote&t=1001&akid=1543%2E342411%2EHYD4HE ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad has never been about simply resisting — we’re working to defeat
authoritarianism and build a future rooted in justice, dignity, and
equality.

Right now, MAGA extremists and far-right forces are ramping up their
attacks. They’re trying to silence our movement, undermine our
communities, and roll back the progress we’ve fought for together.

But we’re not backing down. We’re standing shoulder-to-shoulder with
grassroots supporters across the country — people just like you — to
ensure our movement has the strength to fight back.

We set a critical $30,000 end-of-quarter goal to keep this fight going
strong. With just two days left until our deadline, we still need a few
more folks from Cresco to step up.

Can we count on you to chip in whatever you can right now to help us hit
our goal and power this movement forward? You can use this link to chip
in:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250928-movement.-GM5ZF&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20250928-1543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1543%2E342411%2EHYD4HE ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/svfem-20250928-movement?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1543%2E342411%2EHYD4HE

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Our next deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40209%2E3422442%2EWiIo2s)
Peter,
We just launched our end-of-quarter goal: raising **$200,000 before midnight on Tuesday.**
It’s ambitious, but we know grassroots supporters like you have the power to help us get there, one small-dollar donation at a time.

subject: They’re crushing us

body:

Peter,

When our voters stay at home, we lose critically essential races.

All year, my colleagues in the Senate and I have been raising the alarm bells about what would happen if our supporters stayed home during pivotal races.

_**A couple of weeks ago, we found out.**_****

I put together a campaign memo on how to avoid future disasters like the one that recently unfolded.

Please take a moment to read it today.

[**READ MY MEMO →** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=56c3c7ca123b42da8971014431ff18f4&_e=z2KCSjpzRwxNN_qF3iVD5Keu32kRX7smLuea_dG512QPN28cVlod-vWmkmcRN2_u_ugaIw06qDSY2Wx-SiQ2o6hjlXNKznSEIqMHUKK9cOhrL9EF7r8sXJtepmANfmUASET1oHAhZNs9m3YK_q5CLWvUgXo6TxV0BMG8FcpsDzTxrc6Vmk7hjzZQ6ZmL3KHP_eYhhaYCV2PVqoD4fx0GchBXnREP-YuJsjeEJwSP_5ACHKiK8N03mu8XZ46rFCfNr6tricQIl7uyufqxrLOLb_DsulDf7cMhC4_iWEwp81BQtpYyORf2CCpJwLkpOxqp65edHSEJFtsztp1Gfy4HAVhcId4HzIlm5wBqKmzg0lL2xP2ML2bJxsl4Flgnrw5MGTTfhTRviCi-LdIP3ULCAHk1oSzGTVtCyOakaO4Z9euA2agRUZ_IFduSeeCxxNvls6cE-HbwjKpT8uY-KIYOEuCy2NFD38JKEmZA8JlMEInqN6D_KV40mcI-e0b6oBC4c0VbLJHye5FHVG-0SCMzd03axV1xKuTYKgfQdmDw0bwsEzGO3kpgXVkOFWV6XfUd1o88GpmZlamgoNbkIfGfVeK4JrHvn7AqhFu-rMC0mTCYD7mVbBW6L0UZ59NTWIiLNSlPROA0Qz9qHKfweALKxL8V02Su6PPeCVSmwTeH1hgcOl0AOcDaID8IdtnoWmIROiOeSAJDfo-x2erdVNaEtt0bPrLuIT5dPsA-doRXBOLtMmAhhyVLgdFR7AsXFTq_uh78fP0uh817NZ_bjNgz0jsodBJnBg_ZAeCMrq7FFNM%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
United States Senator - Montana

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Troy Downing
subject: I never thought I’d be writing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s weird to be on the other side of one of these messages.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**I just want to say I'm sorry, Peter. You deserve better.**
You've probably already gotten 50 texts today from folks asking for your hard-earned dollar & the last thing you want to deal with is another politician looking for a handout.
I get it because I also get those on my phone and laptop. So being the sender this time feels a little awkward.
**This is Troy Downing. I'm a combat veteran, husband, father & conservative Congressman fighting to advance President Trump's agenda.**
Not in a million years did I ever expect to hold federal office.
But when I saw how things were being run in DC, I felt a responsibility to act.
_Now I'm bringing Montana values to the Beltway._
This midterm cycle isn't just another election. It's the key to who controls the House - continuing the MAGA agenda or succumbing to a radical liberal takeover.
Democrats have huge sums of cash slated to crush MAGA Republicans like me.
**__They've already funneled massive amounts into House races to wipe out every conservative standing in their way.__**
They can't stand a candidate with my profile – someone who's served our country & isn't afraid to shake up the status quo.
But no matter how hard they come after me, I won't back down.
**_Here's the bottom line:_ **_a win for someone like me will bring us one step closer to protecting our conservative majority._
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._RTXiiw)[ I hate to ask, but the fate of America's future is in your hands... Can you take a leap of faith with a combat vet & chip in to my campaign today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[DONATE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)If you can't contribute, I understand. Just know that your prayers mean the world to me.
Thank you and God bless,
Troy| |
---
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
Troy Downing For Congress
P.O. Box 20333
Billings, MT 59104
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, [click here](https://trk.emails.troydowning.__S2Z_oiC7yn_35rQ)
---
---

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Democrats just FLIPPED another House seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
But that’s not the worst part...
| Friend,
---
Believe me, the last thing I wanted to do was disturb your evening with another message.
---
But I truly had no choice.
---
**You see, the Democrats just won another special election – this time, in Arizona – to further reduce the size of our House GOP Majority.**
---
We now have almost _NO_ margin for error in the midterms!
---
_As it currently stands, the Democrats will need to FLIP a net of just 4 SEATS to take back control of the House and impeach the President over some bogus witch hunt._
---
To make matters even worse, the latest reports show House Republicans were “crushed” by the Democrats in fundraising last month.
---
**DCCC crushes NRCC in August fundraising**
---
Source: [_PUNCHBOWL NEWS_]
---
**If we don’t make up the difference by OUTRAISING the Democrats this month, the House majority that we fought so hard to win last November will be in jeopardy!**
---
**That is why, in my capacity as House GOP Leadership Chair, I’ve authorized a 500% MATCH for the next 60 minutes to help us absolutely CRUSH this critical goal before Tuesday’s FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline.**
---
It’s easy to assume that because we’re winning right now, we’ll keep winning in the midterms.
---
_But we cannot afford to underestimate the radical Left and the extreme lengths they’ll go to in order to DESTROY the President and his America First agenda._
---
We need to keep our foot on the gas from today all the way through Election Day – because trust me, that’s _exactly_ what the Democrats are doing...
---
_**And we can’t let these radicals get back into power, or everything we’ve accomplished since our historic victory last November could be wiped away in the blink of an eye.**_
---

clean_body: But that’s not the worst part... | Friend, Believe me, the last thing I wanted to do was disturb your evening with another message. But I truly had no choice. You see, the Democrats just won another special election – this time, in Arizona – to further reduce the size of our House GOP Majority. We now have almost NO margin for error in the midterms! As it currently stands, the Democrats will need to FLIP a net of just 4 SEATS to take back control of the House and impeach the President over some bogus witch hunt. To make matters even worse, the latest reports show House Republicans were “crushed” by the Democrats in fundraising last month. DCCC crushes NRCC in August fundraising Source: [PUNCHBOWL NEWS] If we don’t make up the difference by OUTRAISING the Democrats this month, the House majority that we fought so hard to win last November will be in jeopardy! That is why, in my capacity as House GOP Leadership Chair, I’ve authorized a 500% MATCH for the next 60 minutes to help us absolutely CRUSH this critical goal before Tuesday’s FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline. It’s easy to assume that because we’re winning right now, we’ll keep winning in the midterms. But we cannot afford to underestimate the radical Left and the extreme lengths they’ll go to in order to DESTROY the President and his America First agenda. We need to keep our foot on the gas from today all the way through Election Day – because trust me, that’s exactly what the Democrats are doing... And we can’t let these radicals get back into power, or everything we’ve accomplished since our historic victory last November could be wiped away in the blink of an eye. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: FWD: MAJOR fundraising deadline approaching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Derek,
I wanted to make sure you saw the big announcement: **My team and I are raising $100K for PA Dems** – and our end-of-quarter deadline is Tuesday at midnight.
We're making a MAJOR push to put some huge numbers on the board to make extremist Republicans pay for what they've done at the ballot box, _but my team just told me we're not even halfway there._
[**So I'm personally asking, Derek, because I don't want to let PA Dems down: Will you rush $5 now to help us reach our $100K goal, help PA Dems reach voters all across our state, and win up and down the ballot in 2026?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51736?t=1&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
Thanks Derek,
John ❤️
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **John Fetterman**
Date: Fri, Sep 26, 2025
Subject: 📣 MAJOR announcement
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51730?t=2&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
Hi Derek, John here with a big announcement. 📣
**[I'm FIRED UP to help PA Dems win up and down the ballot come Election Day, so my team and I told them we'd raise them $100,000 to turbo-charge their efforts. But the thing is, we're just DAYS out from my major end-of-quarter deadline, so now we need all hands on deck to help us hit this goal by Tuesday at midnight. Will you pitch in now to help us get there?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51730?t=3&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51730?t=4&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
---
Derek, every dime will go toward organizing and supporting our local parties in all 67 PA counties. It’s crucial they have the resources they need to win in next year's midterm elections – and down the road in 2028.
The stakes are _sky-high_ when winning back seats is the *only* way to hold extremist Republicans accountable for:
❌ Gutting Medicaid
❌ Closing rural hospitals
❌ Forcing seniors out of nursing homes
❌ Sticking working folks with the bill for Trump’s tax giveaways for the wealthy
That’s the GOP playbook – take a hatchet to lifelines for working folks across PA + the rest of the country, cash in for the rich, and dare us to stop them.
**So we start right here.**
These end-of-quarter fundraising numbers go public. 2026 is coming fast, and Republicans will see if we’re ready to fight – or if we’re asleep at the wheel.
**[If you’re with me and the good folks at PA Dems, will you please pitch in right now – $5, $25, or whatever you can – to make sure we have the resources we need to make extremist Republicans pay for their BS at the ballot box?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51730?t=5&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51731?t=6&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51732?t=7&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51733?t=8&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51730?t=9&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
---
Let’s hit $100K and show Republicans this grassroots team is fired up. 🔥🔥🔥
Thank yinz.
John ❤️

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=10337%2E434096%2EYet0LP)

clean_body: | | | Hi, Derek, I wanted to make sure you saw the big announcement: My team and I are raising $100K for PA Dems – and our end-of-quarter deadline is Tuesday at midnight. We're making a MAJOR push to put some huge numbers on the board to make extremist Republicans pay for what they've done at the ballot box, but my team just told me we're not even halfway there. Thanks Derek, John ❤️ \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: John Fetterman Date: Fri, Sep 26, 2025 Subject: 📣 MAJOR announcement Hi Derek, John here with a big announcement. 📣 | | Derek, every dime will go toward organizing and supporting our local parties in all 67 PA counties. It’s crucial they have the resources they need to win in next year's midterm elections – and down the road in 2028. The stakes are sky-high when winning back seats is the only way to hold extremist Republicans accountable for: ❌ Gutting Medicaid ❌ Closing rural hospitals ❌ Forcing seniors out of nursing homes ❌ Sticking working folks with the bill for Trump’s tax giveaways for the wealthy That’s the GOP playbook – take a hatchet to lifelines for working folks across PA + the rest of the country, cash in for the rich, and dare us to stop them. So we start right here. These end-of-quarter fundraising numbers go public. 2026 is coming fast, and Republicans will see if we’re ready to fight – or if we’re asleep at the wheel. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Let’s hit $100K and show Republicans this grassroots team is fired up. 🔥🔥🔥 Thank yinz. John ❤️ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
Verify your voter profile NOW. Let’s keep our momentum going. | **_BREAKING: Democrat Approval CRASHES to Just 19% -- 72% DISAPPROVE of Democratic party._**

We’re heading into a key end-of-quarter fundraising deadline — and this one matters.
These checkpoints might not grab headlines, but they’re critical behind the scenes. Every goal we hit sends a clear message: **our campaign is strong, our movement is growing, and NM-02 is ready to lead the fight for the House majority**.
Southern New Mexico is one of the most competitive districts in the country — and national Republicans are targeting this seat as part of their plan to flip the House. They're watching what we do here.
_That’s why this moment counts._
What we raise before midnight on Tuesday will shape the resources, organizing, and momentum we carry into the rest of this fight. And if we fall short, the other side takes that as a sign of weakness.
**Let’s prove them wrong.**

Peter, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Peter, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**

clean_body: None of us will ever forget him. Peter, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- Charlie gave it all. No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Peter, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- and the calling that now belongs to us. We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him. For Charlie, \- The Turning Point Action Family PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE 4930 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: Funny story. Scott Perry tweeted this: Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Funny story. Scott Perry tweeted this: = Okay. All well and good. But it seems to us like extremist Scott Perry isn't one to talk here. ❌ He's silent as radicals attack free speech in his party. ❌ He supports sending the National Guard to Democrat-led cities and militarizing our law enforcement. ❌ He thinks we need to refocus the attention of our military on "lethality" (yes, he actually said that). ❌ He's sowing division by demonizing those who disagree with him. ❌ He supports an incredibly unpopular and extreme nationwide abortion ban. So much for caring about freedom. Yikes. It's WAY past time for us to kick this slimy politician out of Congress. He can virtue-signal all he wants, but we see the truth. Janelle Stelson is our ticket to oust him once and for all.= | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = —Team Stelson | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson is someone we can trust. # [#] Hey it’s Daniel,

Our EOQ deadline is only a few days away, and we're still short of our $15,000 goal. Josh is counting on grassroots supporters like you to stand with our campaign before this deadline, and we need your help to stay on track right now.

Can you chip in a few dollars to help us get back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2509?amount=]

CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2509?amount=]

At a time when extremists are threatening our fundamental rights, it has never been more important to elect commonsense leaders like Josh who will fight for tangible solutions for the people of New Jersey and across the country.

Look, we now have two opponents in this race, and the NRCC will do whatever it takes to expand its slim House majority. We can’t and won't let them take Josh's seat. So pitch in $ today to help us finish this quarter strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2509?amount=]

Thanks,

Daniel Pardee
Finance Director for Gottheimer for Congress
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-26-footer?amount=25] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. subject: What Happens When A Politician Takes A Real Stand?
body:
And why so many have decided its better not to.

# [What Happens When A Politician Takes A Real Stand?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=174768483&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0NzY4NDgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkwNzg3NjcsImV4cCI6MTc2MTY3MDc2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GgGDPEFlzgMf8xPwuyJwJnY7Wb-mqp6j84BKKXWfZLA)
### And why so many have decided its better not to.
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Sep 28
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=174768483&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0NzY4NDgzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTA3ODc2NywiZXhwIjoxNzYxNjcwNzY3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W28pxEzbEwSnFb1k53WxEZGYJ0wSYbOkaoNSkqUOEtU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=174768483&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0NzY4NDgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkwNzg3NjcsImV4cCI6MTc2MTY3MDc2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GgGDPEFlzgMf8xPwuyJwJnY7Wb-mqp6j84BKKXWfZLA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=174768483&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0NzY4NDgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTkwNzg3NjcsImV4cCI6MTc2MTY3MDc2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GgGDPEFlzgMf8xPwuyJwJnY7Wb-mqp6j84BKKXWfZLA)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/what-happens-when-a-politician-takes?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

For the last couple of years, an outright civil war has been raging here in Jackson County, Missouri, where I live.
The fight, similar to many playing out across the country right now, is about whether or not to give billions of dollars in handouts to the billionaire owners of the Royals and Chiefs, who are threatening to leave town with their teams if they don't get it.
I want to talk about today because the story provides a perfect example of why politicians rarely stand up to special interests and the price they pay when they do.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.tKAbq7w4zgKpF7DxVYyGW8FFNLySW_79UGyGHMOrj6U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174768483)
The first battle in this stadium war took place in 2024, with the teams and their allies fighting to get an initial [$2 billion from Jackson County taxpayers](https://substack.com/redirect/edcdba73-5d5e-46e1-a04f-44404c505a9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (with more needed in the future) to start building a new stadium for the Kansas City Royals and renovate Arrowhead for the Super Bowl Champion Chiefs.
For many in the community- trade unions, politicians, businessmen- there was never really a choice but to support the project. They had to support it, despite the fact that these stadium projects always have a terrible return on investment, because these are big projects and big projects are hard to come by. Plain and simple, our country has no investment or large capital vision that doesn't include paying a tax to billionaires, so people just accept it as a cost of doing business in order to get what they can for their members and their communities. Which I get. We need structural change, and right now most folks need to advocate for their people within the structure they have, because there are mouths to feed.
Yet, in this particular fight, an unlikely political figure decided to stand, nearly alone, in opposition to the scheme: embattled Jackson County Executive Frank White. I say embattled because Frank and the county legislature are almost always at odds, many in the county blame him for soaring property tax assessments, he almost lost his primary re-election campaign in 2022, and there were even scattered ineffective efforts to try to recall him.
Frank, a hometown baseball hero and former Royals second baseman who [had occasionally feuded with his former team post-retirement](https://substack.com/redirect/d11b5b77-693c-4280-89de-790df79383d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and may be predisposed to skepticism of the Royals, was in a unique position to push back. And boy did he.
At first, the Royals claimed they needed a new stadium because their iconic Kauffman Stadium, which fans love, supposedly had ["concrete cancer."](https://substack.com/redirect/0b1add59-e9cf-4d61-8753-0b7f4a9fc92b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) But when Frank White and some others asked for the evidence, the Royals refused to provide it and outside experts opined that the stadium would be fine for decades. So the Royals said that that reason didn't actually matter, they didn't really need or care about reasons, and they were going to move the team if they didn't get a new stadium and the billions of taxpayer dollars they wanted to pay for it with, so we'd better just pony up.
The Chiefs then jumped in and both teams started making menacing statements indicating they would leave town if they didn't get the money, while at the same time refusing to make various documents public about the funding and how the money would be used. The typical shady stadium funding stuff.
In response, the Jackson County legislature voted to put a vote to the people on a 40 year 3/8 cent sales tax equal to $2 billion-- or four times the county's entire annual budget. Frank vetoed the measure, repeating that we didn't know enough to put the vote to the people and that it was a bad deal.
The legislature over-rode his veto, and the vote went to the people anyway. Frank, undeterred, campaigned against the measure as a [bad deal for taxpayers](https://substack.com/redirect/d11b5b77-693c-4280-89de-790df79383d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), calling out the flaws, and continuing to ask questions. Aside from the KC Tenants organization and Frank, there was no real organized effort or expenditure against the vote.
The teams, on the other hand, invested millions of dollars in glitzy ads featuring their stars telling everyone how important it was to give their owners billions of dollars.
Then, in a massive surprise, the tax was [overwhelmingly defeated by voters](https://substack.com/redirect/e688b61e-3d77-4d18-b8f4-ca9f1e723e37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who, apparently, agreed with Frank that throwing money at billionaires shouldn't be the solution anymore.
Since then, the teams have pitted the states of [Kansas and Missouri against one another in a race to the bottom](https://substack.com/redirect/8ca8056e-f2b8-4505-8c89-366eb142e007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to see who will give them the most money with the fewest strings attached. Yet, to this day, a year and a half later, the owners haven't gotten their handout from Jackson County, in large part due to the unlikely stand of its executive, Frank White.
But a war is more than one battle.
I mentioned that, prior to the stadium vote, there had been scattered efforts to recall Frank for the myriad things people were mad at him about, but that they hadn't gone anywhere.
That all changed after Frank had the gall to question the stadium deal.
Suddenly, and ironically, after he had supported an overwhelmingly popular and winning position with voters, the effort to recall Frank became real.
You see, the folks who wield real power in our country needed to make an example of Frank and punish him so that nothing like this ever happens to them again.
And punish him they have: the recall vote for Frank White is now on the ballot for next Tuesday, September 30th. An expensive random unplanned Tuesday election that's going to cost county taxpayers [$2 million](https://substack.com/redirect/912b1834-04f4-4f3a-bd97-d1f546db25dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to administer for just one question: "Shall Frank White, Jr. be recalled from the office of County Executive in Jackson County?"
Poetically, the billionaire class is spending two million taxpayer dollars to punish a politician who refused to hand them two billion taxpayer dollars without asking questions.
The ballot might as well be changed to read: "Should anyone ever stand up to the ruling class again?"
Even if you think that Frank is a terrible County Executive and should have been recalled long ago, this recall should be a stark reminder of who has power in this country. It isn't you. Or me. Or Frank. Or the vast majority of people in this country. We know that because Frank wasn't recalled when you wanted him recalled, or for any of the things you or his normal opponents or voters wanted him recalled for.
No, the option to recall him only became a real option when he pissed off the ruling class. And that should worry not just Frank or his supporters, but his opponents and anyone else who isn't a part of that class.
I'll be watching next Tuesday's election closely because, if they do succeed in running Frank White out of office, whether your support him or hate him, it will be just another sad confirmation of who has power in this country and the cost of standing up to it.
My biggest fear is that this example will succeed and, going forward, our local elected officials will be even less likely to take positions against and question the powers that be.
Which is just going to make the billionaire tax we all pay for large projects even higher, and leave fewer crumbs for the rest of us.

Lucas

And that should worry not just Frank or his supporters, but his opponents and anyone else who isn't a part of that class. I'll be watching next Tuesday's election closely because, if they do succeed in running Frank White out of office, whether your support him or hate him, it will be just another sad confirmation of who has power in this country and the cost of standing up to it. My biggest fear is that this example will succeed and, going forward, our local elected officials will be even less likely to take positions against and question the powers that be. Which is just going to make the billionaire tax we all pay for large projects even higher, and leave fewer crumbs for the rest of us. Lucas Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. name: Wes Moore
subject: I won’t back down
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)
Hi Peter,
Having this team on my side gives me the strength I need to say this: **I won’t back down.**
Not when Donald Trump comes for Maryland and not when Republicans try to defeat us in 2026. I’ll hold the line for workers, protect our rights, fight for our communities, and leave no one behind.
I can’t continue without you.
**[Your contributions power everything we do-- and we have a big fundraising deadline coming up in two days. Can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250928-1?refcode=em-20250928-1&refcode2=679_1086043_UhqLLi&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250928-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250928-1&refcode2=679_1086043_UhqLLi&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)**
We’re building a movement together. It’s powered by people who believe we need leaders who won’t bow down to bullies.
I’d love for you to join us, Peter. This work isn’t easy and the fight isn’t cheap. With you on my team, we can keep winning against the attacks that will come.
**[So Peter, will you rush a donation of $5 or whatever you can before Tuesday at midnight? Together, we can keep fighting back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250928-1?refcode=em-20250928-1&refcode2=679_1086043_UhqLLi&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)**
Have a great rest of your weekend.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250928-1?refcode=em-20250928-1&refcode2=679_1086043_UhqLLi&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250928-1&t=2&refcode2=679_1086043_UhqLLi&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=679%2E1086043%2EUhqLLi)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Dangerous. Costly. Pointless. Hegseth’s stunt must be stopped
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Hegseth cancel stupid, expensive and dangerous "pep rally" of top military leaders](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b17b005-cee9-45ca-adce-1f50569d89d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0011861d-b5ff-4668-bb47-df490539dd11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2f06415-3543-454a-8afe-135a16e671cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66ee8fa3-0f73-499d-af41-65e36ccc8d68/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then share with friends to help build support!)_ Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, the least qualified person in America for that role, is demanding that all top military officers come to a pep rally he is hosting to talk about being warriors or something like that. Hegseth, who apparently is not quite smart enough to realize how dangerous it is to **announce to our enemies exactly when and where all our top military leaders will be at once** , apparently planned this without actually consulting with anyone with actual military experience, and is blissfully unaware just how **disruptive and expensive it is to order them in from war zones.** It will cost a fortune, it will put these leaders in danger, and there's no damn reason for some Fox News talking head (his previous role) who presumably reeks of Axe Body spray to explain to seasoned veterans how combat works. [**Add your name, and join us in demanding that Hegseth cancel this stupid and dangerous event.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65d65b9b-ad21-4b54-9e81-067916b7a681/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

body:
Let me explain.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116120702/572534806/270457887?refcode=ea.c4182f46-8f9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.c4182f46-8f9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0MTgyZjQ2LThmOWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2pQXVqst75wJFjt8bd7OqDYMfHoWObmD-iAnxgZ3ml0=) **The deadline to enter our contest to win Shepard Fairey’s iconic poster is at midnight on September 30, and it looks like you haven’t entered yet!** Here’s what you need to know: **1\. My team will select five lucky supporters to win a limited-edition, signed art piece valued at over $300.** This isn’t just a piece of art — it’s a celebration of joy in our movement and a tribute to the role creativity has always played in my lifetime of activism. ✨ **2\. September 30 also marks our most important fundraising deadline yet.** It’s our last end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day. Dozens of JanePAC-endorsed climate champions are facing must-win races around the country that rely on grassroots supporters like you to win. So your support right now couldn't be more critical for building the resources we need to compete with Big Oil's millions. **3\. Your donation today serves a dual purpose.** Every dollar you contribute enters you for a chance to win this incredible artwork and helps us reach our $75,000 goal to support leaders who refuse to be bought by fossil fuel interests. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116120703/572534807/270457887?refcode=ea.c4182f46-8f9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.c4182f46-8f9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0MTgyZjQ2LThmOWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2pQXVqst75wJFjt8bd7OqDYMfHoWObmD-iAnxgZ3ml0=) **[So what do you say?
