[Make Me An Amplifier for 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/a96a6226-3ed9-4117-84c2-2d59a50f7803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97126ff7-4676-48d9-88bb-406edebf62fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Brian Karem Reporter's Notebook is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Subscribe Now](https://substack.com/redirect/b0b49567-df22-4692-80eb-a3db40f26fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This ain't justice.
It's "Pay the Man."
Before you leave this world you gotta pay the man - That's what David Lindley told us. "Everybody in the whole wide world gotta pay the man."
_" Of the senators in the fancy houses
He's a friend of Babylon
Got a wife and a dog and a cadillac
And people on the run
Got his ways and means and all he needs
To keep him satisfied
But before he leaves this world
He's got to pay the man"_
Now, apparently, to get any amount of justice, [you gotta put $50,000 in a paper bag](https://substack.com/redirect/9608fd6c-9cd4-4ff3-af0a-7c7b4c6badcf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and pay the DOJ. I guess [Tom Homan is running short of cash](https://substack.com/redirect/c1d04b8c-efa9-49fd-9383-32b3433a7309?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In order to find out what the FBI found at Mar-a-Lago in that infamous search where Trump said he had no records. Then said the FBI planted them. Then said whatever was there was no longer classified because of his Vulcan mind meld capabilities...
Along with the James Madison Project, I filed suit against the government _to get the information Trump said wasn 't classified_. I want the information to present to the public.
[That's what reporters do.](https://substack.com/redirect/97126ff7-4676-48d9-88bb-406edebf62fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But today we learned the**DOJ is urging the James Madison Project and me to come up with $50,000** if a court decides to accelerate the lawsuit we've brought against the government to release the information stored at Mar-a-Lago.
The DOJ lawyers' request for the $50,000 bond came in a Washington federal court filing. The bond could even be forfeited if a higher court decides our request for expedited service should be denied.
**So, it 's is quite simply nothing but a pay-to-play move. It's government by Gambino.**
* * *
**" If I am bigger than you, stronger than you, I'll eat you...or I'll f*** **k** **you and then eat you " \- Conrad Harrigan, "Mobland"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97126ff7-4676-48d9-88bb-406edebf62fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
As Mark Zaid of the James Madison Project explained:
> Never in over thirty years of law practice have I seen the government so blatantly seek to intimidate FOIA requesters by threatening tens of thousands of dollars of fees, merely because we sought our statutory legal rights to expedite processing of documents.
> This case seeks production of the documents retrieved by the FBI from Mar-a-Lago that were said to be classified but President Trump, and his allies say are not. One must question what threat we pose by simply requesting expedited processing of these records.
> Could it be they are actually classified and President Trump did violate the law?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.oHEH2xFK5YzXqjJaVJW4T0JFaOpRsYbfaZSW-rcm5gI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174761153)
The justice-stifling request comes from an executive memorandum Trump issued in March, directing DOJ to ask judges to _require_ financial bonds from those who sue the government to seek relief at the early stages of a case.
Hell, all we want is the information Trump says isn't classified and doesn't amount to much.
"This is nothing short of **a $50,000 shakedown demand** merely to expedite release of the 'definitely not classified' records that Mr. Trump concealed from the Government at Mar-a-Lago," attorney Brad Moss said.
"This is not 1920s Chicago and Mr. Trump is not Al Capone. [We will not accede to this demand and we will contest it vigorously in court](https://substack.com/redirect/684fd05c-59b1-4e40-b1bb-f3619392a623?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97126ff7-4676-48d9-88bb-406edebf62fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
U.S. District Judge Loren Alikhan, a Biden appointee, will consider whether to expedite disclosure of the Mar-a-Lago files and how much money, if any, we'll have to come up with to speed up the request for information.
As of now, Trump hasn't released anything, but late Friday afternoon he did say he wanted to release all the files on...no, not Jeffrey Epstein, are you, kidding??
[Wait for it...Amelia Earhart](https://substack.com/redirect/c1d04b8c-efa9-49fd-9383-32b3433a7309?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Well, we can rest easy, I suppose. I'm sure Mar-a-Lago and the Jeffrey Epstein files are next.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97126ff7-4676-48d9-88bb-406edebf62fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Please, if you can, chip in before Mark’s FEC fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
On Tuesday at midnight, Mark is going to need to report out three big numbers. First, the number of people who chipped in to his campaign. Second, the total number of donations. And third, the total amount he raised over the last three months.
#

Team, coming to you this morning with a humble request on behalf of Mark Kelly.
**Can you please make a contribution to support his fight against the Trump Administration before his official FEC fundraising deadline on September 30th? Please, use this link to give:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/FEC-Sept-30**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25/.-bETEu&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=1&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)
If you’ve been waiting for a good time to make a donation, this is it.
On Tuesday at midnight, Mark is going to need to report out three big numbers. First, the number of people who chipped in to his campaign. Second, the total number of donations. And third, the total amount he raised over the last three months.
And we all know what’s happened over these last three months: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis unlike any other in our history. Never before has the President of the United States used the power of the office against his political opponents, states and cities, and the very rights each of us holds dear, like Trump is doing now.
What’s become especially clear in these last three months is that we need more people like Mark Kelly, not less. So, if supporting Mark against Trump and the MAGA Right seems worthy of a donation, we’re asking you:
[**Can you chip in before Mark’s FEC fundraising deadline hits this Tuesday at midnight? Help Mark show the strength of this team. We wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25/.-bETEu&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=2&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-sept25/.7xykj6&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=21&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-sept25/.tSYzFR&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=22&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-sept25/.3zsjJw&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=23&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-sept25/.Nq2luL&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=24&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-sept25/.3zjzQB&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=25&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-sept25/.jl4usP&refcode=em2509298-1-800k&t=26&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=6199%2E6688874%2EOLsasR).

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: Republican Leadership must come to the negotiation table
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter – if Republicans "don't bother" working with Democrats to settle on a short-term bill to fund the government just because Donald Trump told them so, they're about to have a far bigger issue on their hands than just a shutdown.
People in Washington state, and across the country, are going to get letters in the mail next month letting them know their premiums are set to skyrocket next year. Hospitals are already closing and laying off staff.
The other week, I introduced a commonsense bill to protect Congress' power of the purse, repeal the cuts, lower costs, save folks' health care,_and_ avert a shutdown. **Senate Republicans voted it down – then skipped town early.**
[**If you agree that Republicans have no one else to blame for a government shutdown but themselves, sign my petition now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116121319/572536159/1116822119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk554-su-nd&recurring=0&ask=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzM2NDhjMC05MDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U32YPrlkTue3Iea1XUq7gWv-IwwuMHSMiXI0CtGXQrE=&emci=8c7e663a-039b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=233648c0-909c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13116610)
We have to send a message loud and clear to Senate Republicans: **Start doing your job and work with Democrats on a deal to keep the government open and prevent Americans’ premiums from skyrocketing.** **[So I need your help – and signature.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116121322/572536162/1116822119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk554-su-nd&recurring=0&ask=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzM2NDhjMC05MDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U32YPrlkTue3Iea1XUq7gWv-IwwuMHSMiXI0CtGXQrE=&emci=8c7e663a-039b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=233648c0-909c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13116610)**
Thanks for being in this fight,

Patty
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=JsoA225ehnviRUQC32LWitwn5CR33q2kQFDctJSGqRby9vuq8jcb6CxRHMauTG6zXcWj9BPRMaObjDZKcObMg3CanxvJeeV8%2BZpoFZFHchmusp608fRGM8o7c8Wbo1PlvzV%2B57OoQ%2FTHSmV32AWbIjj2TYdClLkbwLNjy5Ne3hOa0pmQUZm6fVAOd%2Bgff7hY9KgYrSrU3TMi9W1k75asUIfvJo%2BGrrTxQMbJKxEYAERwWOt2BMuzKhxtmGPb7LxhecUJsEFYMalppD%2BC0Flq2wKq84lnmifUCshwzfkvnCEUC%2BHl%2BzyCIULF56v2F%2Bovk8HUFLCC429oAf4YB2%2BKVhKWNLBkWF1ZtdA6aKOLvcWkyow5yTRmiqDZDPSD%2Flpw6%2FM5aaXE0fV5GxFP3ZDcB9s1VijWK8g2jlDLWpIYwv7E%2BdMgxlCsUH0ApmdJKHHm) People for Patty Murray

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Say it with us: We are Charlie Kirk
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3b7dj&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3b7dj&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3b7dj&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3b7dj&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. _Now it's our turn._ Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined.
---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team
---
[ **Carry Charlie's Legacy Forward
Claim Your Wristband Today**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3b7dj&__onlt=h)

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: A seat at the table and a slice of the pie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
🥧🥧🥧

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116122353/572538338/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2RmYzNjYy05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90znICsXJf-BQrFluL0Uhe3OXNGsifmzAi6GbJHey4k=)

Peter,

Earlier this month, I had the chance to speak with Iowans at one of my very favorite events: the Marion County Democrats' Annual Pie Auction.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116122356/572538339/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=17dfc3cc-949c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2RmYzNjYy05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90znICsXJf-BQrFluL0Uhe3OXNGsifmzAi6GbJHey4k=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116122358/572538340/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=17dfc3cc-949c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2RmYzNjYy05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90znICsXJf-BQrFluL0Uhe3OXNGsifmzAi6GbJHey4k=)
---|---
If you know me, you know my favorite dessert will always be chocolate mousse pie. But I firmly believe that pie in every form is a wonderful, universal treat that brings us together. **Whether you're a lemon meringue fan, an apple pie traditionalist, or a pumpkin pie devotee, we all deserve a slice of the pie and a seat at the table.**

But here's the thing: The cost of basic pie ingredients — sugar, butter, flour, eggs — continues to rise. They make for a tasty dessert, but they're also pantry staples. And they're not the only essentials getting more expensive. At the pie auction, I heard from Iowans across our county who are worried about rising grocery prices, healthcare costs, and so much more. **These concerns deserve to be taken seriously, but Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her allies aren't listening.**

Every Iowan deserves to be heard and represented. That's why I'm running for Congress — to make sure working families don't get left with crumbs while big corporations and the wealthy take more than their fair share.

**[To keep building this campaign and to win next year, I need your help. We're baking up some real momentum, but to meet our end-of-quarter $30,000 goal, we need everyone pitching in. Will you chip in today to make sure we have the resources to keep fighting?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116122361/572538341/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=17dfc3cc-949c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2RmYzNjYy05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90znICsXJf-BQrFluL0Uhe3OXNGsifmzAi6GbJHey4k=)**
**[Donate $3.14>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116122362/572538342/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250926_EOM4_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=17dfc3cc-949c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&amount=3.14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2RmYzNjYy05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90znICsXJf-BQrFluL0Uhe3OXNGsifmzAi6GbJHey4k=)**

With gratitude (and a sweet tooth),

Christina Bohannan

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

clean_body: 🥧🥧🥧 | = Peter, Earlier this month, I had the chance to speak with Iowans at one of my very favorite events: the Marion County Democrats' Annual Pie Auction. = | = ---|--- If you know me, you know my favorite dessert will always be chocolate mousse pie. But I firmly believe that pie in every form is a wonderful, universal treat that brings us together. Whether you're a lemon meringue fan, an apple pie traditionalist, or a pumpkin pie devotee, we all deserve a slice of the pie and a seat at the table. But here's the thing: The cost of basic pie ingredients — sugar, butter, flour, eggs — continues to rise. They make for a tasty dessert, but they're also pantry staples. And they're not the only essentials getting more expensive. At the pie auction, I heard from Iowans across our county who are worried about rising grocery prices, healthcare costs, and so much more. These concerns deserve to be taken seriously, but Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her allies aren't listening. Every Iowan deserves to be heard and represented. That's why I'm running for Congress — to make sure working families don't get left with crumbs while big corporations and the wealthy take more than their fair share. = = With gratitude (and a sweet tooth), Christina Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. My name is Tiernan Donohue, and I'm excited to introduce myself as the new chief campaigns officer here at EMILYs List.

I'll be leading the strategy that helps elect more Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. From state legislatures to U.S. House seats, every race matters — and every victory builds the foundation for a better future.

I'm stepping into this role at a daunting — and pivotal — time. Right now, Republicans at all levels of office are relentlessly attacking our fundamental rights, and we're faced with the question of how to effectively mobilize to meet this moment.

**For me, the answer has always been EMILYs List.** (I started my career here as an intern years ago!) We're the only organization that does the full scope of this work: we recruit and train candidates, help them run competitive campaigns, and invest early so they have the resources they need to win.

All across the country, women are stepping up to run for office at a level I haven't seen since 2018. **Democratic pro-choice women are fired up and ready to take back power, and EMILYs List will be with them every step of the way.**

You'll be hearing from me more as the cycle progresses, but for now, I hope we can count on your support as we approach Election Day 2025.

[**Peter, will you help fuel Democratic pro-choice women's campaigns this year and beyond? We've got a big goal to hit on September 30, and your support will be matched for this week only:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116122745/572539744/-877057620?sourceid=1057084&refcode=WUEFE962_20250928_TiernanIntro_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ5YmZlZS05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lnziJsm3ue2-RvYA9HWUqMcbiXlboEdIW_FvogWsPxo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116122748/572539747/-140265690?express_lane=true&amount=15&sourceid=1057084&refcode=WUEFE962_20250928_TiernanIntro_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ5YmZlZS05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lnziJsm3ue2-RvYA9HWUqMcbiXlboEdIW_FvogWsPxo=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116122752/572539751/-140265690?express_lane=true&amount=35&sourceid=1057084&refcode=WUEFE962_20250928_TiernanIntro_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGQ5YmZlZS05NDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lnziJsm3ue2-RvYA9HWUqMcbiXlboEdIW_FvogWsPxo=)

clean_body: It's nice to meet you, Peter! | = = Hi Peter, My name is Tiernan Donohue, and I'm excited to introduce myself as the new chief campaigns officer here at EMILYs List. I'll be leading the strategy that helps elect more Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. From state legislatures to U.S. House seats, every race matters — and every victory builds the foundation for a better future. I'm stepping into this role at a daunting — and pivotal — time. Right now, Republicans at all levels of office are relentlessly attacking our fundamental rights, and we're faced with the question of how to effectively mobilize to meet this moment. For me, the answer has always been EMILYs List. (I started my career here as an intern years ago!) We're the only organization that does the full scope of this work: we recruit and train candidates, help them run competitive campaigns, and invest early so they have the resources they need to win. All across the country, women are stepping up to run for office at a level I haven't seen since 2018. Democratic pro-choice women are fired up and ready to take back power, and EMILYs List will be with them every step of the way. You'll be hearing from me more as the cycle progresses, but for now, I hope we can count on your support as we approach Election Day 2025. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Tiernan Donohue (she/her/hers) Chief Campaigns Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Hi Peter, it’s Adam Schiff – U.S. Senator representing California.

**I’ll cut right to it: I’m reaching out today about George Whitesides.** I was proud to endorse George and campaign with him to flip CA-27 from red to blue, and now, he’s working hard to deliver real results for Southern California in Congress.

George was one of only a few Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats back in 2024. He defeated the GOP machine and an entrenched incumbent who was a rubber stamp for Republicans.

**Now, he’s gearing up for his first re-election bid – and he’s already a top Republican target.** We expect millions of dollars in attack ads to be spent against him and other vulnerable Democrats. Not to mention a second GOP challenger recently entered the race to unseat him.

We cannot let that happen – not when our Republican colleagues voted to strip health care from millions of working families. Not when this White House is silencing anyone who dares to speak out against Trump’s MAGA agenda.

The good news is that the House majority is within reach. Only three seats separate control, but we need to keep swing seats like George’s to stop the chaos.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting George with a $3 donation today. His FEC deadline is fast approaching, and a strong showing is key to keeping CA-27 blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123001/572540612/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.28.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmExN2IzMy05NTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W70d-SLfJz2AFleCnisK-ybDqTdhFFMDxf2fw4AR92Q=)**

name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: The evidence is all around us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We’re in a critical stage of the fight for free and fair elections.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116122985/572540541/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NjYzNGY1LTk0OWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZGzyJzBuOAT_27G4gwBMBkuSreUKLido1NDZn58hVc4=&emci=d8b3cfbd-029b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=596634f5-949c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, I don’t need to sell you on the urgency of our work to stop GOP gerrymandering. The evidence is all around us, and you’ve been on our side to defend democracy against constant rising threats:
* MAGA Republicans just enacted new, shamelessly manipulated congressional maps in Texas and Missouri.

* Donald Trump is pressuring even more GOP-controlled states to steal even more seats ahead of the 2026 midterms.

* And in just over a month, Virginia and Pennsylvania's elections will help set the course of redistricting and voting rights in those critical battleground states.

But with all these fights and more underway, I just got this note from our Chief Operating Officer saying that our grassroots fundraising isn’t exactly where we need it to be right now:
* * *
From: Kirsten Collings
Subject: Progress to Goal: 2025 Q3 Team, as you can see below, we’ve fallen a bit behind pace for our quarterly grassroots fundraising goal. We’ll need a strong push to make up ground if we want to reach our September target by next Tuesday.
* * *
[**At this critical stage in the fight for free and fair elections, we don’t want to have to make difficult decisions about where we’re able to invest our resources. clean_body: We’re in a critical stage of the fight for free and fair elections. | Peter, I don’t need to sell you on the urgency of our work to stop GOP gerrymandering. The evidence is all around us, and you’ve been on our side to defend democracy against constant rising threats: MAGA Republicans just enacted new, shamelessly manipulated congressional maps in Texas and Missouri. Donald Trump is pressuring even more GOP-controlled states to steal even more seats ahead of the 2026 midterms. And in just over a month, Virginia and Pennsylvania's elections will help set the course of redistricting and voting rights in those critical battleground states. But with all these fights and more underway, I just got this note from our Chief Operating Officer saying that our grassroots fundraising isn’t exactly where we need it to be right now: From: Kirsten Collings Subject: Progress to Goal: 2025 Q3 Team, as you can see below, we’ve fallen a bit behind pace for our quarterly grassroots fundraising goal. subject: Trump ending mail-in voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092825_1&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092825_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_1&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=092825_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [] Our time in the barrel has come, Team . President Donald Trump said that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud. Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. " How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha. We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court. We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump . We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy. Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? Why? Because the outcomes of next year’s elections will be shaped by the work we’re doing right now. Recruiting. Organizing. Building momentum in the states + districts that will decide control of Congress next year.
**All of that takes time, energy, and grassroots support from people like you.**
If we wait ‘til 2026, we’re already behind. But if we act NOW, we can flip the Senate, take back the House, and save our democracy next year.

Because the outcomes of next year’s elections will be shaped by the work we’re doing right now. Recruiting. Organizing. If we wait ‘til 2026, we’re already behind. But if we act NOW, we can flip the Senate, take back the House, and save our democracy next year. subject: Emily’s Notes: At a loss

body:
I got very few answers when I asked a senior Trump administration official about cuts to LIHEAP (Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program).

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123846/572542936/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! Here’s what I’ve been up to: **• Nope. Absolutely not.** — I voted NO on the Republican spending bill that would make health insurance more expensive for millions of Americans. Some of my GOP colleagues say they want to protect Medicaid and lower monthly premiums, but this bill does the opposite. [_**Watch the video I posted right after the vote →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123847/572542937/745642121?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123848/572542938/565496543?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442)**_**• The latest on the Bear Gulch Fire** — I questioned Tom Schultz, the Chief of the U.S. Forest Service, on the effect immigration raids have on our wildland firefighters’ ability to do their jobs. [_**Take a minute and watch this clip from the hearing →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123849/572542939/-803653937?v=sXJp5Cj7-tk&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) **• At a loss for words** — In the Natural Resources Committee, I asked a senior Trump administration official about cuts to LIHEAP (Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program) and got very few answers. [_**Check out the coverage of our conversation →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123850/572542940/-803653937?v=94tcr7pP8vE&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123851/572542941/-980638963?v=94tcr7pP8vE&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442)**_**• Orange collar crime** — In the Oversight Committee, we debated bills to address the crime rate in DC. My colleagues and I raised the issue of the crime wave that began on January 20 at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. [_**Learn more about the wave of “orange collar crime” →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123852/572542942/-627921691?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) **• My heritage** — September is Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to remember and honor the culture, music, food, and celebrations that have been passed down from generation to generation. [_**My office produced this tribute video along with members of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123853/572542943/-1544262100?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=&emci=5ad914be-b89b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e1b3ee15-979c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) **Now is the part where I ask you for a donation.** Whether the issue is fighting wildfires, lowering energy costs, or protecting our neighbors, Trump administration officials can’t give straight answers. Either they won’t share what’s happening in their agencies, or they simply don’t know it. This is what happens when you fire thousands of experienced public servants and replace them with unqualified yes-men. Meanwhile, Republicans can’t pass a budget, even though they control the White House, the House, and the Senate! **Working people need a government that works. That’s why I’m doing my job to hold these agencies accountable and working to elect more bold, qualified leaders in 2026.** [_**Can you chip in $25 or any amount before our end-of-quarter deadline? Your donations will be used to organize in Washington and in our adopted swing district so we can flip the House →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123854/572542944/1131891713?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116123855/572542945/1131891713?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.28_SeptNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWIzZWUxNS05NzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cifj8OZ16TgiXYIAvJena1pK2hd5FAC_w8bHZEn91iU=) Thank you so much 💙 — Emily

name: Your support is CRITICAL via Fight for Reform
subject: STAND with Letitia James (!!!)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23443%2E4449941%2EorgwK-) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23443%2E4449941%2EorgwK-) **BREAKING FROM THE HILL:** [ **“Trump nominates top aide as senior prosecutor investigating Letitia James” **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69212?t=3&akid=23443%2E4449941%2EorgwK-) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69212?t=4&akid=23443%2E4449941%2EorgwK-) **This is serious, team.** Donald Trump is demanding his administration target those who disagree with him because it is “killing” his reputation.

name: Senator Tim Sheehy
subject: Navigating chaos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e0960acc64894d53899f97164577910b&_e=hdyvKqschzoEzaG8eAKXizv3J-CNwyPTlX9elhVQqbCfpExpz_T3V7Lh8gDiioPx3qrTRZIgm_KQxIAaYwOM1L7oXcchYmEof4MEF9xaiv3wV_CbR8AE3troHjHrBCHJItvRMqpUTNsIZUxSNpXG8y92BtdhRCP4u8ATD82CV8pHazTB2gTXtWBFZiZJRmUcAbOsgqSUgM9x8phhstOOfcbxcW9ulEpfW7g0FHtgZI6P9KqFVchGtVkb2QZoVyrRn447W1u-j8g0KYgl7uQJazVZh95xPuxbvYiXb8u9081ugq6KgsssF-s9lJEX4cuqRrEEyKE1HlqX1zLl1bWlksVb6SMPlZbEHiPD7I4cWQzR6ZShlkjpBhbMe6YQCPJ2cfKZrmqNZLYoXSszg811P2qtoC2eM9QhesgHuq-7ORbHTWo-jh6rki51JZJZuSpqLeaQYYcGh0dx92a5-sufjVoOxOA0ScTeJC9VaImnQL5CrXCTCfjrt3--rgYatToD8Kc7p7Gkqn52a_k7Tpx6Apw7H-g0goPyeTYJK8NovPIiMlOVTSHxs2m0p0IQEAIItkBbz_gusLxGpN0rM8tXYATbWLdsPNb_322n12jeeXh_zdU39Ajwy8CcFcwg1kT48jntZc6-k6w4kXWGZbUAmeBQtkX4HhbjUZqSyC_Y9N6Vf4P3uxKrdAu6BcTbOHNr_NhNWRjFrE-2nwz2KNkiJEHs4wfHMOLOQxKsSOFCAaolccYsWnGedTk0jilGNb4Z)

---
Fellow Conservative,

The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress.

_**As a Navy SEAL, I’ve faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes.**_

I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I’m in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda.

My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:**I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings.** In Congress, I’m fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government.

**But I can’t do it alone.**

Democrats are outraising us, and they’re voting in elections that, to put it simply, we’re not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate.

What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races?

We lose.

I can’t abide by that - and I don’t believe you can either - _**so I’m sounding the alarm right now.**_

Fellow Conservative, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers.

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Fellow Conservative, The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress. As a Navy SEAL, I’ve faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes. I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I’m in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda. My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings. In Congress, I’m fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government. But I can’t do it alone. Democrats are outraising us, and they’re voting in elections that, to put it simply, we’re not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races? We lose. I can’t abide by that - and I don’t believe you can either - so I’m sounding the alarm right now. Fellow Conservative, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers. to fuel this fight to fuel this fight to fuel this fight The attacks from partisan outlets won’t stop—they’re desperate to protect their broken system. But with your help, we can stay focused on delivering results for the American people. If they silence voices like mine, they’ll come for yours next. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! | Fellow American, I’ll be blunt. To keep Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat in Republican hands, we need to hit every fundraising target! If we start missing our fundraising deadlines, we’ll have to start slashing key components of our campaign infrastructure. Right now, we’re in serious danger of falling short of our upcoming End of Quarter fundraising objective by just a few dollars. In a race as contested as the one we’re facing, we need every part of our campaign running at full speed now through Election Day. I know it doesn’t seem like a lot, but donations from patriots like you across the country add up fast. I don’t have the luxury of leaning on coastal elites and Leftist megadonors to keep my campaign running. Your support is the lifeblood of my campaign’s fight to keep this Senate seat and our Senate Majority in Republican hands. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

I am reaching out to share the stakes of our race in Connecticut's 5th District — one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country. **Winning this seat is crucial. ** We are not just worried about keeping CT-05 blue. _We are laying the groundwork to flip control of the House,_ which depends on winning in districts like ours. Republicans are ready to spend big to defeat me, but I’m not backing down. My commitment to our community and to ensuring that every voice is heard in Washington is unwavering. I know we can overcome these challenges, but I can’t do it alone. _I need your support._ **[We can show the GOP that our community stands united and ready to fight for what’s right. clean_body: Help us show that our community stands united and ready to fight for what’s right. | | Hi there, I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to share the stakes of our race in Connecticut's 5th District — one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country. Winning this seat is crucial. We are not just worried about keeping CT-05 blue. We are laying the groundwork to flip control of the House, which depends on winning in districts like ours. Republicans are ready to spend big to defeat me, but I’m not backing down. My commitment to our community and to ensuring that every voice is heard in Washington is unwavering. I know we can overcome these challenges, but I can’t do it alone. I need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me and for believing in the importance of our shared mission. name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Reflecting on a weekend full of community 🧡
body:
Your support allows young people to share their vision for a liberated future, at a time when transformation is needed most. | | | Hi Peter, it’s Matias with United We Dream. We recently wrapped up our West Coast Member Gathering — a memorable weekend marked by reflection, skill sharing, and honoring our collective history. **** [**Your support for United We Dream allows young people to share their vision for a liberated future, at a time when transformation is needed most. Can you make a $5 donation to help us keep the conversation going?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoVTp7uH9u5yk7V4A-QxLPZtAaZrzcyNacTwjw8ivPHPNC8gcUhGnS7-IHsegMaJkAAoYgOZBFid7Vv2tuzzpRKAXhISmLliwkRiI0Bn44-60NJ43MkYqFi8ZU1UlgjKuLwy2ewSLYMOfhEe1ZPXwY3bNdb1stUSU3mII-fZJfN-Rt0zypK8GRradY7Is_M3R0-RmlGcbth2r2yNt2NmiSffWTDb4kU05SiciDGO5BZkHiMUCQ_fcVM5BhdZI_-iAZzbnt2AzCEQ7U7sVsnMjcKCldAYKEzafqLSoR9VmQzbkWCc1aLdLD2-74rV_haAiYx07LpA79SOy6QcbkOWhwY2H0Fi4ktCX5v4HoHioUrB_UR9VEe_NdnF3OEPCTq5G8lVcWLGtteaiQY5VhBcTWhyf7o4SzljNkso-CGDLYN2K1Vtb-0vxu7Vu1Znriq258mFRWi-RT7fwVnGhJMl2YVeHqRiohly9N0iAFEHsAqk/4ka/KpH2KHYYRZOanuHiXJjTmg/h0/h001.tmcnVV3EqyjVplllA6Jl7_EQ2jFCeHEEwYYW__OxsMU) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoVTp7uH9u5yk7V4A-QxLPZtAaZrzcyNacTwjw8ivPHPqnJvjs6sUoqn2BcBM9JhQl8_3-Jy-t7CM7Kr5qW_3s30utukXsjhnufs8EoRyht8sARL1_sWk_M48rVzALB2dRE4eDeAcuLMYs3CfuqrQIqJOMV4P3ZHNsi41fmTwkLFsikFIxpl4toIZx2DKx6dIxmwluSdTtB3CSENrm-9W5jI-3J1_Ao0cOumHTGYJdyRrTpvx__pQKGjb5CPDI7xqYi-UnGN1snMd6Fye_rhT94ilHZCjzBBwSejgH--UgV7buUeY_iFb0z3WGbe8YINz6mf4a7rkS-cop8BwvdOqo9uZPCSUYZbr4djWNMiZIHb48Uktxx5kaeocRpTP1ukya98mw2pvedfqZls3dUWZxM7ZKrYlmPOgM5zK5KDAVJDZVzSXgeXs6pfSlRwR4I_LfFQe6JH5lbSxNK2ZAWCpwg/4ka/KpH2KHYYRZOanuHiXJjTmg/h1/h001.QoMFx-DBh7U3aoa5xCeQHvf0umTRM2BxaECA94p5fP8)

Through group conversations and workshops, members owned their voices and learned how to structure their organizing story. They learned how powerful sharing their stories can be for their communities — _because people power is how we’ll organize for our freedom._
Our members discussed movements of the past, putting our history into perspective. We also made time for joy and community building. Together, we made tote bags, listened to music, played board games, and enjoyed time in nature.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoVTp7uH9u5yk7V4A-QxLPZtAaZrzcyNacTwjw8ivPHPqnJvjs6sUoqn2BcBM9JhQiPh4jTwma_pexUV5roHXNDTi1iuZBZE29t-LswGPhE3FH22O-jRPiHlFcbUZWywp2CtszH3IBHhnF94UO616vkDc_pgWxQ7WVb4YqDBZGZBaCYJ0XnRY72YFywfSb9bTgtNfo0jGWBTcKjYgrA-W5jx7y4OOqzcg9FImVrw1J5itjr9f_dHPxbXEcu5L6Aww5DxMdmEY1rsfl5oWtcCejcabZDxZ65msoM2NrjUFgNIfl160F9oPf9bkykfNQZ763lgBIrBQFVEo2R7Y5TXBiBcY0rwvxw9iYcybN9PFJ8gyTGNOooeWBHS5WajZSPvOc98jwl-29hRlN3ko9z-zU-KBiRpPsXrMEtp4RJyRwpCU0UKb3sOikxy_itDt9HvM9tBNpkblyvSvPbLSzUnyBE/4ka/KpH2KHYYRZOanuHiXJjTmg/h2/h001.dmqNK0tlaMBBnfoGSr_c8KTFhxVu9IjzJQpoxq82w3E)
Then, we dressed to impress at “the people’s gala,” where we had music, dancing, art activities, karaoke, and cake. It’s important for organizers to not only strategize and have hard conversations but also to have fun and practice self-care.
As we wrapped up our membership gathering, we asked our members what they’d recommend to other young people in this moment. One of our members in California said, _“It’s important to find your community. It’s important to find your people and find your inspiration to do this work. We’re not the first generation to do this hard work... We’re continuing that long line of tradition of making sure people are involved and know that this is the spot for them.”_
Even in challenging times, young people need to know _it doesn’t have to be this way_ ; that a different, brighter future is possible _._**We power each other and our communities, and together, we will win.**
[**Your support for United We Dream fuels impactful gatherings just like this one. Will you make a donation today so we can continue to hold these gatherings and discussions? Any amount helps us mobilize the next generation of leaders.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoVTp7uH9u5yk7V4A-QxLPZtAaZrzcyNacTwjw8ivPHPNC8gcUhGnS7-IHsegMaJkLA4h_4ga0ggoJqj-V5wT7hAgz4eANOhaPGrdv2Nf28Lrbb-nT_fu_0hDcgj3bjIxYhOJAg2o_LivQn6udpvQEW0lTh_SuQMj5gL1_ezDYoUSbaqkAMwTcbLhf-k9Nt09FISR7vmc37xUVBcDzjChOdrJsAtkAyUKD09iDsKfseRHPif_Pu76WhrUqzeY9XGswpBnyj-4mTKWvJobPvJDVIzaB4K7F8IDZ66V9YDLP2KGXrzijz2JgSqEmzp-nqPNPLd77U9V5jJfHYTGs5eCvJvSuUv_c5i3aBKqVvgjg3S9Ex-tDFq91fqbMW9m3R9szwipE2FJcbrSTvsEu95FeUpzIpGkgVbVUSrfIBG2DJ6b7EKVwXJqz8p-KOxc02eXemLBfRjuFDAy98_TS3tjY7Wqd7wGabvMoXzsa-SI9Oe/4ka/KpH2KHYYRZOanuHiXJjTmg/h3/h001.HsWErKf_lrqqVFd-Q2ZC2VXuvH0iTLgMB9Xl8ofQEAE)

clean_body: Your support allows young people to share their vision for a liberated future, at a time when transformation is needed most. | | | Hi Peter, it’s Matias with United We Dream. We recently wrapped up our West Coast Member Gathering — a memorable weekend marked by reflection, skill sharing, and honoring our collective history. ** | | Through group conversations and workshops, members owned their voices and learned how to structure their organizing story. They learned how powerful sharing their stories can be for their communities — because people power is how we’ll organize for our freedom. Our members discussed movements of the past, putting our history into perspective. We also made time for joy and community building. Together, we made tote bags, listened to music, played board games, and enjoyed time in nature. Then, we dressed to impress at “the people’s gala,” where we had music, dancing, art activities, karaoke, and cake. It’s important for organizers to not only strategize and have hard conversations but also to have fun and practice self-care. As we wrapped up our membership gathering, we asked our members what they’d recommend to other young people in this moment. One of our members in California said, “It’s important to find your community. It’s important to find your people and find your inspiration to do this work. We’re not the first generation to do this hard work... We’re continuing that long line of tradition of making sure people are involved and know that this is the spot for them.” Even in challenging times, young people need to know it doesn’t have to be this way ; that a different, brighter future is possible .We power each other and our communities, and together, we will win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** We’re building something grounded in honest reflection and shared purpose, built to last, and ready to commit to the ongoing work of transformation. Thank you for being a part of it. — Matias, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

body:
This is about protecting our community from Trump

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116124339/572544370/-629675555?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM3NWIzMWYtOWE5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yl9Wqq60eQHYDj2VeAAoXgSz3thynR33X6fU_GPSdrA=) I just went on MSNBC to call out Trump’s cowardly decision to send troops into Portland: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116124340/572544371/-629675555?refcode=email_092825_portland-msnbc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDM3NWIzMWYtOWE5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yl9Wqq60eQHYDj2VeAAoXgSz3thynR33X6fU_GPSdrA=) I’ve held 18 town halls this year across our district, and not once has anyone said we need President Trump to send troops into our city. _Not once._

**But yesterday, President Trump authorized the “full force” of the military against his own people.**

We don’t need or want Trump’s troops in Portland, and I’m going to do everything I can to protect our community and fight back.

**[In this critical moment, we need all hands on deck to send a clear message to President Trump that we won’t stand for his cowardly abuse of power. clean_body: This is about protecting our community from Trump = I just went on MSNBC to call out Trump’s cowardly decision to send troops into Portland: = I’ve held 18 town halls this year across our district, and not once has anyone said we need President Trump to send troops into our city. Not once. But yesterday, President Trump authorized the “full force” of the military against his own people. We don’t need or want Trump’s troops in Portland, and I’m going to do everything I can to protect our community and fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States

Peter,
---
I promise I won't take up much of your time.
In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.
Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.
**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**
I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.
Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face...
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Difficulties in finding a job
* Homelessness

All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment.

clean_body: The hijacking of the 2020 presidential election | I promise I won’t take up much of your time. | Peter, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. | Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Peter, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. | Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. | Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Can I send you some of my favorite recipes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I want to send every person who donates today my three favorite comfort food recipes via the ActBlue receipt!
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250928-5479-footer&t=1&akid=5479%2E420207%2E8A9qv2)
Hey, it’s Pramila Jayapal.
I know it feels like _every_ campaign is emailing and texting you about Tuesday’s FEC deadline. Trust me, not only do I have the same deadline,_I’m getting all the emails._
So, instead of stressing us BOTH out with more talk of deadlines, how about we talk delicacies? **More specifically, I want to send every person who donates today my three favorite comfort food recipes via the ActBlue receipt!**
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250928?refcode=em20250928-5479&amount=3&refcode2=5479_420207_8A9qv2&akid=5479%2E420207%2E8A9qv2)
Strong fundraising is absolutely mission-critical when it comes to running a successful campaign, but it can often feel transactional.
So, as a small way of saying thank you for your support, I’ve decided to share some of my favorite stress-cooking recipes with EVERYONE who contributes via this email.
[**Chip in here to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal and unlock some delicious recipes from my kitchen.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250928?refcode=em20250928-5479&amount=3&refcode2=5479_420207_8A9qv2&akid=5479%2E420207%2E8A9qv2)

I hope you enjoy them as much as I do!
— Pramila

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: I find strength in the people I serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
While the challenges we face are real and at times, overwhelming, I’ve never been more hopeful about what we can accomplish together.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=jDmzlcQ3MgkBLJfxFZOkeDh6M8gYWbBUDXHtYkt%2FH3ThQdQ0BQIn4iwXHEVza2d5PkO0lOjWtZI4Yx%2Bx1xG5JnPlrkEiKe1BwnwfO%2FcKgVAQr%2B%2FIfncq6aGpH%2Bg1IZhaG2U62xx%2B%2BPK0NTq9as3AkdyFsYBbSz%2FRrhOxFEPoVbbMezWXaB8y6rWIiSJ7Y7EdNeAm2Kk6KfafU2vVB2oIsQPyCSeEvdr8RF3M0PzOUtpSKuY2BjXUqPwRX9Lc%2F37IKvfMSVNd%2FW3p7fD1kTLkCkv5G3vf55%2FXs9IavOKmrffJ83PQyvEvTF8giW%2FLtDvGqjaATw8JRTaXTZiIAWwf8ZMwQmdwuk2zF2BOYxcnGRTDZ4LxXGgbD%2BeQP%2BFR5uGVzCmxSTDIapYW1Lizm1UBsYp1tMMYPyB%2FeaRAdoe%2BQpQ%3D)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116124733/572546058/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_092825_EOQ05_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzlkZWY1NC05ZDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tv8ybAspgj3-ZmkoJnVGXmHZz6bIjZQJLrQQrzRitjw=)
---
Peter, The news has been heavy, and it’s easy to feel overwhelmed and disheartened. And if your inbox is anything like mine, I’m sure you get a lot of doom and gloom emails about it too. Well, this isn’t one of those emails. Because while the challenges we face are real and at times, overwhelming, **I’ve never been more hopeful about what we can achieve together.** Because even in moments of deep uncertainty, I still believe in our ability to come together and fight for something better. And I find strength in the people I meet across this district — parents, teachers, veterans, small business owners — people who are tired of the chaos and dysfunction in Washington and who remind me why this work matters so much. It’s because of them that I know we have what it takes to make real change. Together, we can build a future that puts working families first, strengthens our schools, and ensures every person has a chance to succeed. **The road ahead won’t be easy, but when we stand together, I believe we can overcome anything.** That’s why I’m asking for your help today. Every bit of support helps us keep pushing forward, and together, we can create the kind of progress that makes a real difference in people’s lives. **[If you’re with me, please consider pitching in $10 or whatever you can before our end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday. clean_body: While the challenges we face are real and at times, overwhelming, I’ve never been more hopeful about what we can accomplish together. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, The news has been heavy, and it’s easy to feel overwhelmed and disheartened. And if your inbox is anything like mine, I’m sure you get a lot of doom and gloom emails about it too. Well, this isn’t one of those emails. Because while the challenges we face are real and at times, overwhelming, I’ve never been more hopeful about what we can achieve together. Because even in moments of deep uncertainty, I still believe in our ability to come together and fight for something better. And I find strength in the people I meet across this district — parents, teachers, veterans, small business owners — people who are tired of the chaos and dysfunction in Washington and who remind me why this work matters so much. It’s because of them that I know we have what it takes to make real change. Together, we can build a future that puts working families first, strengthens our schools, and ensures every person has a chance to succeed. The road ahead won’t be easy, but when we stand together, I believe we can overcome anything. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. Every bit of support helps us keep pushing forward, and together, we can create the kind of progress that makes a real difference in people’s lives. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I'm so grateful for your support, Peter. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116124898/572546351/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzllZWY1NC05ZDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAFm7uWaBCSFVJGMRrxeBHf2FejdO6H0MgiZa7VswZU=)
Hi there, it’s Nadav here – Nikki Budzinski’s finance director.

I’m sorry to reach out like this on a Sunday afternoon, but with just a few days until our FEC deadline, I need to get you up to speed. Here are three things you need to know:
1. **Nikki is delivering results for IL-13 despite the Republican House majority.** She’s passed legislation to protect our veterans, ensured Illinois schools were fully funded, and protected jobs in Granite City Works in the past few months alone.

2. **Nikki’s progress and pressure on the Trump Administration has made our campaign a target.** We’ve faced attacks from the NRCC, and the GOP is throwing their support behind our MAGA opponents to flip this seat and keep their majority.

3. **With so much on the line for working families across the district and beyond, we can’t afford to miss our end-of-quarter goal.** We’re required to make our fundraising public – and with a strong grassroots coalition, we will prove that Nikki isn’t going anywhere.

**[I’m looking for another 21 donations from 18326 today to keep up the pace. Can we count on your support with $3 or any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116124902/572546353/-550958566?refcode=em-9.28.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzllZWY1NC05ZDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAFm7uWaBCSFVJGMRrxeBHf2FejdO6H0MgiZa7VswZU=)**

clean_body: | = Hi there, it’s Nadav here – Nikki Budzinski’s finance director. I’m sorry to reach out like this on a Sunday afternoon, but with just a few days until our FEC deadline, I need to get you up to speed. Here are three things you need to know: 1. Nikki is delivering results for IL-13 despite the Republican House majority. She’s passed legislation to protect our veterans, ensured Illinois schools were fully funded, and protected jobs in Granite City Works in the past few months alone. 2. Nikki’s progress and pressure on the Trump Administration has made our campaign a target. We’ve faced attacks from the NRCC, and the GOP is throwing their support behind our MAGA opponents to flip this seat and keep their majority. 3. With so much on the line for working families across the district and beyond, we can’t afford to miss our end-of-quarter goal. We’re required to make our fundraising public – and with a strong grassroots coalition, we will prove that Nikki isn’t going anywhere. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nadav Finance Director | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America.
