name: THANK YOU JIMMY KIMMEL (via VPP)
subject: A huge victory for democracy!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need to make sure he’s never silenced again >>>
| **Jimmy Kimmel returned to TV this week and we couldn’t be more THRILLED:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94241?t=6&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX) _Jimmy Kimmel is SO brave — he’s never backed down from standing up for our democracy, even after Trump tried to BOOT him off the air!_

The American people saved Kimmel’s show, **so now we need to send him a MASSIVE card to make sure Trump doesn’t silence him again!**

[**By adding your name, we’ll show that MILLIONS of Democrats have Kimmel’s back! Please: Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94241?t=7&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX) | [**Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94241?t=8&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX)
---
TO: Jimmy Kimmel
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I have your back. Dear Jimmy Kimmel,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

While Fox News and other far-right outlets spew misinformation and conspiracy theories, you have been a constant, outstanding voice for our democracy.

**By raising our voices, we were able to bring your show back — it shows just how impactful we are when we band together!**

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who will stand with your progressive values and honor your legacy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94241?t=9&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94241?t=10&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94241?t=11&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21335%2E878179%2EqlPmuX)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream.
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
**[If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight – please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Adam Schiff today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=abs-em-ossoff.U7QP1g&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250928_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)**
[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250928_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, and where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency, and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill, and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Adam Schiff today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
**[All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250928_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250928_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=abs-em-ossoff.G49486&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250928_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)
---

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=2&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=9019%2E5257348%2EW9NzHN)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Confidential message.
body:
Fellow American, I sat down and wrote you a letter, and it needs your attention as soon as possible. To keep my message secure and private, I’ve added a passcode to protect it for your eyes only. Please click this link, enter your passcode, and begin reading immediately. |
---
Fellow American,

subject: we can’t afford to lose this Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |

Peter,

If we lose even one of the three Democratic justices up for retention this year, we put the entire Pennsylvania Supreme Court at risk. That’s the court that has protected abortion rights, defended voting access, and stopped MAGA attacks on our democracy.

Republican billionaires are already spending to tilt the Court in their favor. They know that if they can oust our justices, they’ll have the power to roll back rights and rig the rules for years to come.

That’s why this EOQ deadline matters so much. Every dollar we raise right now is a down payment on keeping Justices Christine Donohue, David Wecht, and Kevin Dougherty on the bench, and keeping our Court in Democratic hands. clean_body: | | Peter, If we lose even one of the three Democratic justices up for retention this year, we put the entire Pennsylvania Supreme Court at risk. That’s the court that has protected abortion rights, defended voting access, and stopped MAGA attacks on our democracy. Republican billionaires are already spending to tilt the Court in their favor. They know that if they can oust our justices, they’ll have the power to roll back rights and rig the rules for years to come. That’s why this EOQ deadline matters so much. Every dollar we raise right now is a down payment on keeping Justices Christine Donohue, David Wecht, and Kevin Dougherty on the bench, and keeping our Court in Democratic hands. = = | | = The courts decide everything from your reproductive freedom to your right to vote. We can’t let MAGA extremists buy their way onto the bench. Let’s keep our majority — and our future — secure. — Pennsylvania Democratic Party = | Follow us on , , , and **! | Hi Peter, I wanted to share a little bit about my journey and why I’m running for Congress.

Before I decided to run, I had the privilege of serving Pennsylvanians under Senator Casey and Governor Wolf. I’ll tell you more about that in just a moment, but if you’re ready to help me continue fighting for our communities in Washington, I hope you’ll [_**make a donation to my campaign before our FEC filing deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126126/572550477/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQxOTcyOGEtYTA5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FEqIjUOD6XuESB1XBwgQeFgrxwcVvcKd1uaN1ztymSg=)
---
| | | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126128/572550478/1877634325?&refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQxOTcyOGEtYTA5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FEqIjUOD6XuESB1XBwgQeFgrxwcVvcKd1uaN1ztymSg=)
---
In 2011, Senator Bob Casey asked me to be his Regional Manager in Lehigh, Northampton, Carbon, and Berks Counties, and I served as his Statewide Latino Affairs Advisor. I worked one-on-one with thousands of people in our community, connecting them to services that made a real difference in their lives. I went to bat for them, and I’m proud to have delivered results.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126131/572550481/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQxOTcyOGEtYTA5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FEqIjUOD6XuESB1XBwgQeFgrxwcVvcKd1uaN1ztymSg=)
A few years later, I joined Governor Tom Wolf’s Advisory Commission on Latino Affairs, representing the Lehigh Valley. I pushed for policies that truly supported working families and advocated for our community’s needs at the highest level of state government.

I’ve seen firsthand how important it is to listen to people, understand their struggles, and take action to make life better for them. And now, I’m running for Congress because I believe PA-07 deserves someone who shows up, listens, and actually gets things done.

But here’s the thing: This race is going to take everything we’ve got. We need your support to stay competitive and keep pushing forward.

[_**Will you chip in today before our FEC filing deadline to help us continue this fight and make sure PA-07 gets the representation it deserves?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126134/572550484/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQxOTcyOGEtYTA5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FEqIjUOD6XuESB1XBwgQeFgrxwcVvcKd1uaN1ztymSg=)
| | | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126135/572550487/1877634325?&refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQxOTcyOGEtYTA5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FEqIjUOD6XuESB1XBwgQeFgrxwcVvcKd1uaN1ztymSg=)

Thank you for your support,

Carol Obando-Derstine

name: Breaking News Oregon
subject: President Trump is coming after Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs]
SUPPORT TOBIAS READ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice just filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read.
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections and privacy.
Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 within the next 72 hours to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power.
Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250928em-bnor-rs]
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it.
— Breaking News OR
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307

clean_body: [] [] SUPPORT TOBIAS READ [] The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice just filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read. Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth. This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous. Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights. But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections and privacy. Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you. We aim to raise $25,000 within the next 72 hours to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power. Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [] DONATE NOW [] This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it. — Breaking News OR P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [?] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
Several dark money groups are popping up out of nowhere in PA today, spending millions to oust the Dems on PA’s Supreme Court.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wNavwPAsZD20d0wtXOVU2uv9HLCHlCqznkAHz3pN2yQAeBIm_ste_79UlguMXPgJTDs9V2usEHfJP34Wb_nYDfWSHPX99_LCQlgiHGaZd55bbdwheXSQ1AzLGKN_EWPDSlbhIIBjrj2jU0H03rJsC3G8fAJRZ4xziuOEJVVNsBHkBeFM4LlWJu7auDlOKoPFzu8pK7vWkF06Wr4_FYZnJfPf_WSaX2KWzdgyvrB6G6A=&c=y0HUlvbw6eq0tP9M2j8BvBABiiwVXZxMBpTrpjsICWE1OBfoCEPE3Q==&ch=bRtLh7XJKAMSLQa38yaCm-aWCEwjvbraZUtKm_53WWqkttrYNHakLA==)

| Peter,
The November 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the most important election this year.
It's a rare special election that only happens only once every 10 years and the stakes couldn't be higher: if the Democrats on the PA Supreme Court lose this race, they will be replaced with MAGA judges who will erase blue districts, uphold an abortion ban, and greenlight voter suppression to hand PA to MAGA in 2026 and 2028.
For months Defend Our Courts has been warning about MAGA's scheme to buy this election in secret. While most Democrats hardly know about this race, MAGA billionaires have been amassing a giant warchest, ready to launch an all-out assault to seize control of the court.
And today, MAGA billionaires just launched their surprise attack--in complete anonymity:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wNavwPAsZD20d0wtXOVU2uv9HLCHlCqznkAHz3pN2yQAeBIm_ste_79UlguMXPgJTDs9V2usEHfJP34Wb_nYDfWSHPX99_LCQlgiHGaZd55bbdwheXSQ1AzLGKN_EWPDSlbhIIBjrj2jU0H03rJsC3G8fAJRZ4xziuOEJVVNsBHkBeFM4LlWJu7auDlOKoPFzu8pK7vWkF06Wr4_FYZnJSL0APRc_lvTFWcASkWH6yI=&c=y0HUlvbw6eq0tP9M2j8BvBABiiwVXZxMBpTrpjsICWE1OBfoCEPE3Q==&ch=bRtLh7XJKAMSLQa38yaCm-aWCEwjvbraZUtKm_53WWqkttrYNHakLA==)
---
An ad from the dark money group "Citizens for Term Limits" that just went out to hundreds of thousands, if not millions of PA voters this morning. The message urges them to "vote no" to kick the Dems off the PA Supreme Court. This group just appeared out of nowhere today, and no one knows who is funding it.
---
| | | |
Several dark money groups like this are popping up out of nowhere in PA today, spending millions urging PA voters to oust the Dems on PA's Supreme Court.
Why now? The filing deadline that would allow the public to see who is funding these groups just passed on September 15. So now, MAGA billionaires are launching their assault, completely anonymous.
These dark money groups will stay anonymous until they are required to file again on Oct. 24, only a week before the election, hiding their identities from PA voters until the very last second.
Defend Our Courts is spearheading the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, having amassed tens of thousands of grassroots supporters, raising over 1.4 million dollars from Democrats across the nation, and our communications are already reaching millions of Pennsylvania voters.
We will not allow these dark money groups to launch their surprise attack without a rapid response. We need your help to immediately counter the anonymous dark money being poured into PA at this very second.
[Will you rush a donation of $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can spare to help us immediately counter MAGA's surprise attack?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wNavwPAsZD20d0wtXOVU2uv9HLCHlCqznkAHz3pN2yQAeBIm_ste_79UlguMXPgJxKJI4xtv0KNHhtdRBS6MuwX56j5fV2-oJlHYg6zHXLNHQRawQvEHR7Fsr2oh7IoJyQ3Zdtqis6BpqD5z-Kux2nIPbvFDV293rlG7fAUx2Om4W3JoRXTDJGYMpgha7-sQlxAZaaO4n1IWAptVXMbtW3NSS8aKsCBHQXiOAINqoKVXEcKwli_J_A==&c=y0HUlvbw6eq0tP9M2j8BvBABiiwVXZxMBpTrpjsICWE1OBfoCEPE3Q==&ch=bRtLh7XJKAMSLQa38yaCm-aWCEwjvbraZUtKm_53WWqkttrYNHakLA==)

clean_body: Several dark money groups are popping up out of nowhere in PA today, spending millions to oust the Dems on PA’s Supreme Court. | | | | | == | Peter, The November 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the most important election this year. It's a rare special election that only happens only once every 10 years and the stakes couldn't be higher: if the Democrats on the PA Supreme Court lose this race, they will be replaced with MAGA judges who will erase blue districts, uphold an abortion ban, and greenlight voter suppression to hand PA to MAGA in 2026 and 2028. For months Defend Our Courts has been warning about MAGA's scheme to buy this election in secret. While most Democrats hardly know about this race, MAGA billionaires have been amassing a giant warchest, ready to launch an all-out assault to seize control of the court. And today, MAGA billionaires just launched their surprise attack--in complete anonymity: | == An ad from the dark money group "Citizens for Term Limits" that just went out to hundreds of thousands, if not millions of PA voters this morning. The message urges them to "vote no" to kick the Dems off the PA Supreme Court. This group just appeared out of nowhere today, and no one knows who is funding it. | | | | Several dark money groups like this are popping up out of nowhere in PA today, spending millions urging PA voters to oust the Dems on PA's Supreme Court. Why now? The filing deadline that would allow the public to see who is funding these groups just passed on September 15. So now, MAGA billionaires are launching their assault, completely anonymous. These dark money groups will stay anonymous until they are required to file again on Oct. 24, only a week before the election, hiding their identities from PA voters until the very last second. Defend Our Courts is spearheading the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, having amassed tens of thousands of grassroots supporters, raising over 1.4 million dollars from Democrats across the nation, and our communications are already reaching millions of Pennsylvania voters. We will not allow these dark money groups to launch their surprise attack without a rapid response. We need your help to immediately counter the anonymous dark money being poured into PA at this very second. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The clock is ticking. Every second these attacks go unanswered, the odds MAGA wins this crucial election increases. If the court falls to MAGA, it's game over for Dems in PA. We can't let that happen. | Peter,

This will take less than a minute, and I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday.

I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important.

In just two days, our campaign faces the FEC filing deadline. This is the moment the numbers go public and everyone will see if Democrats have what it takes to win next year.

As Chair of BOLD PAC – the campaign arm dedicated to electing more Latino Democrats to Congress – I know exactly what’s at stake. Republicans have 5 times more cash on hand than Democrats, and they’re ready to spend every penny attacking our communities and pushing their extremist agenda.

[_**If we don’t close the gap, we risk falling behind before the fight even begins. Will you chip in just $10 today so we can show Republicans we’re ready to compete?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126391/572551356/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-09-28_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFhYjkyYi1hMzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9WD3ndbcZUdCrFkjblGhzFn1lyM_8XX1AWAt98FgOM=)

name: Special Election Alert via RTP
subject: just over a week away from a chance to TAKE A HOUSE SEAT
body:
ALERT: Special Election upcoming in Tennesee, Democrats CAN flip a Republican Seat!!!
The GOP is barely hanging on to their majority.
But with the TN-07 special election on October 7th , Democrats have a real shot to flip a Republican seat and put the House back within reach.
Here’s what makes this moment urgent: Democrats nationwide are up against the LAST end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election.
Every dollar we raise before midnight will determine how strong Democrats can be in the final stretch.
We are still $25,000 short of our goal. If we don’t close the gap before the end of quarter fundraising deadline, Republicans and their mega-donors could bury us in attack ads and outspend Democrats on the ground. This is our one shot to flip TN-07 and take the fight straight to the GOP. Chip in before midnight to help Democrats win >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wintn?refcode=092825_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wintn?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=5]

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: What if I told you …
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to make it to the top.

I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter.

**But I have to ask: Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $5 between Shontel Brown and my Senate campaign in Ohio ahead of our first critical FEC deadline?**

What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at _The Cook Political Report_ increased our odds of winning?

What if I told you that _CNN_ and _The New York Times_ report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?

What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you?

**This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win.**

[**So please, chip in $5 – or even $10 split between Shontel Brown and me if you can spare it – to power our campaign forward, win in Ohio, and keep up the fight for working people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126436/572551683/-1150512723?refcode=EM_F_250912Sherrod_N_TSB_90DO_9_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2QyMGI5ZC1hMzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPO3AfUX8usitPBLPAiXr_cERuv9gUn6-Ut2HcYj8SI=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Shontel Brown and Sherrod Brown:_ | | [$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126437/572551684/-1150512723?refcode=EM_F_250928Sherrod_N_TSB_90DO_6_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2QyMGI5ZC1hMzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPO3AfUX8usitPBLPAiXr_cERuv9gUn6-Ut2HcYj8SI=)

name: The Turning Point USA Team

body:

subject: An authoritarian takeover of my hometown
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Portland is a peaceful, vibrant city with no need for federal agents on our streets.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116126579/572552095/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTYzZDU0OS1hNTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3bHPqUTPPVYCo8kTJsCHns2u-AHXiiTl5ukO-eRK4U=&emci=b319728a-a09c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e963d549-a59c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364)

| | Oregonians woke up yesterday to the unwelcome news that Donald Trump has called for a deployment of troops to the City of Portland, with an authorization to use full military force "if necessary." Let's be clear about what this is: Trump is launching a full authoritarian takeover of my hometown in the hopes of provoking conflict. We've seen this play out before, when Trump similarly deployed troops to the city in the summer of 2020. What followed were weeks of excessive use of force by Trump's thugs against Oregonians. Portland is a peaceful, vibrant city with no need for federal agents on our streets. I am in close contact with state and local officials as the situation develops. In the meantime, I urge Oregonians not to fall into Trump's attempt to incite violence. In the meantime, I will do everything in my power to protect the people in our state. More soon, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.

clean_body: Portland is a peaceful, vibrant city with no need for federal agents on our streets. | | | | Oregonians woke up yesterday to the unwelcome news that Donald Trump has called for a deployment of troops to the City of Portland, with an authorization to use full military force "if necessary." Let's be clear about what this is: Trump is launching a full authoritarian takeover of my hometown in the hopes of provoking conflict. We've seen this play out before, when Trump similarly deployed troops to the city in the summer of 2020. What followed were weeks of excessive use of force by Trump's thugs against Oregonians. Portland is a peaceful, vibrant city with no need for federal agents on our streets. I am in close contact with state and local officials as the situation develops. In the meantime, I urge Oregonians not to fall into Trump's attempt to incite violence. In the meantime, I will do everything in my power to protect the people in our state. More soon, Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Tuesday at midnight marks our end-of-quarter deadline.

There’s a number of reasons why we’re [**_asking for your support today_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116127267/572554264/-157209907?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOQResend_250928_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRkNzkyMC1hNjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WIfWG9-oTyTHcaIaqbwy4-KG6HThypvs1N5JG_WcRFk=), but the truth is, it comes down to this:

But as the leading voice in Washington speaking out against the Trump administration, his seat could very well be a top Republican target in next year’s election. Which means we need to be prepared to overcome a barrage of GOP money.

It won’t be easy, considering one of Trump’s billionaire allies could drop a $50 or $100 million super PAC against us in a matter of seconds.

Which brings us back to your donation**today**. Chipping in today, on an email like this one, helps us figure out exactly what kind of resources we have and what we need moving forward.

Peter,

What makes our pro-worker, pro-democracy fight special is how it’s powered by one grassroots contribution at a time. People giving what they can because they believe in a fairer economy and a government that stands up for them.

Seth is fighting to bring down food prices by ending Trump’s tariffs, to protect Social Security without cutting benefits, and to strengthen the rights of workers here in Rhode Island and across the country. These are the priorities that matter, and it takes organizing and outreach to keep them front and center.

Every donation, no matter the size, helps build momentum and keeps this campaign focused on the fights that working people can count on.

**[If you’re able, I hope you’ll add your support today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116127369/572554623/297343010?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250928_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZlNmNhZi1hNjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cL_HoY7XP0J3pO7bvg0Mo5DQX-6eI_Ck9mrWLF1xSGk=)** | | [Contribute Here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116127372/572554625/297343010?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250928_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZlNmNhZi1hNjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cL_HoY7XP0J3pO7bvg0Mo5DQX-6eI_Ck9mrWLF1xSGk=)

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Are we ready?
body:
| | **Peter, we don’t need another politician who will rubber-stamp some outsider’s agenda.**

We need a representative who listens to our communities and stands up for the needs of Southwest Washington.

This seat belongs to us – and I intend to keep it that way. The road to Election Day will be the toughest challenge we’ve faced yet.

The national Republicans and special interests backing my opponent are powerful and relentless, and they’ve got a blank check to defeat me no matter the cost.

[This FEC deadline is the most important one we’ve faced so far, and falling short isn’t an option. If you can, please rush in a donation to make sure we have the resources to fight back. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi, Sorry to reach out on a Sunday. We’ll make this quick so you can get back to your weekend. You can even time us: = We’re still short of our goal and need to raise $6,000 in the next 72 hours. Whether we keep CA-25 blue, flip the House, and reverse course in Washington depends on the resources we build now. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = We’re counting on you, Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. We want you to have one. body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207n64jjv2wjviq8psumhbkb5s6mder94hmtjfdsk0xb3fr988egku2lykourgbj0ve9v1gpu8l4s4dyztr&__stmp=t3bf4s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3c0iyxk21daewih7uig5lym9zxzr4xeduk70ex36tmz79203m6068nodw27wex3uvvwwapg47iq0j840whgfhrzeo08tsdbwe9kft350tdb7lfse151rfvp5vmwsgl51o3u8iyidjt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3c0iyxk21daewih7uig5lym9zxzr4xeduk70ex36tmz79203m6068nodw27wex3uvvwwapg47iq0j840whgfhrzeo08tsdbwe9kft350tdb7lfse151rfvp5vmwsgl51o3u8iyidjt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bf4s&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor:

name: Tim Kaine
subject: What Democrats need to do right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
Derek, this might sound obvious, but winning elections needs to be a top priority for Democrats right now. And we can start right here in Virginia.
This Tuesday, September 30th is the final end-of-quarter filing deadline before Election Day — so for our great candidates running to flip the three Republican-held statewide offices, it’s the most important deadline yet.
Will you split a donation between Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi, and Jay Jones before Tuesday’s major filing deadline? They’re sprinting towards Election Day to win their races, but they need our help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
Here’s why this matters: every dollar they raise by midnight on Tuesday will be reported out publicly for everyone to see — the press, their opponents, the outside groups pouring money into Virginia.
A strong showing will demonstrate the strength of their campaigns, shape the narrative about Democrats’ chances in November, and influence how much attack ad spending they’re likely to face in the final weeks.
Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi ,and Jay Jones are outstanding leaders who will do great things for our Commonwealth, and I’m proud to be doing everything I can to help get them elected.
This election is also our first major opportunity to reject Donald Trump’s extremist policies since his return to office. And make no mistake — his agenda has already hurt Virginia’s economy, driven up costs for working families, and threatened fundamental freedoms.
Together, Abigail, Ghazala, and Jay will bring common-sense leadership back to Richmond — but they need grassroots support to make it happen.
Early voting has already begun, so there’s no time to waste. A surge of support before the September 30th deadline will give these campaigns the momentum they need in the final stretch.
Will you split a donation between Virginia’s statewide Democratic candidates before Tuesday’s filing deadline to help flip VA blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
We can deliver real change for Virginians and send a clear message that extremism will be rejected at the ballot box.
Thank you,
Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. name: Dana Criswell
subject: Can Bitcoin go to Zero
body:
Here's the blunt truth: could Bitcoin go to zero? Bitcoin is the exit ramp--a monetary standard that doesn't care who's in office or what promises get made.

| |

# [Can Bitcoin go to Zero](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=174245976&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MjQ1OTc2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTkwOTE0NTYsImV4cCI6MTc2MTY4MzQ1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oWaXUtJlpJn8HoF4ylBgwL1ILdVnRbSD1ZWM9aPBNfY)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32546ea5-15c8-4962-897b-3bfabf5dd6b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Roman Manshin](https://substack.com/redirect/291ac240-7907-4e4a-86a2-414245aaf2a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/952a23bc-80c3-4bd9-8cfb-f1ffd0b4b609?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Could Bitcoin go to zero?** In the strict, academic sense--sure. Any asset that trades in a free market can be bid down to nothing if everyone walks away at the same time. But in the real world, with real people who use it, build on it, mine it, and hold it, the odds of Bitcoin hitting literal zero are vanishingly small. You'd have to unwind one of the strongest, most distributed, most antifragile networks on earth. That's a tall order.
Think about what "zero" actually requires. It's not a bear market or an ugly headline. It's not a 70% drawdown or some exchange blowing up. We've seen all of that many times. Zero would mean a total collapse in global demand--no miners anywhere, no buyers anywhere, no developers anywhere, and no one left who values a censorship-resistant, non-sovereign form of money. It would mean the people who use Bitcoin to move value across borders under hostile regimes suddenly stop needing that freedom, and the millions who store savings outside of politician-controlled currencies decide--overnight--that political promises are good enough. That's fantasy.
**" But what about a fatal bug or a hacker?"** Bitcoin is open-source and battle-tested. If a serious flaw shows up, the fix process is public and fast. Consensus software has been improved for over a decade by engineers who don't need permission to ship patches. Bitcoin's incentives also protect the network: miners want block rewards to be worth something, holders want sound money to keep working, and businesses want their customers to keep transacting. When incentives align, problems get solved.
**" What about governments banning it?"** Some already tried. The network routed around them. For zero to happen through policy, you'd need coordinated, airtight, long-term enforcement in nearly every country, across every ISP, cloud, home miner, and hardware wallet--forever. Meanwhile, a single pair of people anywhere on earth with internet and electricity can still trade sats. That's the power of permissionless money: it doesn't beg for approval, it just works.
**The "miner death spiral" **is another scary story that falls apart on contact with reality. If miners drop off, difficulty adjusts down, making it easier and cheaper to mine the next block. The system breathes. It doesn't require perfect conditions; it requires time and a couple of honest participants. Bitcoin has both.
There are real risks: savage volatility, long winters where price bleeds and headlines gloat, regulatory whiplash, custody failures, and the small but nonzero chance of a serious consensus bug. If you buy Bitcoin with leverage, park it on a sketchy exchange, or size your position so big you can't sleep, you can create your own personal zero. That's not Bitcoin's fault; that's operator error.
So no, I don't lose sleep over "zero." I worry about something else: people selling their future for comfort today, trusting the same institutions that watered down their savings and then called the dilution a policy success. Bitcoin is the exit ramp--a monetary standard that doesn't care who's in office or what promises get made. If you believe freedom is worth defending, you don't ask whether sound money can go to zero; you ask whether you're ready to hold through the noise and act like a responsible steward of your own wealth.

name: George Latimer
subject: My commitment to NY-16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
I won my first election in 1987, nearly 4 decades later I’m still delivering for folks like you.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=i7%2F1qkHFxpvYs3EADSBGTlNhO9dLmi2GX0GWi4jIpxAXKSl%2FSxpUB4zJV6p3i%2B3mZKLWZ4LPlfPue9mMGH15ek%2B58A9M4doHsVvU%2FjpOttVR%2FglThOwOsmLrNX75oFUNLDPPIuIzOpeSbY05JZT0TB%2F%2Fpaj0kzLt2ymUlMb9gJwRUErBC1Jd%2FK2mbXYHT%2FoAchKg9gG%2FtV4YplMnS4TofVM2otxqGyIXvucQFD166VDyNZaWbJrD6tR8ggFwoMTuhA%2B44cZpbY2xfxBSqNqCLpMJg4rTAwo7tP07QbPi6drGRpTd7ZTjtqQmSUlDeyjhOdDa%2Fv5s%2B0%2FvaY07xQ6r%2FytcPc9EtjjhSro87M1Yvp79HghoPFZj4rYpvj%2FcjzVJS6%2FqLs0lwPfUQgG0x9qcssfJ4gPQUNQFqeKJZLp56DqCaDQEKM0HsUx9RGT1lLuZ)
---
| |
---
Peter, When I first ran for office decades ago, it wasn’t because I wanted headlines or a title. I got into public service because I believe the government should work for everyone — that our job is to solve problems, strengthen communities, and make sure all voices are heard. **That commitment hasn’t changed.** From serving Westchester County to now representing NY-16 in Congress, my motto has always remained the same: **deliver results, not empty rhetoric.** Whether it’s fighting to protect health care, securing resources for our schools, or defending democracy against those who want to silence dissent — I show up because that’s what you deserve. **But the truth is: I can’t do this alone.** Donald Trump and his allies are pouring millions into races across the country, and it’s clear they’ll do whatever it takes to hold onto power — even if it means undermining the Constitution and installing loyalists at federal agencies. If we want to keep fighting back, we need to build the kind of grassroots campaign that proves our strength early and often. **[With our end-of-quarter deadline less than 48 hours away, will you chip in $16 so I can keep working for NY-16?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116127961/572556568/-559829547?amount=16&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_092825_EOQ05_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZhNWQxZTgtYTk5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YLD77lNn7dAc733oSvCV5040i5yKEv2gVWIyF8XHn_U=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: I won my first election in 1987, nearly 4 decades later I’m still delivering for folks like you. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, When I first ran for office decades ago, it wasn’t because I wanted headlines or a title. I got into public service because I believe the government should work for everyone — that our job is to solve problems, strengthen communities, and make sure all voices are heard. That commitment hasn’t changed. From serving Westchester County to now representing NY-16 in Congress, my motto has always remained the same: deliver results, not empty rhetoric. Whether it’s fighting to protect health care, securing resources for our schools, or defending democracy against those who want to silence dissent — I show up because that’s what you deserve. But the truth is: I can’t do this alone. Donald Trump and his allies are pouring millions into races across the country, and it’s clear they’ll do whatever it takes to hold onto power — even if it means undermining the Constitution and installing loyalists at federal agencies. If we want to keep fighting back, we need to build the kind of grassroots campaign that proves our strength early and often. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Peter, for standing with me year after year. George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
---
| | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492

body:
From the Desk of State Representative Katrina Pierson
| | | |
---
| | | _From the Desk of State Representative Katrina Pierson_
**A Message from Representative Pierson**
---
Promises Made. Promises Kept. Despite Democrat walkouts and obstruction, the 89th Texas Legislature’s special sessions produced historic conservative victories. We defended life, advanced liberty, and delivered results for Texas families.
[DONATE TODAY](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas._A/s8ke134accc)
[MERCH STORE](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas._A/s1h3974e6cd)
|
---
**First Special Session (July–Aug 2025)**
[](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.com/click/e695110/VaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9TeEFZNjI0Ykxzbw/SbWFpbF9rYXRyaW5hZm9ydGV4YXNfY29tMjUwOTI4/LbmNsWFJiZjU/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uY2xfYW1wbGlmeSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjUwNjI2LTg5X3JlY2FwJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PW5jbC1OODRZVWJNZVk2Jl9ubGlkPU44NFlVYk1lWTYmX25oaWRzPW5jYTVkSXppakJibHM/gaNmb_A/s3j26e950b3)
_ICYMI — Rep. Pierson’s closing argument on redistricting legislation on the House floor._
**Outcome:** Democrats broke quorum, blocking conservative reforms, but groundwork was laid for passage in the Second Session.
* **HB 1 – Strengthening Disaster Response (STALLED)**
Expanded training for justices of the peace and created mass fatality protocols to improve disaster readiness.
* **HB 2 – Emergency Communication Systems (STALLED)**
Established the Texas Interoperability Council and a grant program to modernize statewide emergency communications.
* **HB 18 – Comptroller Disaster Funding (STALLED)**
Authorized the Comptroller to fund emergency communication infrastructure for local communities.
* **HB 19 – Flood Disaster Plans (STALLED)**
Required flood safety plans for campgrounds, with civil penalties for noncompliance.
* **HB 20 – Fraudulent Charity Prevention (STALLED)**
Created a voluntary certification program to prevent fraudulent charitable solicitations during disasters.
* **HB 5 – Hemp Regulation (STALLED)**
Proposed banning THC in hemp-derived products, created strict licensing standards, and required child-protective packaging.
* **Redistricting (PROCESS BEGAN)**
Rep. Pierson appointed to the House Select Committee on Redistricting; statewide hearings held to begin work on fair, compact maps.
* **Quorum Enforcement (ENACTED)**
Arrest warrants pursued, pay and budgets frozen, and per diem reforms implemented to hold Democrats accountable.

|
---
**Second Special Session (Aug–Sept 2025)**
**Outcome:** Major conservative bills passed and signed into law.
* **HB 7 – Protecting Life & Sovereignty (PASSED)**
Prohibits the manufacture and distribution of abortion-inducing drugs in Texas and empowers citizens to file civil actions against violators. Strengthens Texas’s pro-life stance and shields our laws from out-of-state interference.
* **HB 25 – Pharmacist Freedom & Medical Choice (PASSED)**
Allows pharmacists to dispense ivermectin without a prescription, expanding access to alternative treatments and reinforcing medical freedom.
* **SB 8 – Protecting Women’s Spaces (PASSED)**
Designates public facilities by biological sex, ensuring safety and privacy in restrooms and locker rooms. Includes civil penalties and a private right of action.
* **HB 18 – Election Integrity Enforcement (PASSED)**
Bars legislators from accepting political contributions while absent from session, promoting accountability and ethical governance.
* **HB 1 & SB 1 – Youth Camp Safety (PASSED)**
Mandates emergency plans for youth camps and authorizes penalties for noncompliance — ensuring readiness in flood-prone areas.
* **SB 3 – Outdoor Warning Systems (PASSED)**
Funds siren systems in flash flood zones to improve early warning capabilities.
* **SB 5 – Disaster Relief Funding (PASSED)**
Provides supplemental appropriations for flood recovery and preparedness, delivering critical aid to impacted communities.
* **HB 8 – Accountability & Transparency in Schools (PASSED)**
Revamps the public school accountability system, introduces local performance plans, and enhances assessment tools to better reflect student achievement.
* **HB 4 – Redistricting (PASSED)**
Redraws congressional districts to reflect compactness and political performance, addressing DOJ concerns and ensuring fair representation for Texas voters.
* **SB 11 – Human Trafficking Protections (PASSED)**
Creates an affirmative defense for trafficking victims, ensuring justice and compassion for survivors.
* **SB 16 – Real Property Fraud Prevention (PASSED)**
Establishes new criminal offenses for real estate fraud and theft, protecting homeowners and landowners across Texas.
* **SB 18 – Flood Control Exemptions (PASSED)**
Streamlines permitting for dams and reservoirs used for erosion and floodwater control, supporting rural infrastructure.
* **HB 16 – Omnibus Court Expansion (PASSED)**
Creates a new 503rd District Court for Rockwall County to expand judicial capacity and improve access to justice for local residents.

|
---
**Regular Session Recap – ICYMI**
During the 89th Regular Session, we delivered bold conservative reforms and key victories for Texans:
* **CarePortal Funding Secured** – Extended critical support for churches to care for vulnerable children and families in crisis.
* **Mental Health Reform** – Strengthened privacy protections in behavioral health checks and safeguarded patients in psychiatric care.
* **School Choice & Education Reform** – Created the nation’s largest Education Savings Account program, delivered historic teacher pay raises, and invested in school safety.
* **Border Security** – Over $3 billion for operations and expanded ICE cooperation to enforce immigration laws.
* **Election Integrity** – Citizen-only voting clarified, hand-count audits required, and stronger penalties for fraud.
* **Tax Relief** – Raised homestead and senior exemptions, cut business property taxes.
* **Pro-Life & Pro-Family Values** – Banned taxpayer funding for out-of-state abortions, strengthened parental rights, and promoted family stability.

These victories, combined with the work of the special sessions, show a clear record of **Promises Made, Promises Kept** for Texas families.
|
---
**Honoring Charlie Kirk**
I am deeply saddened and outraged by the senseless act of violence that occurred during Charlie Kirk’s visit to Utah Valley University.
Charlie was a strong conservative leader, founder of a thriving youth organization, loving husband and father, and tireless voice for what he believed was true and right. Most importantly, he loved the Lord.
I’ll always be grateful for his service and support.
Rest in peace, Charlie. Your voice is gone, but your influence lives on through your supporters and beautiful family. My sincere condolences to all who loved you.
America is forever changed.
|
---
Serving HD 33 as your representative continues to be one of my greatest privileges. I deeply value the feedback and input my constituents bring to the table, and your voices help guide the work we do in Austin. Together, we’ve made meaningful progress to protect our values, strengthen our communities, and secure a brighter future for Texas. I look forward to continuing this work with you.
[DONATE TODAY](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas._A/s4m5a2cf4d4)
**** Please contact my office with any questions or feedback:
* **Phone** : (512) 463-0484
* **Email** : District33.Pierson@house.texas.gov

With gratitude,
**Katrina Pierson**
_State Representative_
| | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by Katrina Pierson Campaign

HB 16 – Omnibus Court Expansion (PASSED) Creates a new 503rd District Court for Rockwall County to expand judicial capacity and improve access to justice for local residents. | Regular Session Recap – ICYMI During the 89th Regular Session, we delivered bold conservative reforms and key victories for Texans: CarePortal Funding Secured – Extended critical support for churches to care for vulnerable children and families in crisis. Mental Health Reform – Strengthened privacy protections in behavioral health checks and safeguarded patients in psychiatric care. School Choice & Education Reform – Created the nation’s largest Education Savings Account program, delivered historic teacher pay raises, and invested in school safety. Border Security – Over $3 billion for operations and expanded ICE cooperation to enforce immigration laws. Election Integrity – Citizen-only voting clarified, hand-count audits required, and stronger penalties for fraud. Tax Relief – Raised homestead and senior exemptions, cut business property taxes. Pro-Life & Pro-Family Values – Banned taxpayer funding for out-of-state abortions, strengthened parental rights, and promoted family stability. These victories, combined with the work of the special sessions, show a clear record of Promises Made, Promises Kept for Texas families. | Honoring Charlie Kirk I am deeply saddened and outraged by the senseless act of violence that occurred during Charlie Kirk’s visit to Utah Valley University. Charlie was a strong conservative leader, founder of a thriving youth organization, loving husband and father, and tireless voice for what he believed was true and right. Most importantly, he loved the Lord. I’ll always be grateful for his service and support. Rest in peace, Charlie. Your voice is gone, but your influence lives on through your supporters and beautiful family. My sincere condolences to all who loved you. America is forever changed. | Serving HD 33 as your representative continues to be one of my greatest privileges. I deeply value the feedback and input my constituents bring to the table, and your voices help guide the work we do in Austin. Together, we’ve made meaningful progress to protect our values, strengthen our communities, and secure a brighter future for Texas. I look forward to continuing this work with you. ** Please contact my office with any questions or feedback: Phone : (512) 463-0484 Email : District33.Pierson@house.texas.gov With gratitude, Katrina Pierson** State Representative | | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by Katrina Pierson Campaign | |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Friend, I’m worried.
body:
| | | | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
Friend,
**I’m worried.**
I’m facing one of the most critical End-of-Quarter deadlines of the year and we're still thousands short of our goal.
We have already seen how far the Democrats and their radical allies are willing to go to silence our fight to put America First.
**But NOW, it’s escalated like never before.**
The radical Left has not only painted a big red target on my back, but YOURS.
And thanks to their constant wave of attacks, and even threats, they’ve successfully depleted a large portion of my campaign’s defense funds needed to continue fighting back. **__** **_Their attacks will NEVER stop._****__[And I need your help before it’s too late](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_._**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
[RUSH IN AN EMERGENCY DONATION](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
Your support will give my campaign the resources to hire staff and security, make videos, fend off their attacks and continue standing up in Congress to take our country back.
**_But right now, I’m worried my campaign won’t reach our End-of-Quarter goal._**
I know times are tough. So I’m only asking if you can absolutely afford to chip in at this time.
**_[If $15 or more is too much, even a gift of $10 or just $5 goes a long way](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_****.**
I’m so thankful to Patriots like you for having my back.
None of this would be possible without you.
I’ll be in touch.
_Your fellow patriot_
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

# Last Call for Support Ends Sept. 30th
Dear Friends and Supporters,

Earlier this month, I had a great time marching with my volunteers at the Labor Day parade in Milford, NH, in front of thousands.

It was very exciting! Team Lily dominated. Our grassroots turnout doubled Rep. Maggie Goodlander's and the Milford Democrats' supporters combined.

You can watch our short video on my YouTube channel with my favorite song: God Bless USA!

[Milford Parade Video](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=e02ce62316&e=c338950e03)

Our campaign in NH02 is gaining strength every day, but to be honest, we are still behind in fundraising.

In the 1st quarter of this year Maggie has raised over $1 million, a majority coming from large donors and PACs.

Team Lily is doing well, though, raising $253K in donations of less than $50 from like-minded folks from across the country.

Please help me gain ground and prove that it's THE PEOPLE, not lobbyists or elitists, that win elections.

My 3rd quarter fundraising deadline is just 48 hrs away.

If you are willing & able, can you help us finish strong?

[Donate Here](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=e2427056bb&e=c338950e03)

With gratitude,

name: Team Mazie
subject: Here’s the deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Here’s the deal, Peter: Our FEC fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and right now we’re a little short of our goal. We can imagine that the last thing you want to be doing right now is reading a political email, so we’ll keep this short. Mazie is fighting every day to hold Donald Trump accountable, protect working families in Hawaii and across the country from the GOP’s pro-billionaire agenda, and make life more affordable. She’s also laser-focused on helping Democrats win back the Senate next year so we can have a majority that puts everyday people, not billionaires, first. Your support helps her do _both._ **Our movement to hold the Trump administration accountable, deliver for working families, and flip the Senate blue is made stronger by your support.** **[By reaching Tuesday’s FEC goal, we’ll show Donald Trump and Republicans that we have the resources to stand up to them and fight back. Peter,

I said it plainly: Europe has fallen. The Commonwealth has fallen. The Royal Family are globalists.

Now they want _America_ to kneel next — through immigration, Islam, LGBTQ ideology, and globalist control.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=225d6da5cfbc4153bf5f4a676716b220&_e=DR58Iz5HqInQ-MsqSq6xaQcTfFi5A_mMYnmZkEeZZvWsVG1rviHVn1kTr1GaF8JikVTzAFtAiF54X3OZiDZnxepDIypjEDMsDGPCIJ9mjxPuc1QeK8arzcl_Qlvhpk_ChjV5Be6UC483CODTd-95bHS0TNJEYDsTGCgE1BOAaFqOQzCNIAc6DzQFqAJFROP3_o2r992ivSaJFemjdo57dU8uvvfJULkqUUcSNe2mdDq55an5lA7JScjm0wwVKuVFj6m9lLrDzAEiTipnxpjltfrDJaNQW2VY-4NvhY5hL21y_xS37W5aU0eqhCb3Jl52RrHNx6GsXrI4Jcmd8vV7cF1XtT1qcx6pzL7apJBhjmB0mUk5Q1MmexO9Z3Is6qcppxCJ5lsjnxkL-R9nqGfxgfbdVuNr3JMi6HomsaLvsbcs3GW8hsCHGOHoRlxYHNQbU2uDF7wdwbmlLRWAW6Lzkie3JydT5UU0SKVIwUYQqoxfPVmDhbshCSQ3o7cHBBiglIwC2nPG051VvR1KJmgpz4GQbxTM4DaPk5fqcI_8nLFPwsY3ilavvvlyLtYQY2kE)

This Pope is just another puppet pushing open borders.

When Muslims and LGBTQ activists start working _together_ , it’s not religion - it’s politics. **And the Democrats are too scared to call it what it is: a movement to destabilize America.**

This isn’t left vs. right anymore; [**it's a spiritual war.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=225d6da5cfbc4153bf5f4a676716b220&_e=DR58Iz5HqInQ-MsqSq6xaQcTfFi5A_mMYnmZkEeZZvWsVG1rviHVn1kTr1GaF8JikVTzAFtAiF54X3OZiDZnxepDIypjEDMsDGPCIJ9mjxPuc1QeK8arzcl_Qlvhpk_CjuqpueOCcmJp6_fEVu-IHFkxiKcAPV4Bm5iZ0k5WbylwSyz5eL953U4SJzZWdLWrdi_-Hht8iuNPos2n-ZZNRanKj5aXOL6mkYvL5crbZ6EhCAf2rbZ0mp0qE42Ryk_8O8HSpvwBsrcOuKSNjBHcWp3YMskHaub3cKiYjbfJ20sh--yvuVnGrJgnmMI6J9ICDQuDcbD8EgZ4LXs8HQen8H5zwuYLdYuB99AwWIkh-rqZiXU1cbvtcL80DzN6aXXSqNDSTEfEHeBgf9lzfyzAWU_7oP3l_YW9FkpQw2eoSieQxLlRjXCvvT49on-L3qL5fsQGkGdh1fcEiKqSYptzkBNdNIzmHw7AHG-bb1geDIAGkSn2-ZaLF_sgc9ClUogQilRQjkp1ub-rQiAvpnTmDsLsh7KitQenR7TBWzMv8tc%3D)

**So I’m calling on:

* Christians who are tired of being silent
* Parents who are watching their kids grow up in madness

**
**Stand up. Right now.**

[**Rush $10, $20.26, $50, or whatever you can.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=225d6da5cfbc4153bf5f4a676716b220&_e=DR58Iz5HqInQ-MsqSq6xaQcTfFi5A_mMYnmZkEeZZvWsVG1rviHVn1kTr1GaF8JikVTzAFtAiF54X3OZiDZnxepDIypjEDMsDGPCIJ9mjxPuc1QeK8arzcl_Qlvhpk_CjuqpueOCcmJp6_fEVu-IHFkxiKcAPV4Bm5iZ0k5Wbymob77vME2mJIXseUKrOO1vlgBlM-Nk9FMYtZ67xzzGHhCtapXnWncS3rjQWE79Zfy4JW8EW-_Vz3dvdgr6jb4i3M7ihyIRevCB1_S0kZgOpdY_pQjvGtA8YKCbeCgEoAuT4xesLK4-rOSdLESayWHFFMxy6eW0pTYiQ0BPnx5CQhGl0ufj6CgPEddaKHdbrGea9zg_LYL2aRPeZSQ4f8Wt1XO9g6mHoKuLbu1BP929DbmRRuzlwaYToflvh309EgOW31BPaXLbpIidyoR1kFaLT2GkSOrWg51pexRrPiw4wLuQUjy6MtR_FJB7nqwY1uMcvHJ7ZXhvZRSJUbXcqA56z2SYBc0BJf4AaGxFoM15r0nF1H26r4cvlPaR6jo7pXI%3D)

We can’t sit this out.

We can’t pray it away.

[**We need _fighters_ in office who will speak the truth and defend the country.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=225d6da5cfbc4153bf5f4a676716b220&_e=DR58Iz5HqInQ-MsqSq6xaQcTfFi5A_mMYnmZkEeZZvWsVG1rviHVn1kTr1GaF8JikVTzAFtAiF54X3OZiDZnxepDIypjEDMsDGPCIJ9mjxPuc1QeK8arzcl_Qlvhpk_CjuqpueOCcmJp6_fEVu-IHFkxiKcAPV4Bm5iZ0k5Wbynq4PQK5A1OBi7rSf5pGQFgTKCxI2Q5uqqwENxSKGuY09MYBqT71Mv53EfUCOXtIdN4jkIeccfUimsESp75MAcZWyprILcOs298vHETPFw83DHaJA_hg5_fc8pNpKeLSal1PNd3_2ygXTy9SzwRGvoVNCcOq7B-ltRwsT7WlaAz3jBxp4G4Yyk0WbiJGPlMYLiRR74Bsw6cK04pkJgej7GCWt-_UScfnCdfxKhnLQglINLymTzwF0peO0-FLXECr2UEoqGExEQ_d_kiZPJKOTyfGw6kSOU0ZthbHlfnPZsLM0mpQifyu2r2Dipel9k3kD-SNHYVsOinEzKGddyve4_1bwN0STdRVHv84bmpc5EvnM-_wKRDl8v_PEHVNp8LcMA%3D)

Because if we don’t?

Candidate for U.S. Senate – MN 2026

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

Yesterday, Sharice told you about Club For Growth, the Donald Trump allied super PAC trying to gerrymander Sharice out of office

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116128423/572557943/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg3ZjMxYy1hZDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W9cMrG8f2bpVFi2JjU76z_RhhQu11Vq44QsZOQjasME=) Yesterday, Sharice told you about Club For Growth, the Donald Trump allied super PAC trying to gerrymander Sharice out of office. **Now, we have the details — and we wanted you to be the first to know:** Club For Growth has pledged to spend at least **$1 MILLION** to pressure Kansas Republicans to gerrymander Sharice Davids out of office. name: Laura Gillen
subject: what if I told you ⁉️
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
I know you probably don’t want to see another political email asking for money, but...

|
---
| Peter,

I know you probably don’t want to see another political email asking for money, but... _What if I told you**a Republican opponent has officially filed to run against me** in this district?

What if I told you **Republicans just launched another ad campaign attacking me** because they are desperate to flip this seat?

What if I told you **Trump is amassing an unprecedented war chest** to keep Republicans in control of Congress?

What if I told you our FEC fundraising deadline is just three days away and **we’re falling dramatically short** of our grassroots goal?_
---
| | | [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116128729/572559398/800699251?&refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-09-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzZiNjkxNy1hZTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9R_tax4r0EudZ7GZEUApG9r1rqbSu9XvhqxUGjSMppk=)
---
This is the only toss-up seat in New York and one of the most competitive in the country. If we lose it, we are all but guaranteed to lose our shot at taking back the House.

Every day we see the chaos Republicans are unleashing. Winning the House won’t fix everything. However, it will give us the power to block the next wave of cruelty, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption and finally go on the offensive again.

[_**That’s why I’m asking for your support. We need to hit our FEC goal before the deadline to show everyone that we can stand toe to toe against the record-breaking Republican fundraising numbers.
