name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: New Hampshire is a make-or-break Senate race for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we lose this race, we lose the fight.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_2_warren?refcode=em20250928-2574&amount=5&refcode2=2574_582294_djyylF&akid=2574%2E582294%2EdjyylF)
Right now Republicans in the Senate are doing the bidding of giant corporations, Big Oil, and Trump’s extremist MAGA base.
If we’re going to take back the majority and put our government on the side of working people, _we can’t lose a single Democratic-held seat._
**That’s why Chris Pappas’s race is so critical.**
Political analysts have already ranked it as _one of the most likely seats to flip red_ next year. And his Republican opponent, Scott Brown, is lining up to take it.
**Simply put: The path to a Democratic Senate majority runs straight through New Hampshire.**
Chris is a lifelong Granite Stater who’s delivered for New Hampshire families year after year: taking on Big Pharma so seniors can afford their prescriptions, defending reproductive freedom, protecting voting rights, and standing up for our veterans. He’s taken on powerful special interests before — and won.
**Special interests will spend whatever it takes to buy this seat for Republicans. The only way we beat them is with people-powered organizing — door by door, donation by donation. With the end-of-quarter deadline approaching quickly, we can’t afford to slow down now. We need to show the GOP and the pundits that we’re in this race to win it.**
[**Can you make a $5 donation today to help Chris Pappas defend New Hampshire’s Senate seat and keep the path to a Democratic majority alive?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_2_warren?refcode=em20250928-2574&amount=5&refcode2=2574_582294_djyylF&akid=2574%2E582294%2EdjyylF)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250928_2_warren?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-2574&refcode2=2574_582294_djyylF&akid=2574%2E582294%2EdjyylF)**
I’m in this fight because I believe in what’s possible when Washington works for working families, not for the rich and powerful. Let’s fight together — and win.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20250928-2&t=1&refcode2=2574_582294_djyylF&akid=2574%2E582294%2EdjyylF)**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: From 30 attorneys down to 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
When Trump took office, the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints.
There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. This is just another step on the MAGA plan to dismantle our democracy and leave them in control.
The threat is clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation and Trump attacks the way we vote. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote and more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092825_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092825_2&amount=25]
This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :
" Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "
This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month.
It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months.
Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092825_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092825_2&amount=35]
The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote.
But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.
You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever.

clean_body: When Trump took office, the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints. There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. This is just another step on the MAGA plan to dismantle our democracy and leave them in control. The threat is clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation and Trump attacks the way we vote. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote and more >> [] Voter Action Project [] The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [] This speaks for itself, folks. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. Friend,
We have to level with you: This is it.
In just 72 hours, we’ll hit the first, last, and ONLY public End of Quarter Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline during the Proposition 50 special election . Once our filing is posted, Republicans, the media, and Donald Trump himself will leaf through our paperwork to see whether Democrats are rising to the challenge — or faltering.
Here’s the truth : Proposition 50 is our firewall. If it passes, voters decide who controls Congress. If it fails, Trump and MAGA Republicans’ gerrymandering scheme could hand them power before next year’s midterm elections even begin.
That’s why we cannot afford to fall short. Unless we raise another $11,598 before this deadline, we’ll be forced to scale back canvassing and literature distribution. That means undecided voters could only see Trump’s dark money ads. Will you rush a donation of $ or more now to show we’re ready to fight back and defend Prop 50? 🚪 Every door we can’t knock is another voter who might only hear Trump’s lies.
📣 Every community event we don’t attend is another neighborhood left vulnerable to GOP misinformation.
📱 Every single phone call we don’t make is a voter who doesn’t know about the special election.
🚨 Every single dollar we don’t raise before the public FEC Filing Deadline in 72 hours makes Trump’s scheme more likely to succeed.
Donald Trump is betting we’ll falter. Let’s prove him wrong.
We know so many of you have already generously given. But will you chip in one more time tonight to defend Prop 50 and stop Trump’s election rigging plan in its tracks? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]

Liberals are betting a Hollywood-backed celebrity can STEAL this seat, flip Texas Blue, and destroy President Trump’s agenda.

name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: Hi, checking in again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P
body:
Do I have your best contact?| | | __Click here if you wish to unsubscribe__
---
Dear Peter, >From the bottom of my heart, I'd like to thank you for the honor and privilege of serving as your lieutenant governor for the people of our great state. Public service means everything to me. I LOVE traveling our state and hearing directly from Alaskans like you, absorbing your struggles and dreams alike. _It's the stories of hard work, growth, and grit that can only be found right here in Alaska that keep me going!_ **Alaska's greatness is worth fighting to preserve for future generations.** As a grandmother of 11, that mission is personal to me. I've always been sincere and direct with you, and you know I will never feed you cheap poll-tested lines that say a lot but mean nothing. _You are smarter than that._ For now, let me say this -**I hear you.** **_[Please take a moment to ensure I have the most up-to-date and direct information for you in my contacts.](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=7a0de04ff46a43c0937ac571b47a803e&_e=C3EBC3xOCSGBI4xpYOvmR85Juc3W1txWXtbWsBh3G3xZSdwRWETMeEGo2GfuQddmxkGQBjHt8A1BB0fVpSEmBTHyN-e0Yg-1xKNprRxea_PDvkoURZl9zin7F84F_dACw8pXwnGOPstqxbu3700T7KcuCTC7QFqWifz9iIGTYTxx0S-aQsr9m5ZE-Ab4_VEHd8aHg_3DJ5i675ty67XRBEWXatRgIRMJ7P3Kgjw5IKhkj6fVgnFehWD1r7WHurvv_KZQQuO5pobnUlaDi_0RwJeYMO1TU9mt_JV_UrJemUSkyYtbuC-2SYj_P5bYkNSqNIelCsfNPjP20Ti9tan3-w%3D%3D)_** Over the coming months, I would like you to be among the first to receive important updates on the issues that matter most—and some exciting announcements, too! _North to the Future._

# [District Round‐up 9.28.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F09%2F28%2Fdistrict-round-up-9-28-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=f072724ab68d8249744050e939f67f02&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on September 28, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=7975595c8457a2e25391bb56afb34b31379662bcd0be1af596ff7b8e5c628a24&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5188&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a9f0b4f8b87c5d7288b6712beef6460f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=23a7de53cab58ab9c9fd14ade114ae17)
As our Democracy becomes increasingly imperiled by President Trump like by his stationing the National Guard in Portland against the advice and wishes of the state and local government there, or using the power of the presidency to prosecute his political foes starting with James Comey, the collective POWER of the PEOPLE rises.
We saw that power's effectiveness this past week when Jimmy Kimmel returned to the airwaves despite Disney suspending his show the previous week at Trump's behest over Kimmel's criticism of Trump.
With the targeted actions of canceling subscriptions to the Disney and Hulu channels, cancelling vacations at Disney World, Disneyland, and on Disney cruise ships, as well as halting purchases from the Disney company, the PEOPLE powerfully communicated their righteous anger with Disney for bending the knee to the US President who trampled the First Amendment Right of Free Speech by demanding that the company take Kimmel off of the air.
After losing billions of dollars and thousands of customers the Disney corporation caved and reinstated Kimmel's show.
In less than one week.
Of course, it's easier to target one particular company rather than an entire government run by a madman and his bootlickers, but when the goal is _s_ pecific, measurable, achievable, relevant, and time-bound (SMART), tens of thousands of people can take that action and make a positive difference.
Imagine what the collective POWER of THE PEOPLE can do next.
By supporting candidates like me, Beth Farnham, who will hold accountable the cruel and corrupt officials of this administration, we can fight the rising cost of living, institute universal healthcare, reinstate lost food assistance, create more jobs, raise the federal minimum wage to a real living wage, rely less on fossil fuels and more on alternative forms of energy, enshrine into federal law our reproductive freedom and gun safety, re-establish trust with our greatest allies, and strengthen national security.
In short, we can make better lives for Everyday Americans so that we don't simply exist but we THRIVE.
Together, we'll do great things, so tell your friends and family to [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e9c1fc39dff2d610e90568de7de7e89e5a4bb8c418e61b9c1092aa69cb54f974&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5188&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1baf9d66dbf1ab630ae6a5947a4f2c47&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=23a7de53cab58ab9c9fd14ade114ae17)!
On Sunday, at the Adams County Heritage Festival hosted by the Interfaith Center for Peace and Justice Gettysburg/Adams County, I had a good conversation with a veteran who wanted to hear my views knowing full well that we might not agree on everything.
Though he came in with his strong views about the "unborn" as he termed them, he politely listened as I spoke about the rights of all Americans, including women, to have agency over our own bodies, that no legislator should come between the decision a living, breathing woman makes with her healthcare professionals, and that the draconian anti-abortion laws have resulted in the preventable deaths of mothers.
Rates of pregnancy-linked sepsis and deaths grow in Texas | The Texas Tribune [https://share.google/4hSToMTrfLuQMX8Y9](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=a83feebfeede8e1da771aa5125f02bcb0bab16313d7ea3c5e7608ca57503cfb4&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5188&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b4a690509877b23991e3d2c6309ef091&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFyZS5nb29nbGUvNGhTVG9NVHJmTHVRTVg4WTk/ZmJjbGlkPUl3WlhoMGJnTmhaVzBDTVRBQVluSnBaQkV4U2tkSVIyMHdkazh6YUVkV01UaHVSd0VlSmE2aHlsYmNlbGZRMlVQU1pUQUxXc3JFdTA3QkVVNDQxT1N4V19pcnRWYTVZZFc5SXQ1UWx3WWlNVElfYWVtX25Sdk8yR0lWZ1BXdERRMU5maXNiRHc&email_id=23a7de53cab58ab9c9fd14ade114ae17)
Moreover, he liked that I said we should have fewer abortions and did not argue when I explained that the way we get there is through comprehensive, science -based, and LGBTQ+ inclusive sex education.
Pennsylvania must remove the crisis pregnancy centers from teaching their unvetted "education" to public school students and leave the sexuality instruction in the hands of public school teachers certified in secondary health education.
While abstinence is important to be taught, so must condoms and birth control because the key to reduce d numbers of abortions is preventing unwanted pregnancies in the first place. And the people to do this are the certified teachers we trust, not church people wearing scrubs with a religious agenda, or trying to profit from church donations by claiming to have "saved babies."
To read about the unscientific program I worked to remove from public schools, please feel free to read through my slide presentation below.
[https://docs.google.com/.../1GKPh7XtoFeaYJPPQUrfy.../edit...](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=480bab148ca9dde12b9652ecb5acd98bdf7f8441d989f2a1eaa73b0aee4b4003&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5188&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=c7c2f25635f58aa775d9220c85100cde&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vLi4uLzFHS1BoN1h0b0ZlYVlKUFBRVXJmeS4uLi9lZGl0Li4u&email_id=23a7de53cab58ab9c9fd14ade114ae17)
And many thanks also to my amazing team of volunteers - Jack, Christina, and Harriet. You did terrific work, including taking these pictures!
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=222db7bfa40fb28a5066a305e941da2ea315d0dd1d5c82e8949542f27321fe33&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5188&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1c296a8997a42f82d3e9df5eb36698c5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=23a7de53cab58ab9c9fd14ade114ae17) !
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

Criss-cros... | or | | | or ---|---|--- | | By Elizabeth Farnham on September 28, 2025 ---|--- Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: As our Democracy becomes increasingly imperiled by President Trump like by his stationing the National Guard in Portland against the advice and wishes of the state and local government there, or using the power of the presidency to prosecute his political foes starting with James Comey, the collective POWER of the PEOPLE rises. We saw that power's effectiveness this past week when Jimmy Kimmel returned to the airwaves despite Disney suspending his show the previous week at Trump's behest over Kimmel's criticism of Trump. With the targeted actions of canceling subscriptions to the Disney and Hulu channels, cancelling vacations at Disney World, Disneyland, and on Disney cruise ships, as well as halting purchases from the Disney company, the PEOPLE powerfully communicated their righteous anger with Disney for bending the knee to the US President who trampled the First Amendment Right of Free Speech by demanding that the company take Kimmel off of the air. Since we first reached out, RFK Jr. has sunk even lower, pushing Donald Trump to _spread dangerous lies that Tylenol isn't safe for pregnant women._ **This reckless rhetoric isn’t just absurd, it fuels distrust in science and medicine, putting millions of American families at risk. ** Grassroots activists across the country are speaking out, but we need to turn up the pressure. **RFK Jr. cannot be allowed to remain in this role.** [**_So please, will you add your name now to demand Robert F. Kennedy Jr. resign immediately? We need 400 people in your area to sign on by midnight and show that lies and conspiracy theories have no place in America’s health system._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129734/572562364/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129735/572562365/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
Look, Peter, Robert F. Kennedy Jr has been a DISASTER as Secretary of Health and Human Services.

He's undermined vaccines, fired some of the brightest minds at the CDC, and gutted funding for scientific research like childhood cancer.

His rhetoric is dangerous – **_and even Republican Senators agree._**

That's why we've drafted a letter, demanding he resign immediately.

[**_We need a surge of activists to add their names so he sees just how unpopular his far-right, anti-science agenda is. Please, will you read the letter and then add your name to stop RFK Jr once and for all??_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129736/572562366/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560)
[Sign the letter now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129737/572562367/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560)

Dear RFK Jr,

You are despicable.

In just 8 short months in your role as Secretary of Health and Human Services – which you're completely unqualified for – **you've undermined science in dangerous ways.**

_Because of you, today's kindergartners are the least vaccinated in DECADES.

And because of you, funding for issues like childhood cancer, mental health, and autism research have all been decimated._

**You are reprehensible. You peddle conspiracy theories while having ZERO scientific background or knowledge. You're sowing seeds of doubt in the smartest doctors in the world – all because of your baseless beliefs.**

And you deserve to be fired.

[**_I'm adding my name to the thousands of outraged activists who are demanding your resignation. Our country will be better off when you are gone._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129738/572562368/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129739/572562369/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560) | [Sign the letter now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129740/572562370/1401298739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzU3N2VmNmItYjI5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=repHmODSUN_Nqhh_84iDrnVCG5lV8G23tZn8ytyhcFM=&emci=3038eecd-f79a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c577ef6b-b29c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26651560)

clean_body: | Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw our urgent letter demanding that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. resign IMMEDIATELY. Since we first reached out, RFK Jr. has sunk even lower, pushing Donald Trump to spread dangerous lies that Tylenol isn't safe for pregnant women. This reckless rhetoric isn’t just absurd, it fuels distrust in science and medicine, putting millions of American families at risk. Grassroots activists across the country are speaking out, but we need to turn up the pressure. RFK Jr. cannot be allowed to remain in this role. | \---------- Forwarded message --------- Look, Peter, Robert F. Kennedy Jr has been a DISASTER as Secretary of Health and Human Services. He's undermined vaccines, fired some of the brightest minds at the CDC, and gutted funding for scientific research like childhood cancer. His rhetoric is dangerous – and even Republican Senators agree. That's why we've drafted a letter, demanding he resign immediately. Dear RFK Jr, You are despicable. In just 8 short months in your role as Secretary of Health and Human Services – which you're completely unqualified for – you've undermined science in dangerous ways. Because of you, today's kindergartners are the least vaccinated in DECADES. And because of you, funding for issues like childhood cancer, mental health, and autism research have all been decimated. You are reprehensible. You peddle conspiracy theories while having ZERO scientific background or knowledge. You're sowing seeds of doubt in the smartest doctors in the world – all because of your baseless beliefs. And you deserve to be fired. | Please sign on ASAP, Think Big America | | Think Big America is a social welfare organization that is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. | mailto:info@thinkbigamerica.com Paid for by Think Big America

body:
This is why I’m counting on your support. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129987/572563217/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTdjYWVlZi1iNDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPHpzvFo5atvVhVcu9Y2yUSw3e1OF5lcESJvFmqXFd0=&emci=e870a6c8-f39a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4e7caeef-b49c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338)

Peter — In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**chip in just $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129988/572563224/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250928_eoq4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250928_eoq4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4e7caeef-b49c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTdjYWVlZi1iNDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPHpzvFo5atvVhVcu9Y2yUSw3e1OF5lcESJvFmqXFd0=) before our critical end-of-quarter deadline, but first I want to let you know why I’m counting on your support.

Over the past month, Speaker Mike Johsnon and MAGA Republicans in the House have led us straight towards a complete government shutdown, our president has called for the Attorney General to go after his political opponents, and we’ve seen attacks on our free speech I never imagined could happen in my lifetime. These actions have shown just how important it is for us to take back the House in 2026.

Republicans are threatening our democracy to ensure they keep hold of their power. But they forget that our democracy thrives because people just like you participate—whether it’s by reading these emails, donating your hard-earned dollars to a campaign, or just talking with your friends about the needs of your communities. That’s why we must stay engaged and motivated for change all the way through Election Day.

Republicans only have a three-seat majority. We can—and must—retire Mike Johnson from the speakership next year, but to do it, we need to keep critical battleground districts like WA-08 blue.

Winning in a purple district like ours is never easy. I already have a Republican challenger, and national Republicans will be waiting to see if we falter in our strength at any point. We can’t afford to miss any fundraising goal we set.

While a $5 donation may not sound like much, this campaign relies on thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in what they can, when they can. Your support will go a long way towards helping us win this district and the House majority next year.

[**Before our end-of-quarter deadline hits, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help us reach our critical fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116129990/572563225/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250928_eoq4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250928_eoq4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4e7caeef-b49c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTdjYWVlZi1iNDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPHpzvFo5atvVhVcu9Y2yUSw3e1OF5lcESJvFmqXFd0=) clean_body: This is why I’m counting on your support. Peter — In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = before our critical end-of-quarter deadline, but first I want to let you know why I’m counting on your support. Over the past month, Speaker Mike Johsnon and MAGA Republicans in the House have led us straight towards a complete government shutdown, our president has called for the Attorney General to go after his political opponents, and we’ve seen attacks on our free speech I never imagined could happen in my lifetime. These actions have shown just how important it is for us to take back the House in 2026. Republicans are threatening our democracy to ensure they keep hold of their power. But they forget that our democracy thrives because people just like you participate—whether it’s by reading these emails, donating your hard-earned dollars to a campaign, or just talking with your friends about the needs of your communities. That’s why we must stay engaged and motivated for change all the way through Election Day. Republicans only have a three-seat majority. We can—and must—retire Mike Johnson from the speakership next year, but to do it, we need to keep critical battleground districts like WA-08 blue. name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: FWD: Help Me PROTECT President Trump!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U
body:
Fellow Patriot,

I am forwarding you the email below again because the assassination of Charlie Kirk has made its message more urgent than ever.

What happened this week was not just the loss of a husband, father, and conservative leader -- it was a stark reminder of how dangerous this moment is for public figures who speak their mind on controversial issues.

_All of us remember the close call President Trump had last year. We cannot and must not allow the same failures that nearly cost Trump his life in Butler, Pennsylvania to be repeated._

That’s why I am asking you to take a few moments to carefully read the email below.

_It lays out exactly what went wrong with the Secret Service, what my investigation uncovered, and why we cannot let complacency take hold in Washington._

The tragic death of Charlie Kirk only underscores how high the stakes are -- and how little room there is for error.

**[Please, Fellow Patriot, read the email below with fresh eyes, and then stand with me by adding your support.](http://trk.randpaul.info/?xtl=14qh5ey3i4t89rooxztfubx2vs1dvwu9b2eu7q6dl03yzdk0lkomm1u2cyu9ecj0bmvznii62o67tunn3swvmu2ty0q5u3s97be0b5vv0lswt4e3odbdeddmq7p3a7oqo91my83p1fh3v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bjmx&__onlt=h)**

Together, we must demand accountability, protect President Trump, and ensure that this never happens again.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

U.S. Senator (R-KY)

* * *

**\---------- Forwarded message ----------**
From: Senator Rand Paul
Subject: Help Me PROTECT President Trump!!! Fellow Patriot,

_We cannot let something bad happen to President Trump._

After his life was almost taken from him last year in Butler, Pennsylvania, I am demanding massive changes to the Secret Service...so that it never happens again!

There must be accountability for our government’s failure to protect the President and those attending the rally on July 13, 2024.

_It cost the life of a devoted husband and father in the audience, and it almost cost the life of Donald Trump himself._

A few weeks later, another armed assailant came within a few hundred yards of Donald Trump as he played golf with friends.

The American people have demanded answers, and the victims of July 13th deserve them.

_As Chairman of the Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee, the chief oversight committee of the United States Senate, I have thoroughly investigated the scandalous mistakes that were made before, during, and after the attempted assassination of President Trump._

If not for a tilt of his head, President Trump may not have survived the failures of those tasked with protecting him.

This must be a wakeup call for our country’s top protective agency and how it safeguards our leaders.

**[Fellow Patriot, will you please sign my petition to Sean Curran, the Director of the Secret Service, urging him to hold the agency accountable and keep President Trump safe from harm?](http://trk.randpaul.info/?xtl=14qh5ey3i4t89rooxztfubx2vs1dvwu9b2eu7q6dl03yzdk0lkomm1u2cyu9ecj0bmvznii62o67tunn3swvmu2ty0q5u3s97be0b5vv0lswt4e3odbdeddmq7p3a7oqo91my83p1fh3v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bjmx&__onlt=h)**

This wasn't just a simple mistake or a lapse in judgment by an individual Secret Service agent.

_This was a systemic failure—a top-to-bottom breakdown that allowed a single gunman, deemed by law enforcement as suspicious, to roam free for nearly 45 minutes, eventually gaining access to a clear line-of-sight on President Trump._

It nearly altered the course of world history, like what happened when John F. Kennedy was assassinated.

Then, shockingly, another shooter just weeks later infiltrated the woods right by the golf course on which President Trump was playing.

_But somehow not one person from the Secret Service has been fired for these failures._

Six employees were subject to disciplinary action, but two of these individuals actually received lighter punishment than recommended.

In fact, the Secret Service tried to hide its weak disciplinary actions from my investigation!

_Does this sound like an agency that is urgently trying to rectify its mistakes and learn its lessons so that this never happens again?_

Fellow Patriot, if the Secret Service won’t learn its lesson from last year’s tragedy in Butler, then Congress must force the Secret Service to act.

That is why I have released this report – because nothing will change unless Americans learn the truth.

But many people in Congress are still complacent and refusing to act.

_Congress has authority over the Secret Service and must do whatever it takes to make sure those who failed in their responsibilities are relieved of their duties and replaced by people who are competent._

**[Fellow Patriot, will you please sign my petition to Sean Curran, the Director of the Secret Service, urging him to hold the agency accountable and keep President Trump safe from harm?](http://trk.randpaul.info/?xtl=14qh5ey3i4t89rooxztfubx2vs1dvwu9b2eu7q6dl03yzdk0lkomm1u2cyu9ecj0bmvznii62o67tunn3swvmu2ty0q5u3s97be0b5vv0lswt4e3odbdeddmq7p3a7oqo91my83p1fh3v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bjmx&__onlt=h)**

In Liberty,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY)

P.S. Keeping President Trump safe should be the utmost priority for the Secret Service.

But even after last year’s near-assassination in Butler, Pennsylvania, little has been done to correct mistakes.

That's why, as Chairman of the Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee, I have released a report detailing the catastrophic failures from that fateful day.

I intend to continue exposing the failures of the Secret Service. But I need your immediate support.

_**[Will you please sign my petition to Sean Curran, the Director of the Secret Service, urging him to hold the agency accountable and keep President Trump safe from harm?](http://trk.randpaul.info/?xtl=14qh5ey3i4t89rooxztfubx2vs1dvwu9b2eu7q6dl03yzdk0lkomm1u2cyu9ecj0bmvznii62o67tunn3swvmu2ty0q5u3s97be0b5vv0lswt4e3odbdeddmq7p3a7oqo91my83p1fh3v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3bjmx&__onlt=h)**_

**_PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U.S. SENATE_**
* * *

clean_body: | = | Hi Peter, We’ll cut right to it – 3 of our Blue Dog members are now rated “Toss-Ups” by the Cook Political Report. That means these races (CA-13, ME-02, and WA-03) are dead-even and they will decide which party controls Congress. If we don’t protect these toss-up seats, we can’t take back the Speaker’s gavel. It’s that simple. = = Here’s why your donation matters right now: Millions in dark GOP super PAC money is pouring into these districts. The polls are razor-thin. These races will be decided by a handful of votes. Our end-of-quarter deadline is Tuesday at midnight. We need to raise $10,000 to show we’re ready to defend our frontline members and flip the seats we need. But time is running out. We can’t afford to fall short when our majority depends on it. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for being a supporter we can count on, — The Blue Dogs Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sh*t done. Hi Peter, We’ve set an ambitious grassroots fundraising goal to hit before the end of the month this coming Tuesday, September 30. It’s ambitious because it needs to be. With new GOP gerrymandering attempts popping up all over the country, and vital Virginia and Pennsylvania elections in less than 6 weeks, we have to keep pace in the fight for democracy. To reach a huge goal, you need to stay on track every day — so all we’ve broken out our grassroots total into daily targets. And we’re closing in on today’s number, which would set the tone for the final days of this fundraising drive — so **we’re just looking for 8 more donations from CA by midnight.** [**Can you make one of those 8 contributions? Please contribute any amount to help prevent GOP gerrymandering, elect fair maps champions in 2025 and beyond, and build a truly representative democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116130579/572565484/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_EOQE5_email_20250928-NDRC-Tier1-EOQE5_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250928-NDRC-Tier1-EOQE5_&utm_campaign=EOQE5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxODYxMzc5LWI2OWMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aIKWl2-kHPDUnENguDLQfy-PDfmviZaU8aWieK3qxr8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

But Republicans around the country are scared to face the voters after going along with Donald Trump’s toxic agenda — so they’re trying to silence the will of the people through brazen gerrymandering.
We’re fighting back against these anti-democracy forces. But we count on strong, ongoing grassroots support to power this work. And as we race towards the end of the month, we’ve got to stay on top of all our daily targets, so we’re asking for 8 more donations from CA by midnight.

It’s ambitious because it needs to be. With new GOP gerrymandering attempts popping up all over the country, and vital Virginia and Pennsylvania elections in less than 6 weeks, we have to keep pace in the fight for democracy. To reach a huge goal, you need to stay on track every day — so all we’ve broken out our grassroots total into daily targets. And we’re closing in on today’s number, which would set the tone for the final days of this fundraising drive — so we’re just looking for 8 more donations from CA by midnight. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’re fighting for fair maps because voters should be able to choose their politicians, not the other way around. We’re fighting back against these anti-democracy forces. But we count on strong, ongoing grassroots support to power this work. And as we race towards the end of the month, we’ve got to stay on top of all our daily targets, so we’re asking for 8 more donations from CA by midnight. = Thank you, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:
I want to be fully transparent about where we stand in CO's race.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130709/572565769/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk927-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDY0MDkyZi1iNzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rkTDhCrBYJqJ_2ZvurWDHVMLbeTMAk9craim1TG3EU=)
Hi friend – it's Ben, Michael's campaign manager.
**Before Tuesday's end-of-quarter deadline, I want to be fully transparent about what's going on in Colorado's race for governor.**
Now that we've got a serious Trump-aligned Republican opponent, we need to start preparing for trouble from the national GOP. Outside groups will soon start directing their dark money to flood the state's airwaves, and far-right political operatives will be watching to judge how strong our grassroots team really is.
**That's why Tuesday is so important. After 11:59 p.m. that night, we'll close our books and report our fundraising numbers from the past three months to the Colorado Secretary of State.** And soon after that, they'll go public for the world – _including major GOP donors_ – to see.
**[So to close out this quarter strong, we've set a $100,000 goal: not just to prove we've got what it takes to win, but also to fund the crucial work ahead of us. And we can't reach it without the support of folks like you – one $5 donation at a time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130710/572565770/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk927-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDY0MDkyZi1iNzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rkTDhCrBYJqJ_2ZvurWDHVMLbeTMAk9craim1TG3EU=)**
| | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130711/572565771/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk927-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDY0MDkyZi1iNzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rkTDhCrBYJqJ_2ZvurWDHVMLbeTMAk9craim1TG3EU=)
---
But if you're still not convinced, here's what your $5 has the power to do:
* Recruit and train volunteers to reach voters in every county across the state

* Build our digital and rapid response teams to counter GOP misinformation

* Keep Michael's message front and center: rebuilding Colorado's middle class, providing a vision for the country on how to best resist Trump and making Colorado the best state to live, work and raise a family

At his core, Michael believes that we have a responsibility to build opportunity for one another and the next generation.

It's what led his work in Washington, D.C., as Colorado's U.S. senator, and it's why he's running to help build a brighter future for Colorado here at home.
But turning those values into meaningful solutions for Coloradans will first require winning this race – **and to make that happen, we need every single member of this grassroots team to step up to the plate ahead of our biggest quarterly fundraising deadline yet on Tuesday.**
**[So please, friend, will you help us reach our $100,000 end-of-quarter goal by pitching in $5, or anything you can give, right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130712/572565772/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk927-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDY0MDkyZi1iNzljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rkTDhCrBYJqJ_2ZvurWDHVMLbeTMAk9craim1TG3EU=)**

That's why Tuesday is so important. After 11:59 p.m. that night, we'll close our books and report our fundraising numbers from the past three months to the Colorado Secretary of State. It's what led his work in Washington, D.C., as Colorado's U.S. senator, and it's why he's running to help build a brighter future for Colorado here at home. name: JB Pritzker
subject: This ain’t a safe blue seat, folks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
This is step one in taking back the Senate from the Republicans.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250928_2_pappas?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-4714&refcode2=4714_400544_i1_ItZ&akid=4714%2E400544%2Ei1_ItZ)
It’s Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.
I’m writing to you today because [**I hope you’ll split a donation between my friend Chris Pappas’s campaign for Senate and Deb Haaland.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250928_2_pappas?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-%7B%7Bmailing_id}&refcode2=4714_400544_i1_ItZ&akid=4714%2E400544%2Ei1_ItZ)
Look... **It’s been months of Trump 2.0** , and we’ve seen more than enough to call this a failure.
Our small businesses don’t deserve to be bankrupted by unsustainable tariffs. Our citizens don’t deserve to lose health care because Republicans want to hand tax cuts to billionaires.
National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority. After all, the Granite State just elected a Republican governor — so it’s clear: _this isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._
Electing Chris Pappas and keeping this seat blue is step one to taking back the Senate from Republicans. **[So if you can, please split $5 between Chris’s campaign and Deb Haaland today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250928_2_pappas?amount=5&refcode=em20250928-4714&refcode2=4714_400544_i1_ItZ&akid=4714%2E400544%2Ei1_ItZ)**

Thank you for your support.
**JB Pritzker**
Governor of Illinois
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250928-2&t=1&refcode2=4714_400544_i1_ItZ&akid=4714%2E400544%2Ei1_ItZ)**

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly’s most important supporters aren’t the people who write the biggest checks.
#

Friend —
Mark Kelly’s most important supporters aren’t the people who write the biggest checks.
They’re the people who were there when it mattered most.
People like you.
---

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
Because of you, Mark Kelly is one of the leading voices speaking out against Trump in the United States Senate.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, only a fraction of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that special group of people.
---

Mark’s average donation online is around $19. Some give more, many give less. But with Donald Trump pushing our democracy to the brink, all that matters is that you’re supporting Mark at a time he needs it most.
We’ll put that donation right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he doesn’t know the meaning of quit.
---

[**If any of that sounds worth a donation to support Mark, please: We’re humbly asking that you chip in $3 before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25.8HUEZn&refcode=em250928-2-f&t=1&akid=6200%2E6688874%2Eijx_3T)

---
Peter, we are just days away from my end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. Several ultra-MAGA opponents have entered the race. And GOP-aligned Super PACs are already spending millions attacking me. This is the fight ahead. And I need you by my side. Before you turn in: [Can you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me win in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130927/572566535/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_092825_EOQ6_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFiYjdmOS1iOTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Acu6IZkwXUowzt1MN0sQbH2M-LoTqTcO9hAyjxHPsmo=) | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130932/572566541/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_092825_EOQ6_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFiYjdmOS1iOTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Acu6IZkwXUowzt1MN0sQbH2M-LoTqTcO9hAyjxHPsmo=)**
---
When I first ran for Senate five years ago, it was because I believed the election of someone so deeply unfit for the presidency posed a danger to the country.
Many people said it couldn’t be done. But you believed — not just in me, but that our Republic is worth defending, and Georgia could lead the way.
Then we won. Not just a Senate seat, but the Senate majority for Democrats.
Now Trump has launched a power grab unprecedented in our history, abusing his power and trying to poison our Republic with fear and intimidation.
Americans are now living in fear of their own government.
I’m fighting back, but I can’t do this alone.
I need you with me.
[Please, if you can make it work, split what you can between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia before our fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130935/572566544/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_092825_EOQ6_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFiYjdmOS1iOTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Acu6IZkwXUowzt1MN0sQbH2M-LoTqTcO9hAyjxHPsmo=)
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116130938/572566548/-1341868506?amount=5&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_092825_EOQ6_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFiYjdmOS1iOTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Acu6IZkwXUowzt1MN0sQbH2M-LoTqTcO9hAyjxHPsmo=)**
---
As always,

I’m sorry to be so blunt with this fundraising request, but here’s the reality: I intend to win again, and that costs money.
Since my community sent me to Congress, I’ve been focused on a simple idea: if you work hard and play by the rules, you should be able to afford a decent life. We’ve got to bring down costs, create good solid jobs, and battle back the corruption that stands in the way. We’ve got to restore the American Dream.
**But since Trump and Republicans have taken full control of our government, we’ve seen costs rise, the job market tank, and corruption run amok.**
Over the past few months, they’ve rammed through their weak and feckless agenda that is making healthcare more and more expensive, threatens my fellow veterans' earned care, and puts Social Security at risk, while giving tax handouts to corporations and billionaires.
This is unacceptable. The America I know believes in hard work, not corporate handouts. And that’s why it’s so important we stand together to end the GOP’s stranglehold on Washington and put hardworking people first. _That’s why it’s so important that we take back the House next November._
Now, I know you might be thinking: “November is more than a year away — that’s so far off!” But here’s the thing: the path to flipping the House and protecting this battleground seat has already started.
I’m the only Democrat defending a battleground seat in Pennsylvania, which means this will be another hard-fought race. I’m ready to keep throwing punches and lead in this righteous fight, but I can’t do it without your help.
[**So with your support, I know we have what it takes to defend PA-17 and flip the House blue next year. If you’re with me, please pitch in now to help hit our end-of-quarter goal and keep up our fight for Western PA in Congress →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131090/572567022/-898016266?refcode=email_092825_eoq2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Y0YWVkMy1iYTljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L890mylgfQFhIev8xjMbvyWdZ-IvxPM-r5DlDUlB6qI=)

clean_body: Derek, my team just told me that we’re still $3,426 short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. That’s why I’m personally writing to ask for your help: = | | = I’m sorry to be so blunt with this fundraising request, but here’s the reality: I intend to win again, and that costs money. Since my community sent me to Congress, I’ve been focused on a simple idea: if you work hard and play by the rules, you should be able to afford a decent life. We’ve got to bring down costs, create good solid jobs, and battle back the corruption that stands in the way. We’ve got to restore the American Dream. But since Trump and Republicans have taken full control of our government, we’ve seen costs rise, the job market tank, and corruption run amok. Over the past few months, they’ve rammed through their weak and feckless agenda that is making healthcare more and more expensive, threatens my fellow veterans' earned care, and puts Social Security at risk, while giving tax handouts to corporations and billionaires. This is unacceptable. The America I know believes in hard work, not corporate handouts. And that’s why it’s so important we stand together to end the GOP’s stranglehold on Washington and put hardworking people first. That’s why it’s so important that we take back the House next November. Now, I know you might be thinking: “November is more than a year away — that’s so far off!” But here’s the thing: the path to flipping the House and protecting this battleground seat has already started. I’m the only Democrat defending a battleground seat in Pennsylvania, which means this will be another hard-fought race. I’m ready to keep throwing punches and lead in this righteous fight, but I can’t do it without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. subject: This will be one of the closest and most expensive elections in the country

body:
$25 because this will be one of the closest and most expensive elections in the country, and it will take all of us working together to win it.
| **$25**.

That is the contribution I’m asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia and The Long Run.

**$25** to fight back against the never-ending onslaught of attack ads from right-wing, billionaire-funded Super PACs.

**$25** to build out a massive organizing and mobilization effort that will reach every Georgian all across the state.

**$25** because this will be one of the closest and most expensive elections in the country, and it will take all of us working together to win it.

You might think that a single $25 contribution can’t make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.

But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $25 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.

[_**Please use this link to split a $25 contribution between my reelection campaign and The Long Run before our FEC deadline. My team and I will put your donation right to work WINNING this U.S. Senate race.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5598?t=1&akid=5620%2E196590%2Eguh5rd)

disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z) **HORRIBLE FROM _BBC:_ **[ **“Trump pushes Justice Department to prosecute his political opponents” ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=3&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)

Team, this is unprecedented. Donald Trump is **PRESSURING** the Department of Justice to go after those who he dislikes and use the power of the federal government against them.

[ **SO, we are launching an emergency poll to get local Democrats’ opinions. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=4&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)[ **Do you approve of the DOJ? >>> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=5&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z) | [Yes, I approve of the Department of Justice](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=6&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)
---

[No, I do not approve of the Department of Justice](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=7&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)
---
[ **This poll is registered to dpwillis67@gmail.com only.
If you are not dpwillis67@gmail.com do not respond. | 11:59 PM DEADLINE TO SUBMIT ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=8&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)
The Department of Justice was created with the core value of _“Independence and Impartiality”._ With a mission to uphold the rule of law _without prejudice or improper influence._ **These values have completely gone out the window.**

[ **Donald Trump attacks our freedoms day after day and the DOJ is following suit.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=9&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)

Do not ignore this request. [ **Submit your response before 11:59PM TONIGHT.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=10&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)
[ **Do you approve of the DOJ? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69215?t=11&akid=23444%2E4449941%2Eb8ht7z)

Fight for Reform

name: Robert Garcia
subject: How Texas’ GOP power-grab affects my California district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
This is not the California I know
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131175/572567304/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWU4ZDBlYi1iYjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4ExqpXs87uP20oGAO5bsnL_KVKqqObLbNXLdDR7HjU=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
Right now, California Democrats are working on a new congressional map to help counter the Republicans’ outrageous power grab in Texas.
**My new district will include communities that MAGA is trying to take over — like Huntington Beach.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131176/572567305/789508428?refcode=250928_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWU4ZDBlYi1iYjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4ExqpXs87uP20oGAO5bsnL_KVKqqObLbNXLdDR7HjU=)**
Look, I will proudly represent all parts of my district, but adding “California’s MAGA stronghold” means my reelection campaign just got harder.
**[That’s why I’m asking for your support to help ensure I’m prepared to win reelection and continue fighting for our hopeful, progressive future on behalf of all Californians. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131177/572567306/789508428?refcode=250928_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWU4ZDBlYi1iYjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4ExqpXs87uP20oGAO5bsnL_KVKqqObLbNXLdDR7HjU=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131178/572567307/-309737922?refcode=250928_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWU4ZDBlYi1iYjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4ExqpXs87uP20oGAO5bsnL_KVKqqObLbNXLdDR7HjU=)
Right now, MAGA leaders in California are pushing divisive culture-war issues — from banning Pride flags from city property, to imposing voter ID requirements, to targeting curriculum and library books for review.
**Let me be clear: That’s not who we are. And it’s not the California I want to defend.**
But at the same time, California is poised to adopt new congressional maps in an effort to ensure fairer representation, which means that many districts, including mine, will look different.
**Because of those changes, every vote, every volunteer, every dollar counts more than ever. We must make sure that under the new maps, our community doesn’t get diluted, our values don’t get silenced, and our progress doesn’t get erased.**
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today so I can run a campaign that meets this moment. Can I count on you when it matters most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131179/572567308/789508428?refcode=250928_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWU4ZDBlYi1iYjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4ExqpXs87uP20oGAO5bsnL_KVKqqObLbNXLdDR7HjU=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131180/572567309/-309737922?refcode=250928_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWU4ZDBlYi1iYjljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4ExqpXs87uP20oGAO5bsnL_KVKqqObLbNXLdDR7HjU=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia

Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. Hi team. It's Janelle Stelson, and I am running to flip PA-10 from red to blue and fire Congressman Scott Perry. Let me explain why... As a news anchor for more than 30 years, I built my entire career on **_trust and truth._** Congressman Perry can't say the same. **_He is a liar_** , and we have to vote him out. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131489/572568401/635195061?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092825_LIAR_90DO30NTL_D2_S6_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg3ZTQwMDQtYmU5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jXkBMybCHVlvQ9BNmfxGh8nurc9DwQ-E-eDUPvkkv1A=) [**If that is all you need to hear, will you pitch in now ahead of my big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? This is one of _the_ biggest House races in the entire country, so I need your help to ensure I have the resources to combat the GOP dark money that will be flooding PA-10.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131490/572568402/635195061?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092825_LIAR_90DO30NTL_D2_S6_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg3ZTQwMDQtYmU5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jXkBMybCHVlvQ9BNmfxGh8nurc9DwQ-E-eDUPvkkv1A=) Here is what you need to know about Perry's track record of lies: **Scott Perry's lie:** He's tweeting about how our economy is booming — no doubt to make himself look good. **Fact check:** Thanks to Perry's votes, health insurance premiums are skyrocketing, millions are getting kicked off their healthcare, job growth is the slowest it's been in over a decade, and his tariffs are causing the cost of groceries and goods to go up. That IS NOT a booming economy! **Scott Perry's lie:** He perpetuated the "Big Lie" of a "stolen election" in 2020, claiming Italian satellites changed the results in voting machines. **Fact check:** Despite absolutely zero evidence of election interference, Perry continued to perpetuate the Big Lie and **_helped plan_** the January 6th insurrection, where law enforcement officers lost their lives. **Scott Perry's lie:** Perry claims to support Medicaid and Social Security — critical programs that seniors and low-income families depend on. **Fact check:** Perry votes for bills that _**slash**_ Medicaid benefits and supports programs that make it _**harder**_ for Americans to access the Social Security benefits they've paid into their whole lives. Those lies are why Scott Perry is struggling in his 8th congressional campaign and now has _**negative approval ratings!**_ We cannot trust him. You deserve to be represented by someone who will lead with integrity and honesty. Someone who will protect our health care, reproductive rights, public schools, and democracy. I will be that person for you in Washington, D.C. [**So, will you help me oust Congressman Perry and flip PA-10 from red to blue by making a donation to our campaign today? We are up against the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and every single dollar helps.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131491/572568403/635195061?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092825_LIAR_90DO30NTL_D2_S6_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg3ZTQwMDQtYmU5Yy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jXkBMybCHVlvQ9BNmfxGh8nurc9DwQ-E-eDUPvkkv1A=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: As a news anchor for more than 30 years, I built my entire career on trust and truth. Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi team. It's Janelle Stelson, and I am running to flip PA-10 from red to blue and fire Congressman Scott Perry. Let me explain why... As a news anchor for more than 30 years, I built my entire career on trust and truth. Congressman Perry can't say the same. He is a liar , and we have to vote him out. = = Here is what you need to know about Perry's track record of lies: Scott Perry's lie: He's tweeting about how our economy is booming — no doubt to make himself look good. Fact check: Thanks to Perry's votes, health insurance premiums are skyrocketing, millions are getting kicked off their healthcare, job growth is the slowest it's been in over a decade, and his tariffs are causing the cost of groceries and goods to go up. That IS NOT a booming economy! Scott Perry's lie: He perpetuated the "Big Lie" of a "stolen election" in 2020, claiming Italian satellites changed the results in voting machines. Fact check: Despite absolutely zero evidence of election interference, Perry continued to perpetuate the Big Lie and helped plan the January 6th insurrection, where law enforcement officers lost their lives. Scott Perry's lie: Perry claims to support Medicaid and Social Security — critical programs that seniors and low-income families depend on. Fact check: Perry votes for bills that slash Medicaid benefits and supports programs that make it harder for Americans to access the Social Security benefits they've paid into their whole lives. Those lies are why Scott Perry is struggling in his 8th congressional campaign and now has negative approval ratings! We cannot trust him. You deserve to be represented by someone who will lead with integrity and honesty. Someone who will protect our health care, reproductive rights, public schools, and democracy. I will be that person for you in Washington, D.C. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Janelle Stelson | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson is someone we can trust. Can you split a contribution between Roy’s campaign and mine today? Every donation gets us closer to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131468/572568357/723181250?refcode=ea.363576e0-bd9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.363576e0-bd9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1NzZlMC1iZDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6h5YCQ1ZFCYVxcOZKmatIjsN2AU1q7fU1MSXw4dHWVc=)** **I’ve seen firsthand the kind of money that Republicans will throw at competitive Senate races, and the race for North Carolina could be unlike anything we’ve seen before.** They’re ready to pour hundreds of millions of dollars into defeating Roy. They know that North Carolina is the key to the Senate majority, and that if we defeat the GOP there, we can STOP their extreme agenda in Washington. Senate Republicans are taking away from the most vulnerable, all to put more into billionaires’ pockets. The American people are demanding change, and we have to take back the Senate to provide it. The path to taking back the U.S. Senate runs through North Carolina. Roy is the only Democrat who can win this race. But Republicans are not going to make this an easy fight. That’s why we need to get behind Roy now, and stay with him until Election Day. **[Anything you can give between Roy’s campaign and mine will help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116131469/572568359/723181250?refcode=ea.363576e0-bd9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.363576e0-bd9c-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1NzZlMC1iZDljLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6h5YCQ1ZFCYVxcOZKmatIjsN2AU1q7fU1MSXw4dHWVc=)** Let’s win this one, Senator Mark Kelly
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Katie Porter
subject: A quick note from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I’m writing to you tonight about my campaign’s upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.
Hi Peter,
I’m writing to you tonight about my campaign’s upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I know you probably get a lot of emails like this, but I want to explain why my campaign does things a little differently, and what’s at stake right now.
My team set a goal of raising $200,000 before midnight on Tuesday. It’s a big target, but I know we can reach it together. **[Click here to chip in right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250928_2_ak?refcode=em20250928-40210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40210_3422442_R2r7yB&akid=40210%2E3422442%2ER2r7yB)**
A recent poll shows that our campaign is in the lead. But I’ve learned from my congressional races that you have to work hard through the finish line to win—and to deliver the bold change Californians deserve.
Here’s the truth: I’m not a wealthy candidate who can pour millions of my own money into this race. I also don’t have corporate special interests I can count on to boost our message. Instead, **I rely on grassroots donations from people like you.** With your support, we can lower costs, protect our health care, build more housing, and make Californians’ lives better.
That’s why this $200,000 goal matters. Every dollar helps us expand our lead and show the strength of a campaign powered by the people, not special interests.
Peter, I hope I’ve explained why your support is so important. If you’re ready to join this team, **[click here to make a contribution of any amount today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250928_2_ak?refcode=em20250928-40210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40210_3422442_R2r7yB&akid=40210%2E3422442%2ER2r7yB)**
I can’t tell you how much I appreciate your support. Now, let's get to work.
Thank you,
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40210&t=1&akid=40210%2E3422442%2ER2r7yB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40210)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40210&t=2&akid=40210%2E3422442%2ER2r7yB)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Can we add you to our list of Founding Donors for James?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
In two days, we’re closing the books on our first official FEC deadline, and we want to make sure you have the chance to have your name included on the list of Talarico for Texas Founding Donors.
This is your chance to say you were one of James’ first supporters. Your donation will lay the foundation for the largest grassroots movement Texas has seen.
[**Will you make your first contribution to send James Talarico to the U.S. Senate and take back the majority? Even just $3 makes a difference for a grassroots campaign like ours.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250928-2-ak&t=1&akid=79%2E1347274%2EtqciVo)
James is a leader you can be proud to support.
He’s an 8th-generation Texan, former middle school teacher, Presbyterian seminarian, and he’s been a proud Democrat since his mom taught him at a young age that our party fights for the people.
Whether it’s working across the aisle to cap insulin costs, or taking on the billionaire mega-donors who have taken over Texas, James has always spoken truth to power and has never backed down from a fight.
But he cannot take on this rigged system without you. No one person could take on these powerful special interests alone. It takes all of us giving our time and our resources to organize against this corruption.
That’s why it’s important to show just how many people are supporting James’ campaign before the FEC deadline.
[**So please, if you’re with James in this fight, add your donation of any amount today to become a Founding Donor. We’re going to send him a list of everybody who donates before the deadline. We know it’d mean a lot to him to see your name.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250928-2-ak&t=2&akid=79%2E1347274%2EtqciVo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

Adding your name to our list of Founding Donors sends a powerful message to everyone watching.
This list isn’t just about how much money we raise. It’s about how many contributions this campaign has received that sets us apart from our opponents and their corporate and billionaire mega-donors.
Team Talarico
