name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: I took this advice from Bernie to heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250928-1001&t=1001&akid=1015%2E251025%2Eub6GiZ ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250928-1001&t=1002&akid=1015%2E251025%2Eub6GiZ ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

Early in my career, Bernie Sanders gave me a piece of advice I’ve never
forgotten.

He said, “In politics, people succeed either by being really good at lying
or really good at telling the truth. You strike me as someone who’s not
good at lying — so your job is to get really good at telling the truth.”

So today, I’m going to tell you some truths about our campaign.

We’re just two points behind the AIPAC-backed candidate. We have the
momentum to win.

September 30th marks our biggest fundraising hurdle yet — the FEC
end-of-quarter deadline.

This is, no exaggeration, a make-or-break moment for our campaign.

In just a couple of days, we need to raise as much as we can to prove that
a people-powered campaign — one that rejects AIPAC and corporate PAC money
— has enough resources to take on the establishment and win.

Finally, one more piece of truth: I don’t love asking people for money.

But because this is a 100% people-powered campaign, I’m relying on folks
like you who care about the future of our party and our country to pitch

clean_body: [ ]Abdul for US Senate [ ]Abdul for US Senate Hey Peter, Early in my career, Bernie Sanders gave me a piece of advice I’ve never forgotten. He said, “In politics, people succeed either by being really good at lying or really good at telling the truth. You strike me as someone who’s not good at lying — so your job is to get really good at telling the truth.” So today, I’m going to tell you some truths about our campaign. We’re just two points behind the AIPAC-backed candidate. We have the momentum to win. September 30th marks our biggest fundraising hurdle yet — the FEC end-of-quarter deadline. This is, no exaggeration, a make-or-break moment for our campaign. In just a couple of days, we need to raise as much as we can to prove that a people-powered campaign — one that rejects AIPAC and corporate PAC money — has enough resources to take on the establishment and win. Finally, one more piece of truth: I don’t love asking people for money. But because this is a 100% people-powered campaign, I’m relying on folks like you who care about the future of our party and our country to pitch in. [ ]If you can contribute today, it would mean the world: [ ]Donate $10 ›› Thank you, Abdul

We’re entering crunch time. With just 3 days left in the quarter, we still need to raise $6,000 to reach our $8,500 goal.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Peggy gives me hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---
Right now we need to build our power in the Senate with true fighters for the working class. Billionaires have taken over the government. Republicans in Congress won’t stand up as Donald Trump wrecks our economy. And working families who were already struggling to get by are now paying even more for everyday needs. We need something totally different. [**That’s why I’m supporting my friend Peggy Flanagan as she runs for Senate in Minnesota — and why I’m asking if you can split a donation of $28 or anything you can ahead of the critical FEC fundraising deadline on September 30 to help her campaign compete and win.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?amount=28&t=8&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---

---
Peggy is tough, smart, experienced, and ready to take on corrupt special interests to make life better for working families. She knows what it’s like to struggle to get by in this economy. She’s the daughter of a single mother who understands what it’s like to worry the bottom could fall out at any moment. That experience drove her fight to raise the minimum wage and make paid family leave a reality for Minnesotans. She’s won statewide office in Minnesota not once, but twice. She fights from the heart and she knows how to win. She’s the partner I need in the Senate to make real progress on the issues that matter most right now: Housing, childcare, and the cost of living. But winning this race will not be easy. Peggy isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money because she is running to support working families — not special interests. That means she’s relying on the support of this grassroots team to help her compete. [**If you’re able, please split a donation now to support Peggy Flanagan and our campaign before the September 30 fundraising deadline. Your support will help send a champion for working families to the Senate and power our fight for an economy that works for all of us — not just the billionaires and giant corporations.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=14&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1) Running for office is an act of hope. And Peggy gives me so much hope. Thanks for being part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3162?t=12&akid=2664%2E4032634%2E0zB7H1)
---

clean_body: | | | Right now we need to build our power in the Senate with true fighters for the working class. Billionaires have taken over the government. Republicans in Congress won’t stand up as Donald Trump wrecks our economy. And working families who were already struggling to get by are now paying even more for everyday needs. We need something totally different. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | Peggy is tough, smart, experienced, and ready to take on corrupt special interests to make life better for working families. She knows what it’s like to struggle to get by in this economy. She’s the daughter of a single mother who understands what it’s like to worry the bottom could fall out at any moment. That experience drove her fight to raise the minimum wage and make paid family leave a reality for Minnesotans. She’s won statewide office in Minnesota not once, but twice. She fights from the heart and she knows how to win. She’s the partner I need in the Senate to make real progress on the issues that matter most right now: Housing, childcare, and the cost of living. But winning this race will not be easy. Peggy isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money because she is running to support working families — not special interests. That means she’s relying on the support of this grassroots team to help her compete. Running for office is an act of hope. And Peggy gives me so much hope. Thanks for being part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2025 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .
